第一次看這張譜時確實感到很多驚訝地點，但相對的手感與美感無法兼得，
看著看著手感不是很好，也有很多地方很容易蹭到。
Slide是真的很帥，排鍵也是還不錯給到中上，很可惜的是對於感應區不太熟悉的感覺，很多地方超危險超容易有蹭條風險。
整體而言不太喜歡表現出來的樣子，但細節是挺喜歡的。
**僅限個人看法**

是以中低速散点特色的谱面诶 散点设计上整体跳不出太大的毛病 结尾的大跨度散点suki
细节上还有能再稍微推敲的成分 开头用小鸟游五连其实我觉得不太好 这个配置对于开头的强度来说显得太强了 个人更倾向于把lead的音踩齐再在这个基础上铺散点 此外第二组长v段的散点跨度反而比前面短v段的跨度来的小了 从递进的角度来说有一些逆趋势
副歌感觉设计的反而有些平庸 低bpm的情况下其实是可以写点更大胆的东西的 二副相较于一副递进也不是特别充分 除了引入折线一笔画之外好像也没有特别大的递进 有些浪费其他部分突出的散点设计了 可以试试加入出张或者适当的将散点多融入到配置中去 细节上的话表现kokoro的一笔画有点太快了 可以不用一笔画的思路写7V53和2v8的两根 310cb的星星速度对于这个长度有些略快
从夯到拉锐评本曲neta，两处副歌押bga我直接给到夯爆了，虽然在高bpm下有不少地方手感还值得商榷，但是这种歌嘛，写的好笑好玩就足够了，**只要有人能黄，那就说明写的没问题（暴论）**
关于1:37秒那段的评价可能带有我的一点主观看法，先对谱师说声抱歉。原因是因为前面进一副的时候给了8-4星星一个烟花touch，我实在不理解为什么相对于一副情感爆发更强烈的二副这里只用一根绝赞星星来处理。如果谱师可以在采音和表现力上再做调整的话，我相信这张谱面会成为很棒的谱面的。

很桃子猫的歌，很桃子猫的谱，打起来很爽，看着也很工整。
但是看得出来很多小问题，其中补音的问题比较大，该补的地方没补，不该补的地方补，很容易就能发现补的音和歌曲没有一致性。
副歌的配置也可以再打磨打磨，总而言之是一张中规中矩的谱面。
神谱，整张谱面难度曲线合理，情绪推进到位，手感优秀，能看出谱师很多地方为了手感克制住了“想写难”的冲动；243cb这段hold引导神了，很好的铺垫了后面574cb；954cb的neta白打架的双扫很爽，作为一个14的尾杀个人认为是很可以的；所有A区启动touch都有touch group好评；其余别人多少都提了，总之是一张完成度很高的谱面，爱了
整个谱采音逻辑很怪 副歌采音一些水段居然完全跟死vocal 反而该采满的段落全用星星铺过去 而且这歌小节奏很多 选择把所有细节都采上的话对于没听过原曲的人来说会很跳脸杀 整体配置流畅度倒还在预期内 就是190combo附近的右接8-4 左接1-5有反接的可能性 谱师今后写谱要额外注意类似的可能有多种打法的小片段
地狱一般的信息量分配，最迫在眉睫的地方应该就是先把主歌强度狠狠降下来，把副歌写的再对称一点，越是这种信息量比较充分的歌越不能全部铺满；这里推荐一张mmfc6的优秀铺面观摩学习：BV1Np4y1Z7W3/

看得出来谱师很老练了，正常摆键上加小点子的效果不是一般的好，配置的搭配也相当成熟，虽然这一张看上去没有什么大的记忆点但是有很多小地方能让人看到就能想起来是这张谱。
当然、其他人说的那个wifi的问题确实也需要改进，但如果作为一张**给朋友开并让他夸这是张好谱**的谱的话，这谱的整体质量是完全够用的。XD

如果你说的是144，176和597的双黄星星引导，这里的本意就是引导玩家左手8号键右手6号键或者右手1号键左手3号键形成交叉动作接管子的，后面只是平移移动到7号和5号或2号和4号并没有换手，直到出现1号和7号或8号和2号才交叉换手。这部分设计就是还原pv的舞蹈动作，先抖动后交叉换手。
如果你说的是520的俩根黄星星（6^3/2q7），这里是为了还原pv的miku交叉手抱着自己身体的动作，而且后面无论正反手接18号键都是可解的手顺，还加了保护套防初见杀。

结构上的问题还是很严重的，主要体现在两个地方：主歌部分的采音有点太过依赖人声了，需要降低一下强度来贴合歌曲的氛围。两段副歌几乎是复制粘贴的，没有任何变形递进。

因为是长曲所以需要更加注意到编排 在这一块我个人感觉是基本合格的 不过我觉得还有一定的改进空间 例如说一副这里其实强度还可以稍微再弱一点 例如说465cb这里的touch我感觉留在二副做加强用会更好 一副就用的话其实有一些臃肿了 还有例如说725cb进休息段 其实休息段之后的配置我个人感觉可以再稍微克制一下 等到二副再或者二副后半再加强会更好 因为这里一副刚过 在前半已经强度就有些超载的情况下 将休息段到二副（要再克制一点甚至可以是二副后半）的段落视作一个整体的bulidup做编排会更好

# 很贴歌的 13+

> 作为 mmfc13 首发，这张谱不孬。

---

## 一、配置性 —— 结构把控出色，结尾略有遗憾

> 整体配置在律动与递进等结构性要素上把控得非常好。

- 谱面对乐曲的贴合度很高，节奏感自然流畅
- 对于新要素的运用较为灵活，能看出谱师的设计思路
- 段落之间的递进关系清晰，整体结构完整

**一点小扣分：**
> 最结尾那种 `th` 写法，其实有点小掉分。

---

## 二、游玩性 —— 手感舒适，结尾略逊

> 打起来非常舒服，整体体验良好。

- 配置整体合理，没有强行难为人的设计
- 谱师很有想法，游玩过程中能感受到设计意图

**需要注意的地方：**
- 最后那两个 `th` 手感略差，算是全篇唯一的明显短板

---



| 维度 | 评价 |
|------|------|
| 配置性 | 律动与递进把控出色，新要素运用灵活，结尾 th 略扣分 |
| 游玩性 | 整体舒适合理，谱师有想法，结尾手感稍逊 |
谱面没有非常有问题的地方，不过总体的引导太弱了，游玩过程中会有左手和右手搞反的情况，谱面没有特别让人眼前一亮的感觉，这种写法不会出问题但是也不会留下很深刻的印象，也祝你比赛加油！

从主歌就能看出来谱师很在意星星和排键的观感，是个纤细的谱师啊。作为一张点子驱动的谱面，观赏性不错的，手感也还可以，但是这个点子贴不贴歌我觉得得打上个问号。

这首歌副歌每个音都很清晰很突出，用双押扫来采就有一种“糊弄感”，弱化采音，把本该强调的音忽略了；其次就是这种活泼的歌曲实在不适合全铺双押，添加下内容是必不可少的。以我的观点这歌就不能套白白银啊，从参赛谱角度我不认可这样写。不过谱师应该玩的很开心吧！

主歌的写法我该评点啥呢。。。。排键是那种整洁的类型，很耐看，如果谱师赛后改良成协力谱我会非常喜欢的。
低BPM谱面中的佼佼者！踩音符合直觉，配置十分美丽，很久没看到这么棒的不常见类型的谱面了。我愿意给出一个高分

I don't like the chart as a whole, I believe the motif here was to use the {8}2-5[8:1],1,2, as an idea to show emotion. I'm okay with the decision and I think that was done quite well. However, every other section of the chart doesn't feel very suitable for the song. This song feels and sounds like something someone would cry out singing, I was hoping you would present that idea in this chart. Instead, it just feels like a person is watching seriously and emotionlessly at someone cry out singing like a psychopath.

I feel like the beat selection here is very off. It jumps between instrumental and vocal picking that I just can never grasp the vibe of it. It raises a lot of confusion. Sure it plays well, but it really doesn't look like it serves any purpose other than 'to play'. At that point, I rather play something else.

The density towards the end amplified the fact that the song is being forced to be a 14 without paying attention the difficulty progression, especially at Combo 551. That was really really unnecessary.

Since it's all negative at this point, let me say one thing nice. Combo 586 to 612, absolutely peak. I'm stealing it.

Thanks for your hard work.

还行的官re吧，采音确实做了些许区分，但是副歌的那个区分的很不好，一下子把采音拉的特别高，明明歌曲没有突然一下爆起，就会显得很突兀，前后谱面也显得割裂，这个一下起这么高感觉就没有很必要，要么就在前面也铺垫一点扫，要么就更换起情感的配置才合理。配置方面的话也是完全比不上原谱的精简干练，毕竟rion也算是颇具特色的一位老谱师，而原谱起情感的方式虽然仅仅是选择了一下配置让你侧身子，就特别好的起到了起情感的作用，这张谱的各种配置确实很流畅，也确实有在变化，但是相比官谱还是棋差不少招，舞萌的减法谱就是这么有意思，要做到减法起伏有特别多种的办法，而不仅仅是加采音和配置。不过抛开和官谱对比的话总体还是个很好的谱的，有官谱的采音兜底怎么样都不会太出问题，配置也很流畅干净，还行吧
另外想麻烦问一下，请问您所谓“副歌被掩盖的小巧思”是哪一段呢？我个人认为后半程值得留意的小巧思只有一二三四五六七，而显然这一段的强度肯定比开头高上不少，更不可能被掩盖，想了半天实在想不到您说的巧思是哪一段，请麻烦re一下，感谢！

复沓与递进的优秀范例，用的非常的贴切，能根据配置感受到歌曲的情感起伏，让人回味无穷
有几个复沓段的最后改了一下形状，可能是作者想展现下一段要开始的想法，但其实用不着，完全重复的段落中哪怕有一个键改动了也会破坏整体的氛围感

谱面整体的行进比较安定，但在对谱面结构的处理，以及如何抓取和表现特征音上还有一些提升空间。
开头段落之间的区分度并没有做得特别到位，在131cb之前的部分都没有底鼓，整体的配置强度需要尽可能低，但12cb-49cb只进了bass而没有vocal的段落，与131cb后有底鼓有vocal的段落，强度和信息量已经十分接近，这实际上没有那么贴合歌曲本身的行进。以及，从49cb开始有vocal的段落，不管有没有进底鼓，谱师的采音基本都跟着人声走了。一般歌曲进底鼓的地方才是正式开始起情绪的时间点，在这之前还需要再压一下强度和信息量。
265cb处过门的碎鼓用绝赞管子尾巴表现不是那么到位。这一整段的4分底鼓铿锵有力，十分突出，而且背景的”底噪“也是逐渐增大的，这实际上是build up段的鲜明特征，需要一些更有打击感的配置来逐步抬升情绪，一笔画慢星星显然打击感是不够的。
480cb的两个非Cth用头尾分别押了三个音，非Cth的头是需要”打“的，而尾巴实际上除了判定音效之外没啥实感，这里三个音的地位还是比较均等的，这样分别押三个音没有那么合适。以及这一段前后的配器和氛围差异不大，却用了完全不同的配置来表现。
757cb后的这一段，音色比较碎片和机械，这里其实更适合用一些硬硬的键盘。谱师选择用星星来规避严格采音，也能接受吧。只是可以再统一一下特征音色的表现形式，像775cb和800cb这两组相同音色也是用了完全不同的表现形式。

整体游玩下来感觉是很好的
如果副歌能再突出一点情感的爆发就更好了

非常轻松愉快的小歌，流畅中还带了点复古（）

This chart plays very very well... **if it was played on AstroDX**.

The chart plays on a very fundamental struggle and that is body positioning and comfort. If the difficulty of the chart is based on how the player has to bend 90 degrees to play the song properly despite the chart having the density of a 12+, then I really really fuck with it, but the execution feels like it could be better.

Let me just start by saying that the middle section at Combo 233 to 264 is really cute and fun. I can imagine you were probably giggling or smiling gleefully when charting this section. As a player, I was also smiling along as well. In terms of emotional beats, you nailed it.

The rest of the chart is very uncomfortable. I understand there was an intention to make it uncomfortable but some of them wasn't really fitting with the motif and I think it was done rather poorly. I think even if the chart feels uncomfortable, if the chart was done the intended way, it should at least feel rewarding. Some of the section doesn't have the feeling.
- A good example of a good uncomfortable pattern is the sideways slide combo at Combo 319.
- A good example of a bad uncomfortable pattern is the tap tap hold+slide section at Combo 94.

There are sections I would nitpick but overall I really like this concept. If that was your intention, then you have what it takes to be a good charter. If that was not your intention, then maybe you have a hidden talent you have not yet polished. Thank you for your hard work.

A single slide pattern runs through the entire chart, which is really refreshing and perfectly fits the atmosphere of the music. The overall arrangement of the chart is also fantastic.

If I had to nitpick, the pendulum pattern at 0:35 feels a bit abrupt. At 1:26, as the song builds up emotionally into the second chorus, I feel like this slide pattern could use some progression. For example, expanding it to 3 grids ({48}8,7,6x/3x,) and then reverting it back to 2 towards the end might give it more impact.

Of course, I definitely wouldn't be able to come up with an idea like this myself, nor could I write a quality chart like this. The above is just my humble opinion, please take it for your reference only!

Wishing you the best of luck and a great result in this contest! Also, congratulations on your upcoming wedding, and wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness!

I really did not enjoy this chart. There is way too many things going on in this chart that really muddles the vibe of the song.

Let me start by saying that the decision to chart this with BPM manipulation is the correct way to do it. The song is meant to be done in such a way that each slides is meant to bring depth to the song. However, you really didn't use it to your advantage here.
- Let me start by saying the note density is too much. There are too many taps and slides. Usually when you chart smth with the 3/4 or 6/8 time signature, it is better to reduce the tap down to `{12}x,x,x,` and not `{24}x,x,x,x,x,x,`.  Because of your decision, there are too many notes flying around with little to no care and was done so just to maintain the pacing.
- There are slides such as Combo 103 offers nothing with the song. The other variation of this shape of the slide also doesn't pair with anything in the song. It really does feel like you were adding just to 'fill up the space'. If the section of the song has nothing to chart, it is better to just do nothing than to add something that makes no sense. If you really have to do something just to make the chart a bit busier, I would recommend chain slides instead so that the previous slide would move a bit longer. Or honestly, just put a hold.

In the end, the chart was done with the best intention but with the worst execution. I recommend studying a bit on what makes Last Samurai such a memorable chart and why it feels good even for more casual players. It's not because of it's BPM nature but because it is a study chart, a chart that is all about feeling. I feel like yours is a bastardized version of the Last Samurai chart.

Thank you for your hard work.

Hello, I think you might be a rather new charter. If so, I hope whatever you are going through, you stay strong and fight on. Your emotions are presented very obviously in this chart and I just want you to know you are loved.

I can see that you put a lot of heart into this chart. It is a purely emotional chart from top to bottom. But within the sea of emotions, your skill as a charter is muddled by your tears.

You are still having trouble with understanding what makes a good chart. The note placement, slide travel speed and use of notes are very all over the place with no clear goal. Your thought process was probably just 'I feel like this is a good place to put this and therefore I will put it here.' If this chart was just your means of revealing your emotions, I think you did a wonderful job.

I am undeniably giving you a low score for this since your chart design is still very very lacking in fundamentals. Therefore, I will just talk about the two things I really like.
- The touch hold in the middle with the right hand holding on 7 and ends with a break swipe at combo 540 was really beautiful. It really does give off the feeling of 'throwing away your graduation cap after the coronation'.
- The final touch to the ex hold is a good way to end the song. The section before that could be done better for sure though.

In the end, I actually did tear up a bit watching the chart. I was once in your shoes of struggling with life so to see someone succeeded in expressing their feelings through art is something I wish I had the opportunity to do. Thank you for your hard work.

I wish you good luck.

Seems like a chart made by a new charter based on the Visual Maimai offset. With that in mind, this chart doesn't have too much mistakes so I think you did a pretty good job at knowing the limits in charting. So, good job on that!

The chart focuses on very very simple beat picking, much akin to how official charters do for their lower difficulty Vocaloid songs. Yours show a bit more of a personal flair so it is slightly more unique.

However more advanced techniques such as note placement, repetition, variation still needs much improvement. I think with enough time you will be able to start presenting your unique ideas.

A nitpick I would like to point out is that the opening section before Combo 62 would be better if it was vertically flipped. Having to cross hand from the bottom is a bit weird. Starting from the top is usually easier to grasp.

That's all from me. The rest is simply too basic for me to elaborate any further. Hope you learn a lot in this contest. Thank you for your hard work!

首先先夸一句选这歌是真有品味。
优点：
全蓝星星思路还是可以的。
开头吊爆了，意境十足，递进很有感觉。

缺点：
1、采音：由于这个谱只围绕了全蓝星星做文章，难免会出现踩音问题，这是可以理解的。但是副歌段的采音实在太迷惑了，我的理解是你还在踩开头同样的那个背景音。但我不能接受你整张谱子只做这种单一的采音，用全蓝星星做挡箭牌我觉得我也不能够接受。我认为还是应该对人声稍微有点反应的，不然真的有点副歌你唱你的我打我的。

2、配置：如果你问我这张谱看下来的印象是什么，我第一反应肯定是那一大堆的ppqq。整个歌都有大量的ppqq要素，导致看到后面有一种没活了，审美疲劳的感觉。作为一张星星谱，我觉得这个是万万不能的。或许可以尝试短直线在开头？尾杀保持原状？

3、贴歌程度：我其实一直在想，副歌的蓝星星真的贴歌吗？主歌的蓝星星我觉得非常完美，是一个特别好的加分点，但反观副歌，我并没有看出来蓝星星和歌曲的贴合度。作为一个观众，我可能很难稳住全曲蓝星星的想法了。

总体看下来给我的感觉就是：开头很惊艳，后面差点没给我看睡着。蓝星星作为整体思路是可以的，但同时也会极大情况限制住谱面。作为二编评论，我的提议仍然是不推荐被局限于全蓝星星，我站在评论的角度也不能因为你写全蓝星星就给你免死金牌。很抱歉，用我的品味我只能给你及格分。欢迎赛后讨论。

全使用四分音星星来完成一个谱面，是很大胆的尝试。 就契合度来说，我觉得这首歌和谱面还是很配的。
不过既然是星星谱，副歌的星星有点初见杀，还要考虑防蹭，如何平衡这两点确实很难做到。~~其实星星谱容易蹭更有味道~~

任务又给我分配到14了吗。实力不足以打14，仅从观感和脑测的方面评价一下吧。
整张谱没有发现违和比较强的采音，配置也很顺手，是十分优秀的一张谱面。
个人认为副歌跟vocal的写法没有什么问题，很多官谱也是这么做的。唯一的瑕疵就是大家说过的星星时值不统一的问题，有些影响手感。

首先在采音处理上存在比较明显的问题。本曲的跳拍节奏应该是将四分音符拆分为 1/6 + 1/12 的节奏，而当前谱面中两部分分别写成了 5/32 + 3/32 和 3/16 + 1/16。

贯穿全曲的 pq 和 ppqq 星星整体速度偏快，阅读和处理上的压力会比较大。像 6pp8、1p4 这类带拐弯的星星，在 200 BPM 下给到 8:1 的处理时长会显得有些紧张，操作空间略微不足，体验上可能会有些仓促。

闪电星星配合左右夹击 tap 的配置本身并不算常见，这里的写法给人的感觉稍微有些突兀，处理起来也不太直观，更偏向初见时的困扰，而在表现力或游玩乐趣上的收益相对有限。如果能在设计逻辑上再顺一些，整体体验可能会更自然。

到了二副及之后的段落，配置逐渐回归到拍划和一笔画上，变化相对减少，整体思路显得有些单一，后半段的内容略微缺乏延展。如果能在这一部分加入更多层次或新的处理方式，整体完成度会更高。

总体来说，这张谱面在采音、节奏处理以及配置多样性上还有一定的优化空间，如果能在这些方面再做一些调整，整体体验会更加平衡和耐玩。

谱面对于touch和touch hold的运用在一些配置上让我比较惊喜，眼前一亮的感觉

开头的强度过高，圈的配置类似静蓝尾杀12分圈，是不适合出现在开头的，谱面整体也呈现出这种趋势，和官谱对比的情况下有点用力过头了，采音过于饱和，一口气都没放下来
二副的开头和一副开头不一样，有个蓄力的趋势，但是谱面没有表达出来，像是没听到一样
总体上来说还是得做做减法，尤其是核心配置，大扫键还是过于臃肿了

虽然仍有提升空间，但已经是蛮不错的一张爽谱，两段副歌的核心和递进做的很清晰。
主要是主二（88cb-120cb）。考虑到前奏已经单采了bass，人声进来需要改变采音逻辑，谱师在主一的补音和配置选取是不错的，既隐约照顾到了人声又用双押强调了bass重音。但是主二用平白散点+fes星星的配置其实并不是很合适，并没有体现人声的特色（比如96cb这里与其用fes星星不如用三下拍滑来表现人声），又舍弃掉了主一对bass重音的表现。

整体信息量偏大的一张谱面，小巧思不少。在这里浅提一些问题：
1、开头的hold锁手初见端倪：13cb这里6h强行引导的作用是什么？手序也比较怪，在谱面刚开始就别设置这种高读谱要求的配置啦，用一些简单的调动就足够了；
2、72cb  4号键两条星星是以反拍启动，下一小节8号键又变成正拍启动了，并且最后一条8-5-2并没有引导成一定要用右手接，会容易造成左手接完了漏掉整组扫键；
3、**重要：采音思路有较大的问题。** 谱面的采音逻辑很跳跃，似乎是想到什么就采什么。例如主歌91cb 148cb这几节造了很多音（尤其是扫键），然而歌曲和前面几节并没有出现很大区分度，显得有点意味不明了。516cb 同样的采音换成了touch圈，比148cb的接受度稍微高一点，不过这样一对比也能发现148cb造势过于大了；副歌的一些跳拍采音在歌曲里的存在感其实比较弱，谱师选择在每两节之间用跳拍来过渡，和八分配置的衔接稍弱，有点见仁见智了，不过还算可以接受吧！
4、副歌的小扫键和间奏的星星确实挺有意思的，感受到谱师的小巧思了。不过局部的引导还是有问题哦（409cb，7号键开始的楼梯交互位置有点卡手，感觉会容易接错）
不管怎么说，是一张比较有趣的谱面，希望谱师继续加油！^_^

This chart was a ride. It took awhile for me to really warm up to this chart because the first half felt a little mild and unpolished. To point out a few things:
- The short touch holds used throughout the song gave me a mixed feeling. I understood that it was an intentional jumpscare or perhaps a deliberate decision to give the feeling of the taiko beat. Obviously this is not going to affect the scoring but I thought I just want to mention it.
- Combo 98 and the occasional variations during this section of the song, was a big jumpscare to me. This is one of the moments I think is not done well enough. The chart doesn't really have moments of jumpiness like this until the very end (which was telegraphed decently well at the back but not here). I was hoping that the 8th tap section were just same button jacks as an accuracy test. This will make sense again later.
- Combo 513 to 634 Umiyuri is fine but also a bit messy especially when the taps do move around the playing field constantly. I will also prefer if the taps doesn't move around too much. Meaning for those sections where there are 2 taps outside of the slide starting point before sliding, I think it would be better to just make sure those taps stack onto each other rather than moving around, ie. `{16}8<5[8:1],7,7,,8,` instead of `{16}8<5[8:1],6,7,,8,`. Yes, you did used this but I prefer if it stayed consistent.

Now about your second half starting at Combo 635:

**I fucking love this part, so much.** This part is incredibly cool and extremely fun to play. Which is why I want to strengthen the jacking patterns instead since you could play this as your main motif. If you remain consistent to this style of pattern, the chart feels more complete, clean and meaningful. The breaks here are also used beautifully, so much so that I actually fell in love with the chart.

If you somehow were able to polish this, this would no doubt be one of my favourite charts in the contest. Thank you for your hard work.

欢迎收看MMFC13测评第八期《アイリス》（205号）测评。先说结论，本谱面对歌曲结构的把握尚可，谱师可以理清歌曲段落，但对配置的运用以及基础的星星时值存在一些问题，总的来说质量属于大杯偏下。


**本谱面的优势区间主要集中在：**

1.理清了歌曲段落、结构尚可。虽然是比较基础的方面，不过至少可以看出谱师对歌曲结构有一定掌握，知道什么段落安排过渡配置，什么段落安排核心配置，并且也可以做到段落内的思路统一，这一点就领先了不少自制谱。


**本谱面的劣势区间主要集中在：**

0.offset（延迟）设置错误。这种问题最好不要再出现，毕竟配置可能是主观的，但是音没对准就真的是态度不认真了。可以将offset设置为1.16再试试。

1.对EX Note的保护能力没有掌握。可以看出谱师很多地方写出了可能会影响游玩的配置，所以加上了EX，这可以说明谱师至少知道这些地方会影响游玩，但需要注意的是，EX能保证玩家打上却不能拯救实际的手感或是其他游玩体验，一般只有在不太好换配置的时候才会以这样的方式使用，这张谱大部分类似的地方都可以通过换配置解决。

2.对各类星星时值的把握不明确。例如303cb这里的折线星星，8:3的时值显然是过慢了，尤其是前面大多数都是直线8：1这种带过去的感觉，这里出现一根慢星星就很突兀；再例如344cb这里的曲线，这里使用8:1又过快了，假设你是4-1的话8:1是合适的，但是你4q1，想想看星星路径长了多少；更具代表性的是615cb这里的绝赞曲线星星，如此大的一个弧度时值竟然是8:1，简直是如同闪现一般。总而言之希望谱师在写星星时值的时候多去考虑一下实际的速度，不要想当然。

当然这张谱还存在一些配置选择和更多的细节问题，但我认为既然出现了这么几条问题那更多的问题可以暂时先不讲，谱师当务之急是先打好基础，把最基本的星星时值以及用EX Note骗自己的问题进行整改，相信整改之后谱师自然就会对配置选择的问题有所认识了。


总的来说本谱面是一张略显生涩的自制谱，可以看出谱师已经理解了最基础的歌曲结构内容、理清谱面段落，但基本配置的掌握还是略显不足，希望谱师再接再厉，期待一下本谱面在MMFC13的发挥吧。

Around the first half of the chart, I was about to comment about how I think it's a very run-off-the-mill chart. It felt something anyone could make. But after watching the entire thing, I got to hand it to you. Not anyone could make a high BPM chart like this and still make it somewhat comfortable to play.

I personally really enjoyed the swipes during the chorus. I think those fully encapsulates the vibe of the chart and adds a layer of high energy with it. The spins and the ending is also very satisfying to hit.

If you don't mind me nitpicking and making an assumption, I feel like you suppressed the difficulty of the chart and forced it into the label of a 13+. Honestly, if you made a 14 and just let your imagination flow, I think you are capable to create something that is still equally meaningful and enjoyable. I would much prefer a chart where I can fully observe the creativity of the charter rather than knowing how well they can hold back their personal taste. More 16th here and there and put some more swipes, I think this would be much more eye opening.

Thank you for your hard work.

Nice use of 16th-duration hold notes to create "extra tones" too.

Very nice pattern progression around combo 550.

Overall, I think this is a solid, playable chart.

个人想在这边提一个比较可惜的点和一个可能的设想：
二副的前14小节，核心部分相比一副并没有明显的递进，细品之下稍显无力了。
看谱师在majdata里的分段应该也知道这首二副有6+8+6小节共三次重复的特殊结构。
如果把后两次重复的配置统一往前移，在第三次重复时去采核心的动机旋律，尝试相对来说较为独立的加强，是否可以做出更亮眼的递进效果呢？

整体来说还是很喜欢的，祝好名次！

一副和二副中的星星组合设计还是比较有趣的，能够看出一定的想法和亮点。不过相对来说，主歌和间奏部分的表现就稍显一般。主歌的三扫有点唐突，可以考虑换成更合适的配置。间奏罚站时间有点长了，衔接上也略显平淡。如果在这些段落中再增加一些变化或呼应前后段的设计，整体体验会更加连贯一些。

整体来看，这张谱面的配置给人的感觉稍微有些僵硬。不同段落之间的衔接不够自然，变化节奏也比较固定，部分地方更像是在按照既定思路去堆叠，而不是顺着音乐本身去展开，导致游玩时的流动性略显不足。如果能在配置之间加入更多顺势的过渡和细节变化，整体手感会更舒展一些。总体来说观感是比较稳定的，但在流畅度、记忆点和结构层次上还有提升空间。如果能在这些方面再做一些打磨，整体体验会更加出色。

制谱功底和排键水平是在线的。
感觉开头稍微起低了点，其他都还好。
期待取得好成绩。

炸鱼的来了，今天看过的最好的一张，纯纯的神谱，各方面都十分优秀，直接拉到夯好吧

一看，原神，呦，再一听，是我喜欢的曲风，谱师真是太有歌品了，直接保送（划掉）总之先感谢谱师带来的精品术曲推荐！（等等这玩意居然是术曲不是人唱的吗）
因为我也喜欢听喜欢玩喜欢写swing所以就多说点。
关于谱面的配置方面，我觉得谱师是在一定程度上参考过了官谱的写法的（比如355-405，这段玩着非常舒服，也很有官谱的感觉），能看到不少官谱跳拍歌曲的典型写法。在谱师自己的配置设计上，300cb处的星星组合我觉得是不错的，但是很多星星其实在这样的高bpm下速度实在太快会很难处理，比如开头的几组星星一上来速度就很快，300cb那个位置的密度（单根短星星+一个pq星星）放开头反而可能更合理一点；275cb这个位置的星星有点密了，可以考虑略微精简；336-338cb两组星星同理，稍快稍密较难处理；453cb开始的火神+穿心稍微有点雷霆了，天地开辟的难度不是说碰瓷就碰瓷的，那段穿心我觉得听歌曲音高变化的话写一个类似于am的折返穿心会更好诶！总体看谱面的话难度曲线设计可能不算太合理，谱师可以试着再调整调整。
总结一下，谱面可以打磨和提升的空间还是很多的，是一张潜力很大的谱，谱师可以再动动脑筋好好优化优化。虽然我前面说了这么多问题但我给分还是以鼓励为主！祝谱师可以取得好成绩，为我们带来更多有品选曲！

标谱。
整张谱面的核心基调是四分采星星和12分跳拍接星星启动拍，通过稍有一些诡谲的排键和星星走向来表达出歌曲想要表达出的摇晃、怪异感。在配置的递进上设计的不错，但是我认为依然有以下两点可以斟酌的地方：
1. 采音不太妥当。整曲采音最为贴近鼓组，以此奠定该谱“跳拍启动星星”和"4分星星"的配置组，但是代价是过分地忽略了人声和钢琴。
1. 采音不太妥当。一个例子，98cb后，琴声完全消失，人声占最大的主导，前面两句连续12分人声忽略采成了跳拍，后面一句却不再忽略人声，忽略了背景叮叮的声音，选择人声采满，比较奇怪。
1. 采音不太妥当。768cb作为结束的三声人声对应的配置实在有些太弱了。
2. 采音有误。530cb附近整段16分三角交互采错了，此处没有16分，只有12分。
优点：
1. 核心配置玩法明显，配置递进不错。
2. 排键比较贴合歌曲的摇曳感。
3. 一些四分星星组的设计和走向很贴歌。我喜欢
一些自己的碎碎念(不影响打分)：
其实我个人不喜欢二连接星星启动拍这个配置，因为对我自己而言这个配置手感非常非常硬，并且很容易会导致左右手配置强度失衡(但是这张谱处理的还不错)。而且本曲还存在可能会导致单手硬抗跳拍启动星星的地方，打过直入光我对这个有点讨厌。。。如果是我去设计的话，比如副歌开头，即使人声有跳拍，我也不会去采，这个时候只需要增强四分拍上的那个音即可，比如用位移去控制，写双押启动大幅度拍划，这是官谱184亿回的multi-tonic给我的启发。（但其实副歌开头直接选择嗯采鼓组我觉得有些不妥，因为一路都是这么写过来的，可以考虑写一点贴合旋律的东西）

大量同侧扫发生，但是感觉其实必要性不是特别大，一定要采扫的话给普通扫就好了，同侧扫显得有些大，然后很多地方比如452combo这里的同侧扫不适合采，乐曲没有明显的情绪抬升但是配置抬升了，就会有些割裂

开头116combo那个折返竖线打完之后的过渡位置感觉跟vocal走写点星星反而会不错，按现在这样写的话跟202combo的高速吟唱段区分有些弱
312combo同侧扫开始发生，但其实味道感觉不太对，这里就按人声采成332就好了，也是给后面造势，按现在这样写感觉就是有些“我靠同侧扫太帅了我一定要找很多地方塞进去”的这种感觉，嗯...个人感觉并不是很贴，后续相同情况不再赘述
534combo开始的位置使用7w扫和神威扫感觉并不是很合适，一定要扫的话7w扫位置用普通的扫完按住hold然后来回，神威扫位置摆开一点会比较好，或者这里感觉就普通打绝赞+烟花就好了
744combo这里用纵连处理感觉有待商榷，没有体现出音乐情感递进的感觉，个人建议可以试试用tap绕圈采满代表爬升，然后一定要写纵连（~~什么儿也~~）的话可以后面用短hold增强音色
898combo这里出现了意料之外的无理，这个看谱确实看不出来，看手元才发现问题，可能是因为扫到A6touch的时候，已经处于下一颗6号的判定区间（绿good）了，所以这里会蹭绿tap+灰touch，这个感觉谱师可以下次注意这种圈放在B/D/E然后tap看情况给套应该就没问题了
973combo飞手绝赞没给套，建议还是给一个

整体来讲谱师并没有发挥出这首歌的全部潜力（~~倒是看得出很喜欢同侧扫了（笑）~~），感觉一些提到的点可以试着换一些配置或者摆位看看会不会好一些

www谢谢宝宝的喜欢，稳健其实是因为我只会白开水从来都没有点子（哭），清爽也是因为不会写王道配置（哭哭）。

看的出来是一张有一些经验的新人作品 能看出来谱师已经有基本的结构意识和挑选配置的能力了 下面讲一些值得一提的问题
30cb这里2q5的尾巴和4开头的黄星星构成三押了 这里建议还是首尾相连会更好
185cb这里左手在4右手在8的情况下打21212的16交互其实间隔有点短 会给左手一个不必要的强位移 如果星星结束间隔8分就要放键的话试试先放在旁边再引导到想要的地方
333cb的错位很容易蹭到A5把黄星星带走 看到这里为了摆星星甚至特地改启动 只能说没太大必要
392cb这里的错位完全没踩到音 鼓和人声依然是在正拍的 后面有一个类似的段落也有相同的问题
426cb这里突然转一笔画没有前置引导会比较僵硬 可以试试在一个段落的结尾和开头再改变段落内配置的整体走向
630cb这里很明显只能用右手去走8-6了 会形成一个很尴尬的手臂交叉的引导 然后到结尾这里歌曲的强度其实没有太大的变化 在最后突然降强度还是不太必要
考虑到歌曲只有一个副歌的情况下 可以试试稍微激进一点的副歌核心思路会更好

A lot of the issues with this chart boils down to hand positioning. The note density is fine but the way the notes are spread out and how the slides forces the player to constantly switch hands is actually not rewarding. It raises more question marks then being cool. The song feels very emotional and flow heavy so for it to play so weird kind of mismatch with the vibe of the song. I suggest keep the notes closer with each other and making the slides much more behaving with the intentional hand positioning would make this better.

The star and moon slide is really cool though. Thank you for your hard work.

I really really enjoyed the first half. I think it flows really well and it telegraphs the hand positioning pretty decently. However as it approaches the second half. The usage of extra taps during the chorus makes it very awkward to hit and causes some awkward note positioning (Namely the break at Combo 567). If you could retain the density but create some unique way to stand out, I think it might be more enjoyable.

Thanks for your hard work!

That... was one heck of a chart. It somewhat showed a possibility of a really really hard 'Noushou Sakuretsu Girl' chart. I think you did a really good job at presenting your ideas and concept in this one. The note placement can be very confusing at times but how do I say, you actually played really well with the old school Standard charting.

I can't comment too much about note placement and intricacy of what is a good trill tech chart because I myself am really bad at this kind of chart. Even after 11 years in Maimai, I still can't play Noushou properly, so I will leave it to the others to comment on it. In my eyes, I think they are fine so I won't let that affect my scoring.

What I can say is two things:
- The slow BPM section is not very well made. The whole flow gets cut off so abruptly that the chart suddenly lost it's charm. I understand that the song doesn't offer a lot. But when it does that, I rather you just do a 1<2 slide that goes around the entire rim and let it last for a long time, treat this as a rest instead of keeping your hands busy with some weird patterns. It's either this or the 'Outburst Dreamer Boys' slide tap section where it's more consistent rather than jank.
- Your chart still has lots of very modern tech that kind of makes the chart lose it's Standard charting charm. There are section that feels very modern and I can't help but feel that pulls down the vibe of the chart a lot. The modern charting I mentioned are sections such as Combo 658 slides where one ends earlier than the other and Combo 706 where you pair each slides with single slides for two different colour slides. This is a very personal point of view that plays a big part of my enjoyment so I hope you understand why this will affect the scoring.

This chart is slightly out of my expertise but I will promise you I will score this as serious as I can. I hope you won't take this too personally. Thank you for your hard work.

昨天人在外地没摸着电脑，说明得可能不是很仔细，这里补充一些内容吧。

首先，双倍时值的问题在于前面大部分短星星都采用的是12：1的时值。双押黄星星这里同样也是短星星，但是却突然改成12：2，这一变化玩家是很难通过读谱读出来的，容易出现划快fast掉的情况。
我并不是说你不能在这里一拍写一组黄星星，而是可以采取一些更长的星星形状作为直觉上的引导，比如说3>6等五格以上弧线、s/z星星或是大V折线。这些长星星根据玩家平时的经验来说，直观的感受就是“时值约等于短星星双倍时值”，即使有意划快也会因为位移长度比较大不至于瞬间划完。至于防蹭，那是星星形状设计的事情，和这里的时值并没有什么直接的关系。

其次，我能get到谱师用扫键体现圆舞曲的氛围，但是这和我说的采音不够细化、没有采出来特征节奏的问题并不冲突。
我们来看副歌的第一小节（1：26）：“ {32}4xh[6:1]/5<3[16:3],6,7,8,{8}1h[8:1],{12}5pp2[4:1],,5, ” 这里第三个音按照三拍子的乐曲节奏来看的话是重拍，但是直接用力度轻微的hold松手押了这一本该强调的音；并且第二、三个音的听感是短促、连续的，这两个二十四分音你采上前一个，后一个就不适合舍弃掉。
而且，3：10处存在和这里旋律、节奏完全一致的乐句，这里你的处理就是“ {12}5,4/6>3[12:1],{24},7,8,,{12}6, ”。这不是可以把具体的二十四分节奏采上吗？总不能说这里面有一个是谱师理解中错误的吧。总而言之，这个节奏型是贯穿整个乐曲的副歌段落的，作为非常特征的节奏而言当然有必要写出来。

最后，整张谱面的副歌部分只有3：06的变奏是写了两组连续的、带双押的扫键的，这一变奏也是在乐曲的最高潮部分才出现的，而这种带双押的扫键配置在间奏段却写了整整三组并重复两次。从扫键这一点来说，副歌的配置确实是比不上间奏的强度的。
如果仍然不能理解的话，官谱的美月夜镜也出现了类似的情况，但是他处理编排丰富的钢琴就是用touch扫带过去，既没有拔高间奏的强度致使喧宾夺主，又很好地还原了乐曲本身的要素。如果美月夜镜这里不写touch改为tap扫的话，结构的设计还能够成立吗？参赛这张谱也是一样的道理，比起纯粹的tap扫，使用touch取代更适合过渡段落的强度。

一副滑完ppqq再接扫的设计贴歌而且感觉很好玩。765cb这个5号键tap有点搞，读谱的时候能被提前看到，可能会误认为是启动键（这个可能是我自己读谱有个人差，只是提一下）。我还挺喜欢1040cb后这段的处理方式的，在复杂人声和配器叠加之下用简洁的采音和朴素的配置来表现，有种神威的感觉。1145cb的三扫就有些违和了，这么慢的话可能写成交互更适合，也能更方便地表现人声渐弱的特征。
二副的配置我认为依然是有趣的，但是相比整张谱的其他段落，强度略弱了一些，这间接导致刚衔接到尾段时有些跳脸。当然尾段本身我是很喜欢的，就该这么写。
另外，管子锁手的一格小出张可能实测会略卡手，尤其是后半采音密度较高的时候这种一格小出张或许会影响游玩。因为我自己没有实测的条件，这点就先保留，不会影响分数的。总体是会场里最喜欢的一张14+，虽然的确有提升空间，但是几乎处处都能窥见谱师的思考和小设计，我认为跟前面几条评论所说的”平A“”单调”并不沾边。

整体评价：副歌复沓用得不错，谱师对歌曲的情感流动有比较好的了解，结构意识也不赖，但是踩音过于执着于人声，可以更丰富一点，配置也有一些小细节需要注意。

配置本身的合理性：
1、356cb处内无了，可以修改成 `5>1[8:4],{8},,2<6[8:5],2,,,7<3[8:5],7,` 叠星星的方式防一下。
2、谱面使用了大量同时结束的快蹭慢，虽然能黄，但是还是建议把慢星星的结束时间往后面延长一个八分，对于所有这样的地方都适用，例如 272cb，其余地方同理。
3、226cb `4w8[8:1],,4<7[8:1]*>1[8:1],,` 这个配置上机过的人就知道有多蹭，不建议在bpm不算低的时候写这种走钢丝的严格考验防蹭的排列

配置处理的方式和摆键：（仅个人改进意见）
1、51cb起的开头人声的卡拉ok处理比较僵硬，既然都卡拉ok了，一直用hold来压长音略显臃肿，加上快慢星星显得和歌曲氛围有点违和
2、255cb起的间奏写得太满了，这里的情绪不必绷得这么紧张，多精简一下，别惦记快撞慢了
3、579cb的小爆发在这里不太贴，这里造出来的touch爆发点反而有点把最后611cb的爆发给压下去了

这首歌和官谱的热异常速度和乐曲结构都很像，谱师不妨去学习一下官谱的处理思路，如何均衡高潮和其他部分的密度以配合乐曲走向，相信能有一些收获。

能看到谱师的想法和设计点，但是细节考虑的有些欠缺。
开头的非Cth本身带有粘滞感，打的时候往往不会在意非Cth结束可以松手的时机，一般就直接按到底了，那这个时候类似13cb处就会影响游玩体验的流畅度，需要比较强硬地出张接tap。
161cb的扫键结尾快速抬手，即使给了套，突然紧绷一下的感觉也不舒服。
361cb同头不换手的引导并不充分。后面上下反之后会清晰一些，这是因为星星在下面时，右手打8会一定程度上遮挡2号位置的出键，上下反后可以提前看到后面一组出键就不太会出现手顺歧义。
副歌的核心（交互+一笔画星星）虽然没有那么难打，但是星星形状和摆位略凌乱，比如756cb的闭合fes。
尾段的星星头+三颗交互启动星星是比较容易出现的问题：打完星星头后的交互起手引导并不充分。像950cb这种是很明确的左手起引导，因为7号键并不是1845号键这种左右手都能接的中性位置。而后面放在1845号键的交互起手本身会造成一定读谱障碍，掺了touch之后更加重了影响。

A rather simple concept chart from start to finish. Sadly there wasn't a particular moment where I think the chart was unique (except for one very short section). Allow me to share my thoughts:
- The first half up until Combo 407 is a bit too repetitive. The pattern was fun the first time it was repeated but because it is dragged for a little too long, the subsequent variation becomes not as fun since they play almost the same. (Oh, the hand switching slide is cool though) If you plan to chart the full length of the song, especially for a contest, you got to try to bring something new to the table. Since what you did is mainly taps, maybe slides for a repeat variation?
- Combo 563 despite being absolutely brutal for a middle section of the song, it actually feels incredibly fun to hit. The adrenaline moment in this section of the chart actually keeps me engaged to the chart. The trills though... feels like that could use some tuning because the difficulty jump is too sudden.
- Quiet section and second chorus has the same issue with repetitiveness with little interesting variation.
- Combo 1131 'Neon Kingdom' slide is not very nicely designed. It looks a bit too clutter.

I truly wish you the best moving forward, hopefully you would bring wonderful ideas to the charting scene one day. Thank you for your hard work.

您好，首先是感谢评论，一些细节性的改动对我很有启发，一些整体思路的不同也可以理解和借鉴。然后，是向所有评鉴和游玩这张谱的内屏玩家说声抱歉，我仅仅用肉眼审查了几遍，但因为确实缺乏内屏游玩经验，对内无配置不敏感，没有筛查出呼应歌曲“yeah”的Y字星星内无，之后再创作会用辅助auto工具排查无理。但是有几点想向楼主说一下。对于主观的意见，即使暂时不认可或保有疑问，我也会收下这些质疑。但是否是无理配置，包括无理的类型，通常是没有争议的，严格按照游戏判定规则可以明确判断。但楼主似乎对游戏的判定不很了解，把内无配置当作全无配置，把并不无理而且实测验证过的配置称为“疑似无理配置”，这样有客观答案的评价也混杂着主观意见，我觉得是有失偏颇的。如果您对其他谱面也给出这种主观臆断的无理检测，我认为同样是不负责任的。您完全可以在b站上轻松找到slide判定规则的内容来判断无理类型。最后，再次感谢楼主的评论，祝您能取得满意的成绩

个人认为这首曲目叙事感极强，但整体编曲简约，配乐层次与曲体内容体量都偏克制。综合来看，这首曲子其实并不适配竞技比赛的场景。
本次谱面的创作思路十分出彩，完整且流畅地诠释了歌曲的故事内核，不过在整体适配度上，我认为和曲风本身略有出入。正如前文所说，整首歌的基调安静舒缓，但谱面运用了大量高强度配置，例如主歌段的拍划启动、副歌的二纵、三纵键位设计等，虽情感表达饱满细腻，却存在一定的overmap的问题。
总的来说，这首歌叙事性很强，但内容量很少。如果用更简洁的配置去表达，或许能更加贴合曲子的风格。
不过每个人的理解不同，这肯定是你心中对这首歌最好的表达！

A very very skillful and beautiful chart. I was really blown away by the design and song representation. There isn't a lot for me to say about this chart but there are a few parts I just want to nitpick regarding the first half.

- Combo 53 and Combo 95 slides honestly doesn't feel like it really has to end at two different timing. I noticed this is a very common thing in the Chinese community but to me it feels rather redundant. Combo 53 can end on the same time and Combo 95 can be adjusted to 3-1-5/4-8-6 and end on the same time in my opinion.
- Combo 144 E7 touch hold kind of blocks the note at 7. I can understand the idea but I honestly think this section would be better if the note appears for the right hand to tap first instead. Non C touch hold is still a very new concept and it is still ingrained in us that touch holds are longer that it feels.

Other than that, I got nothing else to add. Absolute cinema chart and I can't wait to find out which crazy person charted this song and make it work. Thank you for your hard work.

This feels like a chart made by someone who has quite some experience, maybe about 2 to 3 years? There are very comfortable position to hit and the understanding hand placement and flow is very on the nose. There is still a very big issue with it and that is 'it doesn't fit the right demographic of players'. Essentially, the chart has the density of a 13 but the skill requirement of a 13+.

The constant hand switching and slide motif throughout the chart is very demanding especially for players who are looking to play a relaxing 13. The song itself actually does demand such a playstyle because it's meant to be more upbeat. So either you simplify the chart down to only 8ths without 16ths OR you increase the difficulty by introducing more each taps and check sliders.

The other issue I have is that the taps are very weirdly timed. Are they following the vocals, the instrumentals, the leads or the vibes? The constant switching between these sections feels really out of place. I can't help but give a low score for this crucial mistake. (Then again Ayase charts are really hard to chart because they really are just all over the place).

I really like the touch placements at Combo 102 to 125. That feels really fun to hit. At first I thought that it didn't fit the moment of the song but then I saw you reused the motif at the second half of the song, then I realise it was actually a build up. The section at the back is very fitting and very fun!

Thank you for your hard work.

对于主歌副歌都是键盘这一条，事实上两者的摆键是有明显区分的。主歌的16分由于抓的是vocal，且其位置比较靠前，则选用相对幅度较小的散点，只在一段大连续16分中进行摆键设计；而后半由于是纯音乐+尾杀，因此幅度更大，并且会根据音乐音高的走向进行排键（比如往一个方向走的音就写成往一个方向走的交互），这两点在思路上是有很大区别的，而实际游玩也是如此（虽然看上去都是交互，但是打起来不是一个感觉）

> 首先我们来逐一看这谱存在的问题：

---

## 一、配置性问题（逐条分析）

### 1. 33–36cb —— 手感不适

> 哪怕是加了 EX，这一段走线途中的**左手内转外配置**，手感依旧不舒服。

---

### 2. 42–46cb —— 配置不合理

> 两个大锚星星，马上接了**两个 2/4 两个键的 hold**，完全构成无理。
> 后面的镜像重复同理。

---

### 3. 123–127cb —— 指法争议

> 这个 `2, 2, 6, 6` 中的 **`6, 6`**：

- 如果是**右手飞手**，位移太大，右手又要马上接下一个 `3`
- 如果是**左手**，手感又太奇怪

> 整体而言，**一副还行，但改进空间还是有的**。

---

### 4. 394–405cb —— 手感与贴合度问题

> 这几组 **break-touch**：

- 手感不行
- 也不是特别贴歌
- 右手马上要去接从 **A6 跳到 1 号**，衔接紧张

> 但 695cb 之后的五组，**还挺不错的**。

---

### 其他问题

> 其他问题就基本差不多了，都是：
- 一些重复的问题
- 衔接上的极不协调

---

## 二、游玩性问题

> 可游玩性方面：

- 游玩过程中会有很多**初见反应不过来**的情况
- 根本原因在于：**配置并不连贯**

---
| 维度 | 评价 |
|------|------|
| 配置性 | 存在多处手感、衔接、配置合理性问题，局部有亮点 |
| 游玩性 | 初见杀严重，连贯性不足 |

> 总之，希望你能在以后的谱子里发挥更好一些吧 💪

---


- 优化 33–36cb 的内转外手感
- 调整 42–46cb 的无理配置及镜像段落
- 重新审视 123–127cb 的指法设计
- 改善 394–405cb 的 break-touch 手感与贴合度，优化位移衔接
- 整体加强段落之间的连贯性，减少“初见杀”

> 局部已有不错的设计（如 695cb 后五组），期待后续作品更上一层楼。

很直观且结构很清晰段落感也很强的一张谱面，初见绝大多数地方能舒服打上，密度比较高但是可以接受。
一个小问题，二副有一个4qq4（还是pp，我不太清楚）接4<7不太直观，需要记忆，但是可以看出这里的设计是转两下逆时针，整体来说是顺的，小问题。
祝谱师取得好成绩！

## 总体评价

很出色的跳拍中歌，整体对跳拍的律动感抓的比较稳，谱面的构成非常稳定清晰，比较有官谱韵味。副歌配置比较大开大合，但手感尚佳，没有很严重的硬伤。算是中规中矩的优秀谱面。

看到你用无头星星了哟~

另外，不要用动态码率的mp3！！majdata播会歪掉……

## 详细评价

475cb这段touch hold动作押挺让人会心一笑的，后面结尾也有类似运用。很喜欢。除此之外呢，我感觉这个谱子其实没啥好说的。这个谱子真的就是把每个地方都做到很OK了。手感很顺，情绪到位贴歌，真的就是这么简单。

几个小瑕疵说一下吧。

首先是谱师想要作为谱面印象来打造的一个配置，162cb这个换手星星（或者认为是48双押软引导左手接1也可以）。但是说实话这个星星我和朋友初见全都被杀了……虽然前面有引导。也许可以先做一个强引导，然后后面用弱引导，给玩家一个预期。这样弱引导的时候玩家仍然顺着思维惯性去这样处理，发现谱子真的是这样引导的，会有种小窃喜的。不过其实这个换手在前面（126cb）也做了几次类似的，但是毕竟语境不同，这个引导还是稍微弱了一点。

然后是606cb这个圈，虽然做了标记但是还是隐含换手信息了。初见基本上都是左手直接765432然后18双押一起滑过去的。个人还是不太喜欢隐含换手。

最后是807cb这一段，用了很多快速的3个note的扫来做强化。那么如果这段用了扫的话，跳拍还写邻位就得很谨慎了，不然比较容易和扫键在观感以及读谱上产生冲突。

## 总结

其实写谱就是这样，把所有东西都做到完美就好。这个谱子虽然没能做到每个地方都完美，但是整体都很优秀，对歌曲的感觉也抓的很稳，所以值得一个高分。

42cb开始的touch摆的太乱了，左手直接写tap右手在AD/E扫就会好点
581cb的交互有点哇袄了，位移量和周围的配置完全不搭
1284cb开始的交互排的有点乱，四个一组写成了几个明显的三个一组，递进也有更好的选择，而且后面的扫在采音上没有和结尾几下区分出来，不过这里手感上倒确实没有什么明显的奇怪感受
其他地方都还挺可以的，总之是一张很平A的14+，还挺愿意能多打到这样的自制的

能看到谱师还是有下功夫的，neta基本能看得出来，但是整体配置比较割裂，我觉得还是优先保证难度曲线，贴歌程度和可玩性的情况下再考虑neta比较好，以下是一些建议：
14cb处的鼓可以做一下递进，
 20cb处的rise用touchhold来表示表现力还是不太够，37cb的出张换手在主歌这个地方也有点唐突，61cb开始的双押拍滑和前边强度差太大了，有点出戏，沿用前边的思路会更好，144cb这里的跳拍不是很能接受，太突然了，前边奠定的基调省了这么多音像星星歌，但是却写了跳拍，172cb又突然换回星星歌的写法了，副歌能看得出来谱师在尽力加花了，echo配置在这里反而不如海底谭贴歌，后边的单手跳拍手感更是一言难尽，后边的散点还不错。总之再接再厉吧，很抱歉我不会给出一个很高的分数

作为一首节奏感比较强的歌，摆键的功底可能稍微还需要加强一下。
例如1：17cb 、127cb等双押总是被集中在固定的按键，这就导致每次往上打完又要回来再打一次。这里作为鼓的敲击音，写双押强调没有问题，但是我觉得第一是开头配置起的太高了，完整性很强，不利于后面配置的加强，第二是这种配置光消耗体力但是没有把谱面的跳跃感成功的写出来，同时还会导致上机手感很差，像被黏住一样。
例如2：103cb的Touch摆键全都摆在一起，这里作为一个音乐的加强，可以先B区后D、E、A区做一个加强，我觉得可能会更好一点。
后面的加强我就觉得特别好。

关于3副的1065cb和后面的Neon kingdom段，我觉得歌曲鼓点敲的比之前更猛啊？怎么把配置强度和情绪全降下来了？最好想想更好的配置吧。

副歌的手顺引导我挺喜欢的，希望多多琢磨一下摆键和歌曲难度分配与递进吧！
单拿出来部分配置还可以，但是组合在一起就完全不是同一张谱的了。整首歌编曲属于乐器音轨没有太明显的变化的类型，谱子却几乎一小节变一种完全不同的配置，而且副歌的信息量复杂到几乎远超于歌曲能够承载的了。
前面还可以，虽然歌的发挥空间很大但写成这样已经很不错了。但二副的手顺设计太灾难了，~~星星不换手就会变成大麻花。~~加油

手滑点快了，楼中楼回一下
前奏部分配置做到了统一，很规整，没有多余的省音让我比较欣赏，把合适的省音留到了人声密度较为高的主歌部分，以及重复星星的运用作为一个衔接很到位，很大程度上减少了割裂感
202cb拍划开爽，副歌爆发段的采音思路我很喜欢，相比于一部分参赛作品没有盯着vocal死采而是提取了关键音，节奏型相对简单，不过拍划位移给到位的话完全不妨碍爽，绝赞和双押排键给的也很恰到好处，一目了然
433cb处的问题评论已经列出来了，不做赘述，也是个人觉得有点可惜的地方
二副过渡段的绝赞采用了同样的节奏型的同时加大了位移，以及后面的tap圈是进入高潮的点睛之笔（感觉570cb处的181b小交互加点位移或者换成118b会更好？）
633cb很喜欢这个绝赞
最后高潮段根据声调变化加入了绝赞星星，个人觉得其实跟一副二副做出的区分恰到好处（绝赞星星就该这么用x），hold接扫那一段对情感递进做了更上一层楼的区分
795cb个人很喜欢vocal的这个转调，在谱面里也有表现让我很满意。尾奏部分的强度安排很适当没有硬塞一个恶心人的尾杀，而且我还蛮喜欢那最后一个星星的）
整张谱可以说是行云流水，教科书式的标准结构安排让我实在打不了低分。虽然可以研究的东西比较少，但我认为也是它的亮点之一（毕竟推ap的时候初见鸟加总比初见97要好得多x）

Oh my god, I love this sheet music so much! The keyboard layout is very comfortable and reasonable. The held notes at the beginning guide the short strums, and there are all kinds of 1+2 style short strums, perfectly showcasing the tone of the song. The use of ex tap reduces the difficulty while ensuring a good feel. Throughout, it basically uses the same configuration but keeps transforming, making it not boring at all to play. The second section's solo part is even more free, and it's very comfortable to play with either hand changes or single-hand returns. The overall structure is also fine, and the difficulty distribution is very reasonable. I really like this form of presentation!

Minor flaws (maybe they can't even be called flaws, on the contrary, I quite like them).
There's a bit of a first impression kill. It's very easy to get overwhelmed on the first playthrough (maybe this isn't even a flaw). There's a double-tap in the first chorus that's a bit tricky. I feel the guidance here is fine, but the feel is just a little off.
In the second chorus, the amazing turnaround is so easy to get a good on (this is just because I'm too bad at it!)
Overall, I really, really like this score! I wish you good results! Have fun!

开头还是很有感觉的，但紧接的50cb就明显暴露了谱师排键水准了，没有排开来显得很紧凑，整体运动幅度不大，没有体现出应该有的爽感。后面80-168的双压+单点实在太丑陋了。。。
中段的单手排划我很喜欢，身体被充分调动起来了，但是紧接的四分双押不管是采音还是衔接都是极大的问题，光这里一个问题够整个谱遭殃的。
副歌的想法不错页很搭歌，但是感觉缺乏变式。会显得副歌非常非常的单调。
后面还是老问题。。。嗯。。反正看起来这个排键新新的。

总而言之在我眼里这张谱是一张中规中矩但是小问题很多的一张谱，走的是稳健风，但是还可以有更进一步的空间，对比一张好谱来说完成度实在有点太低了，就是一张很平淡的有很多小问题的白开水，甚至都称不上山泉水。在采音和排键以及配置上都有很大进步空间。或许在上一届可以咬咬牙进t4这种水平。

踩音之类的别的评论都说很多了，我也不赘述了。主要提一嘴副歌。
一是缺少记忆点，只有了普通的错位，使得人打完根本记得不得打了什么，间奏无法起到记忆点的作用就要靠副歌。
二是这两段之间差异太小了，甚至有形状位置都一模一样的配置。没有做好区分和递进，给人的感觉就是打了好多相同的东西，这会把没有记忆点的缺点放大。

Before I comment anything about the chart, just want to point out that the slide at Combo 788, because of the equal sign shaped slide, it removes all of the blue slide except the tip at 8, and because you have a tap at 8 right after that, it 100% splashes when played on screen.

Now to move on, I really enjoyed the first half despite being really intense. The ideas are cool and despite the festival slide being super fast, it is still within reasonable range.

However, the second half is where everything becomes an absolute mess, it's almost at a level of an unreasonable new player 14+ type of pattern. I think you could just tone down the chart and maybe just make it so its a small variation of the first half. I was also pretty iffy about the long empty pause section but seeing how the second half is designed, it made sense. Not that it's a good thing.

With the identified splash and the unreasonable second half, I have to give this a very low score. Good effort and hope to see you again in future contests.

Thank you for your hard work.

整体是比较保守的三拍子低BPM处理，星星的处理时机都比较明确，整体对星星信息量的把控还是到位的。
低BPM的键盘需要配合星星摆放，这一块细节还是有打磨的空间的。比如出现过比较多次的”刚打完星星头的手需要抬手起中性位置的交互“的处理，这并不是说抗一下会导致手感差，而是这样摆的目的应该还是希望玩家当交互打，在具体实现上可以和这个目的更吻合一些。
单黄慢星星确实是一个比较鲜明的记忆点，但是其他部分表现略淡了一些，要更进一步的话需要想想怎么搓一个玩法核心。

总体是一张气氛蛮不错的谱面，但略有瑕疵；
200cb过后，跨度开始拉大，手顺引导的问题也就开始显现了，1:4的星星头，和旁边的7号键是一只手接，右手的话，在这之后会变成奇怪的出张，最好是左手，但是绝赞星星又是左起呦结束，分页引导不够足导致这里虽然不难，但是手感特别的割裂与奇怪；
288cb后面touch挡绝赞不建议这样做；
430cb后面键盘可以写的更激烈一些；
长夜与星光押严肃好评，气氛很对，属于看一眼很惊喜的星星；
总体来说算一张很不错的谱面了，再接再厉，祝写的开心。

还是细细说一下吧。感觉得分个段
开头的7>2写的相当别扭，这根星星的音色设计又与8p4的思路重复了，只是用很扭的保护套break来押这一声重音来强行开启14+的谱面开头实在不合适，明明有更有张力更加舒适的写法
80combo及后续的一段采音混乱，好像采了钢琴又直接转为vocal。乱了。感觉更像是像采vocal但是前面的双直线滑完来不及处理，不如不写双黄线
135combo处同理，采完vocal的变色一笔画后又一转钢琴，乱
188combo处8起跳拍手序引导不明，左手在划星星右手刚往下走完
218combo处前后的层次完全乱了，明明歌曲进入新阶段却还是一通硬跳拍摆键采音的思路，行进有问题
240-360combo这段其实处理还行，用两个8分拍划采较突出的人声，算是一个能接受的处理。但是360combo前后也是老问题，看不出歌曲层次。反正就是一直在铺，没有一点结构区分
400combo开始副歌简直重灾区，抛开没啥设计感不谈，这个强插入一笔画作为核心太尴尬了，采音也是为了服务于这个一笔画而强行对着vocal采的。问题是这个采音思路明明和正歌一摸一样啊喂，结构呢
其他评论提到的管子启动星星我完全能接受，这里算是全谱为数不多算得上比较贴歌的小巧思处了
432combo这里我对比了好几个手元得出结论：就是设计差了。{12}6,{24}4,5,,3,{12}4-6[8:1],{24}2,1-3[8:1],,3,{8}4-8[8:1],1-5[8:1],4,1,明明玩家的注意力放在屏幕的下半侧，突然翻飞的2，1，跳拍如大运一般闯入破坏整体和谐性。谱师如果打过金熊就应该完全能够理解这种 大运 感，和轻快的歌曲根本不搭。更别说这几根易蹭的短星星了。
448combo的两个保护套意义不明，似乎是想强调人声，但不搭
478combo管子强采人声太尴尬。不如延续跳拍思路
600combo开始的上下翻飞跳拍比较对味，如果用这个小核心乖乖写能力范围内的13+都不至于这样
680combo左右的钢琴采音全乱，用扫键混过去了，相当刺眼
730combo左右管子采重音全乱，慢放下来听简直灾难，管子和双押采的音色全部乱来

You had me, then you lost me, then you brought me back, and then tosed me in the trash.

The chart feels like a roller coaster to experience. I was actually really in love with the first half of the chart. There are some unreasonable slides that feel might be too demanding for casual players such as Combo 252 and it's variation; Combo 379 - 385 (this one is not that bad, it just doesn't feel that nice to hit). Overall the first half with chill and was within expectations for a 13+.

The second half was where things really took it's turn. The difficult sections of the chorus was pulled up to the maximum. You introduced the slide tap combo at Combo 728 that I was DEFINITELY NOT PREPARED FOR. Then there is the very awkward slide at Combo 708 that felt like didn't offer a lot to the overall feeling of the song. I think the chart really didn't had to fight back this hard. I really wished this had stayed reasonable from beginning to end.

There are no obvious mistakes in the chart, just decisions that I feel are not done properly. You did your best to make an engaging chart and I was able to feel that from your chart, I can tell you really love this song and wanted the players to also enjoy the song while staying connected to the chart you designed. Thank you for your hard work.

先讲点个人的看法：
对TouchHold的用法挺有新意的，但是我认为还是需要谨慎使用，原因是TouchHold不同于Hold和Slide，其时值长度是难以预测的。具体到这张谱，就是20cb到50cb这段A区的TH都是点按，E6和C区的TH又变成了长按， 虽然谱师做了区分但是不明显，这里不太舒服；
265cb开始感觉写的太保守了，在这之前的键盘的密度让我对后续期待很高，但这个长星星拖慢了节奏，后续几个特殊音色也完全可以用夸张一点的键型或者绝赞来表现。同理，300cb开始的这一段加点星星会更好，396cb这里完全可以写键盘，因为我认为到这里整体依然没有14级该有的压力，以及480cb开始的管子段，压难度到了没必要的程度。
539cb到625cb这一段我还是很喜欢的，但接着后面一段的采音又有点既要又要，不太自然；678cb这个一笔画我没太看懂，这是个前面也没出现后面也没出现的孤立配置，挺违和的，如果作为引入，尾杀写点稍微复杂一些的一笔画星星感觉会不错。尾杀的表现力其实不太好，两个三纵手感略难以评价，写点一笔画或者fes长星星也许会好点。
整体看下来略显割裂，排列大胆的地方挺大胆的，另外一部分又过于保守了，不过完成度还是不错。一家之言，仅供参考。
感谢谱师辛苦创作

Somehow the chart feels like it fits the song pretty well despite the crazy BPM manipulation with the slides. I think it would work well as a practice chart but for the contest chart I don't think you did the best with what you can for this to go far in the contest. If you really want to use this method of charting, I suggest lesser slides and more holds to fully utilise the emotion of the song. The holds will help telegraph the hand positioning much better while the slide density will be much easier to read once you tone that down.

给后面可能会评到我的谱的人总结一个Q&A，省的一条条翻评论了
Q1：为什么整张谱选择卡拉ok的形式？
A：这首歌我认为是比较适合卡拉ok的写法的，曲子里只有人声较为突出，其他音轨都不是很明显，并且人声的节奏很简单，用人声就能够较好的体现出歌曲的律动感，整体看起来听起来也不会很违和 当然我也没有完全放弃其他音轨，比如绝大部分叮的一声我用了绝赞采音（除了开头情绪比较弱不适合塞大量绝赞），前半主歌的部分有较为明显的重音我用了hold去采。
Q2：结尾的星星（4v7*>1,4w8）太蹭了
A：确实比较蹭但是不是无理，实际打起来只要注意一下也不会非常非常蹭（看了两个实测初见都没有蹭），这么写的意图是如某条评论所说的稍微在结尾想表达一点崩坏的感觉，所以形状就大胆了一点。
Q3：非cth用的有点多余
A：这张谱的非cth确实有更好的写法，这么写的想法就是在这个时间节点紧跟一下时事，假设一下这是cir+官谱的世界线，因为cir+大部分谱都用了非cth且有不少用的也挺酱油的就模仿了一下这种思路。
Q4：剪歌为什么用这种戛然而止的手法？
A：我考虑过把中间的地方剪掉，但是感觉比较违和并且处理不干净音频，找不到一个好的衔接方式，就选择了把尾部重复较多的地方砍掉了，模仿官谱在剪歌时采用的淡出的效果，我个人还是觉得比较有感觉的，应该也有一部分人会喜欢，当然不喜欢也很正常。
Q5：开头塞太满了/第二段副歌为什么不用新配置
A：关于结构的问题放在一起解释
开头主歌我采用的是不削减采音的情况下尽量减少信息量，因为整张谱我打算把采人声的思路贯彻到底，如果省略大段人声的话会看起来很空，也不太贴歌，所以第一段主歌基本没有什么星星和双押，有一些星星都是在neta歌词；
两段副歌的处理我的想法是保持大体配置一致，这样能够更好的强调谱面结构，如果用新配置我个人是会有一种乱乱的感觉，所以就采用了大体配置不变的情况下进行加强；
综合来看谱面这个强度我个人认为是合适的，有逐渐加强的感觉，也都符合歌曲的情绪
Q6：有一些很独特的星星形状，是neta吗？
A：整张谱有不少neta，包括用嘴neta开口，用水滴neta流泪，用挥手neta再见，二副的星星段前半部分neta了爱心；第二段主歌先用不一样的星星+X形星星，再用一样的星星+✓形星星，押了歌词里的“如果全世界都一样 那么只有我能幸福”，除此之外还有一些X形状也都押了歌词碍于篇幅不一一解释了。

80-160cb这里可以考虑把星星启动拍去掉，因为后面164cb开始的星星是无启动速划，前面给启动拍的话就会让164cb显得比较突脸，而且前面的启动拍也使得压力增大，超高bpm下启动拍的使用还是要慎重呀；258cb这里感觉可以不用子弹采满，空一个八分或四分然后让touch扫配置镜像一下，不过现在也可以；348cb开始的这一整大段碎鼓点段，个人更推荐采鼓点，散的人声可以考虑给ex break来采，然后纵连应该是做谱失误这个真的挺遗憾的，思路挺好，这个就属于那种不应该出现的失误，但依然可能导致明显减分；544cb应该是想致敬阿波罗星星？但是阿波罗星星不是这么写的呀，就正常叠一个就好了，不用改启动，改了启动反而打的时候可能会崩（实测看到旁边的老哥NG了好几次这里，笑）；**642cb-rpt星星这里比较喜欢**；rpt星星后的休息段写法，703-708cb这里感觉可以考虑用3456键位的hold或双押hold，然后709-718cb这里可以考虑用1>5[2:1]之类的贴边慢弧线做下一段的引入，进速划星的时候给几个8分tap引导就好，谱师可以自己改改试一下；824cb开始的副歌位移超大，打起来有点阿波罗的感觉，但是会很累，不过也确实暂时没想到什么更好的排键方式，目前这个个人算是还可以接受，美中不足是启动拍稍多，这个点前面也提过了；结尾感觉从1178cb这里开始就可以引入8分tap了，可以制造一种紧张感，我自己觉得这么做的话还是蛮贴歌的，谱师可以试一下

整体思路其实还OK，失误非常可惜，虽然个人觉得这首歌写成这样已经蛮不容易了，但可能没办法给一个很高的分数，不过很期待看到谱师接下来的作品

Saw the first slide and I audibly gave out a 'Huh?'.

Okay the rest of it is pretty normal and surprisingly fun. I like the bounciness and the patterns. They pair very well with the song. I only have one major issue where for a song with such a high BPM, I prefer if there was less crosshands / hand swappings. It becomes really tedious to pay attention so much and breaks the flow of the song given I will most likely dance to the song while playing. This is a major issue hence it affects the scoring quite a lot.

Regarding the first slide, it's cool so I allow it, extra points for coolness effect. Thank you for your hard work.

When you put this as a 14+, I was coming with the expectation of something much much more, something that would rival Makka of No.43. But after going through the whole chart, I think this is probably a hard 14.4 to a easy 14.5. I don't think there was any forced oppression to make it easier though since I can fully tell you put your all in the chart's flow, structure and placement. So for that, I will comment on this as if it's a 14+.

I think you tick all the checkbox of making a good chart. But you lack the originality that makes this 'your' chart. I could sense a bit of small existing official references in this chart that overshadowed your charting capabilities. 14s and above usually have some unique patterns to it that makes them memorable (~~Okay but a lot of 14s in Official chart are uninspiring~~ Yeah, then they are bad charts LOL) so I think if you can replace those common patterns with something more original, I would be more inclined to give a much much higher score.

I think with what you have, I still think it is a very very clean and solid piece of work. Push yourself a bit more and we might have a banger in our hands. Thank you for your hard work.

I think this is a very skillful, technical chart, catered towards the seasoned players. I really enjoy the low BPM slides in this one. The slide positioning is quite clear and the chorus section is extremely unique and enjoyable. I think you did a really good job with the chart.

- Combo 123 feels a bit sudden with the 16th notes as 8,1,7. Perhaps adjusting a bit here would be better.
- Combo 369 `4x` note is not a good habit. If your intention to make this an ex note to prevent splashes, then I think you would rather place the note somewhere else instead.
- Combo 377 (along with the other variation during the first chorus) slide that starts at 5 is followed by a double tap before sliding. I think this is not a good telegraphing habit since usually charts with low BPM like this usually entails the player that the slide starts when there is a note that appears on the slide. Unless your chart as a whole utilizes this kind of reverse mentality as it's main motif, then it is better to just either move the taps somewhere else or remove the taps.

Regardless, the spins at Combo 545 is incredibly cool and I really like the break placement at Combo 723. That section is pretty satisfying to reach. The chart still does some really cool stuff and there is no denying how interesting this chart is. Thank you for your hard work.
感觉整体比较干净舒服，开头的采音有意思，大b圈有点突脸不过能接受，结尾hold后部分稍微有点拖沓了

This is a very well made chart. I love the motif during the chorus with the swipes, it feels really satisfying and fun to hit. Overall I don't have a lot to point out other than some personal nitpicks. If we just focus on a design level, everything in this chart is way over it's passing grade.

- Combo 464 note placement is questionable. The whole section has stayed mellow and outside of these 4 subsequent notes, the rest remained at the position at 3,4,5,6. This might be a small mistake in music representation.
- Combo 795, the break slide from 8<4 is not a direct chain slide to the coming slide so it would be better that if you want to retain the 8:1, it would be better for the slide to be 8<5 instead. Once again, minor nitpick.
- **An opinion not affecting the scoring**: A lot of your patterns aren't entirely new in the charting sphere but at the same time, not something most casual players would like to see at a 13+. Especially your swipes at Combo 703 is not particularly an easy pattern. My suggestion is to not have so much ex notes, remove the ex from the breaks and just make a 14 out of this. I think that way the balancing curve would be much maintained and you get the chance to present more of your ideas in this chart. There is a sense of 'holding back' that was not done properly here.

Funny enough, the more I look at this chart, it really gives off the feeling of 7 Wonders but easier. LOL

Thank you for your hard work.

There is a fundamental issue with this chart and that is the beat selection is very weird. I could tell for the most part your decision was to chart using the guitar as your main instrumental choice and the chorus is following the vocals. That on it's on is absolutely fine but if you decided to go with that, it would be better to just lean to it as much as you can.
- Combo 178 follows the guitar but there is a 16th pattern that was left out, feels like a very odd choice. You could use 16th swipes instead of slides here.
- Combo 257 is very odd. I get what you are trying to achieve here but it doesn't fit with the song here. Feels like a deliberate decision to put in something 'cool'. I thought the previous pattern was cool enough so I think you could just mirror it here.
- Combo 295 to 390 is where things feels really awkward. I am still struggling to understand which part of the instrumental do you use to chart this section. The drums sounds like simple 8ths, the vocals definitely doesn't have 16ths and the guitars is more of a freestyle representation here. So unless I miss something, the patterning of this part of the chart is super super out of place.

Those are just a couple of moments I can pick out on. The chorus section at Combo 98 and 501 has 16ths that I can't tell follows which part of the instrumentals as well so overall it just feels like they were placed where they are needed to place to increase the difficulty and to keep the players active. Therefore, this feels like a mistake in music representation.

To end this on a positive note, the chart plays super well and I could tell you meticulously placed the notes where they need to place to be played comfortably and visually appealing. It feels like the charter has a good understanding with charting so I think you deserved a praise on that. Thank you for your hard work.

I think the chart plays well. Overall every note placement seem to be done at a telegraphed position and nothing is overly too awkward except for a few hand switching moments (namely Combo 43 with the touches and Combo 66 slides to taps).

The main issue is the touches and festival slides here are probably a bit overused. Let me try to get into detail one by one.
- Combo 29 festival slide doesn't look very nice, is this supposed to be a pv reference? I wasn't able to tell. Even so, I think it is still a bit redundant.
- Combo 146 yellow slides and this section of Megurine Luka's vocal is not a good concept to use. I understand the idea to indicate Luka singing but you do realise... Luka is pink right? If you want to do a vocal reference, you can rely on single taps and holds as a way of indicating colour reference. There is some issue with decision making here.
- Combo 191 touches is overloaded. Forcing a PV or lyrics reference while sacrificing visuals is usually not a good habit. I appreciate the effort but I am not able to enjoy it. This applies to Combo 499 as well.
- Combo 210 has slides that splashes with touches. As much as this is perfectly normal and legal, the audio of the song doesn't indicate any situation that would endorse this idea. Thus, making this section overcharted. This applies to Combo 514 as well.

Overall the issue is that touches are overcrowding the chart. My main advice when using touches is mainly to indicate a sub-instrument charting. For example, if your chart is mainly doing instrumental charting, use mainly taps, holds and slides for these sections. When you plan to do a bit of vocal charting as references, only then you can use touches. That way, the touches would not feel too out of place. Just food for thought.

Thank you for your hard work.

关于创作节奏较为朴素的歌曲，我推荐设计一个两小节左右的核心配置。这个配置可以不那么难，但是作为比赛谱如果写的有特色会很加分。在曲子的相同段落可以使用这个核心配置反复出现，并给予变形和加强，会给人留下有设计感的印象。

关于配置库的补充，我的方法是尝试多下埋一些官谱，思考官谱的配置思路。或者多看看比赛谱的一些设计。比赛谱往届的也有很多，尤其是相近 BPM 的谱面是怎么处理的。像比较典型的四分八分配置，可以慢慢在脑海里建立起来索引，之后在写类似段落时就会更从容一些。

这只是我的一些简单思路，可能比不上老资历那么有建设性，但希望对你有帮助。一起加油，祝你创作顺利！

一副之前的谱面强度，包括如扫键+slide的组合配置，完全是可以放在一副使用的，反而一副最开始无拍划tap海底谭可以放在前半做过渡配置；以及一副从无拍划到变成加启动拍没有特别的递进预告，就只是在乐段的结尾突然上升难度加each slide配置，
提提采音方面的：主歌里举个例子 378combo采音是跟着vocal来，配置上是两个八分间隔slide轮流启动，可第二个启动拍压在了16分启动的位置（跟着vocal），这个地方还是比较反常规的、反玩家游玩中对采音的预判逻辑，对照前面所说的强度分配问题，这个地方大可以用一根slide或简单的tap/hold组合来完成这里的vocal采音。
最后双押接touch再接双押的配置如果实际游玩过就知道不是打不到touch就是绿双押，改进手段有几个：将each添加保护/改变each和touch的间隔，不是由两边往中间的动线，可以试试垂直或者水平的动线（即双手同向而行）或许有用

This one is quite cute. I like the attempt to give a good representation to the PV here. I think it fits quite well in this chart. I do think there are some sections that I feel like should have been better not having or be done better.
- I think a lot of the touch splashes with the slides are a bit unnecessary. And there is a lot of them here. The first one is Combo 20 which feels so weird. I understand the decision but it feels a bit bloated for an opening. It raises more questions than provide anticipation to the chart. Combo 300 as well feels super weird. Combo 335 same issue. These are just some nitpicks I found out.
- The 一二三四五六七 section is done decently well but I think because the way she pronounced it, the 4ths tap slides feels quite weird. The song sounds more like `{8}1,1,2,2,3,3,4,4,5,,6,,7,,` so I think charting with that intention would be better.

Overall, this chart plays well and nothing inherently wrong is done. Still a fun little chart that players would definitely enjoy. Thank you for your hard work.

This chart really feels like one of those charts that only the charter would know what the best hand positioning is. It took me countless rewatch to understand how the chart is meant to be played, which usually is a bad thing because there is almost 300 charts in this contest and most players only go through each chart once. But for this specifically, I actually went through it a few times because it was that interesting.

I really like the positioning in this chart despite being extremely unreasonable. It really reminds me of old official charting like Kioku Kioku Master and Like the Wind Reborn. I also think the chart really fits the song as well. So because I was able to learn this chart a lot,  the chart slowly grew on me. However, I would still like to point out places that I wasn't fond of.
- For a 13+ song, I didn't really like the upward swipe at Combo 36. Because of how the song sounds, I actually think that tapping instead of swiping is better here. This applies to Combo 151 as well.
- Combo 158 taps and holds is a bit weird... can't say I like this type of hold positioning even for a weird chart like this.
- The whole section from Combo 237 to Combo 371 is really fucked up... oh my God.
- Combo 397 slide is not telegraphed properly... I really think using a each tap here that force left hand on 8 is better. But then it makes 6 incredibly jumpy.... yeah this is just weird.

Since the second half is just a higher dense and bigger variation of the first half, I have nothing much to add on anymore. I still think this is a super learny chart that is really hard to grasp on but I still quite like it. I think most players would feel the same so I think that's all it matters. Thank you for your hard work.

采音手感不赖，问题是缺少一个比较有记忆点的配置组，所以创新性分数会稍微给得低一些～
谱面整体的配置递进很优秀，也没有什么无理的东西可以挑剔。能想到的一点就：230combo开始的主歌部分，采音一开始是以vocal主导，但是在此处之前都是乐器主导，并且在287后继续以乐器主导，不过其实对于密度的整体递进是没有问题的。非常good

这曲子会让人联想到“放課後ストライド”的官谱。曲子是非常轻快活泼的，但是谱面给我一种粘滞感，打起来没有那种跳跃疾走的感觉，不是很贴歌。还有这个怎么是全曲，最好剪一下不要超过三分钟吧。谱师也许可以尝试一下用266的bpm来写谱，而不是133。
{8}2>6[4:1],1,6<2[4:1],1,7,{16}6,6,,5V71[16:3],这个配置看着怪怪的。整体除了不贴歌倒是没什么大问题，给个NPC吧。

**This is not a chart to play. This is a chart to experience.**

I am absolutely blown away by the chart design. This is straight up a charter's art project that is tasked specifically to present his ideas to the world. I will talk about the three patterns I noticed. And because I know this will not be doing too well in this contest, I will strictly comment on this as an artist to artist standpoint.
- The mix between tap trills and touch trills is actually really really engaging. I love how the notes are spread to the point that even if it was cluttered, it was still readable. If you want to fully lean into this idea, let me suggest something. During the touch sections, make it spread out in the way that instead of tapping them, the player can swipe the screen clockwise and still AP them. So maybe placing them like `{16}E6,E4,E2,E8,E5,E3,E1,E7` so that both methods can be done.
- The slow slide moving up while the touches are ongoing at Combo 557 needs refining. Mainly the touches are too messily placed so I would suggest putting them in a more orderly manner. Perhaps make it so the touch either are placed orderly in one direction?
- The final spin + slide is beautiful, I have no comment.

Thank you for presenting your art project for this presentation. I will give you an A+ for the test. I hope the other teachers won't fail you though. LOL
感谢长评，属于是自己写的时候没想那么多，变成了想到哪写到哪的负面产物，写完改谱的时候也没把那里修正，现在自己看也感觉怪不好看的……touch圈属于是小巧思和表现欲过旺的谱面产物，下次一定注意，哦对。我喜欢你，结婚❤️❤️❤️👰🏻👨🏻
具体描述可能就是为了写出某些特定的配置，而省去了更为细分的音色，比如我描述的部分没错的话你是想以人声为主，而人声很明显有16分的切分的音色，但是你处理的时候用8分双押带过了，导致谱面观感其实和音乐是匹配不上的，不知道是你有意还是无意而为之。

**God I fucking love Yanderes.... Anyways,**

This chart really does feel like you are engaged with a Yandere. The chart feels like a landmine from start to finish. It is something super satisfying to learn but also absolutely horrendous when you fuck it up. I truly think this is one of the charts of all time.

- The intention to make the first verse be a very lag based slide is a pretty good idea. I think it does a good job representing the song even though it is likely absolutely terrible to play. It does give off a Bocca Della Verita like feeling when experiencing it.
- When I saw Combo 187 for the first time, I was straight up afraid for what is to come next. The jumpiness in this chart is really really unconventional in terms of official charting but it works well with the chaos of this song. The first chorus really nailed the horror-like effect on me and I was genuinely intrigued with your idea.
- When the second chorus comes in, I was actually zoned out a bit. This style of chart is really new to a lot of people so most of us would not be able to learn the intricacy of the chart especially when the note density is increased. Since this is a contest, expect most people to watch your chart 1 or 2 times before moving on to the next. So given the little time, your chart is pretty hard to grasp on. Preferably the note density is the same as the first chorus but with different positioning as a way to increase it's difficulty.

Overall, I really like your ideas but the execution feels too 个人差 for me to like it properly. I think it would be a good gimmick chart if we were able to ease into it instead of throwing the whole kitchen sink of techniques at us. Thank you for your hard work.

总之就是很炫酷，但是不知道为啥尾杀特意留个破绽给大家指出。算了，谱师自己心里有数就好。

整张谱打完的感觉就是，一切恰到好处，难度结构的分配，配置的设计递进，以及一些很容易看懂的pv押，非常稳定的水平发挥。
虽然整张谱面的核心设计很明确，但还缺少一个能一下吸引人眼球的关键配置，加上部分地方的引导稍微偏弱。例如132combo的双押7的位置临近右手，是较大概率反接而非回正，一旦反接就导致后面的手感有点别扭，7的位置放在5回正引导会更足一些。
开头的补音小二连不仅引导不够明晰的同时有些多余；主歌第一段强度直接从intro升了太多，有点破坏美感；动作押有点惊喜；一副的hold居然踩了正拍，副歌最核心的就是反拍的音，和听感太冲突了；小折线一笔画的核心还不赖，二副最后的加强会有歧义，可能实在是没法再摆其他形状了吧，可以理解；特征段表现成这样已经不错了

王道系谱面，整张看下来很流畅，手感应该也挺不错。对于这种重复度较高的歌曲，复沓和强化的处理挺到位的。个人最喜欢的是236cb和254cb这两处复沓，前者从星星变成hold体现了渐弱，后者的位移和音高对应上了，有趣的设计。
两段副歌之间能明显看到谱师的强化思路，从八分拍滑过渡到位移更强的错位，个人很喜欢这种前后照应的感觉。（但是间奏好短啊！似乎是剪歌剪得太多了导致两段副歌挨得特别近，有点可惜）
一些小建议：760cb第二组长星星拖慢节奏了，既然前面已经用过一组来过渡，这里就应该着力去采背景乐器了；835cb 同类型的配置写到第五组也应该做一些变形了（这里的改动属于锦上添花），不过谱师选择了相对保守的写法，也没问题吧！
总之，感谢你的作品！看得很开心^_^

这里是楼主……我觉得我贸然给的分数有点低了……

Yeah... when I saw this pop up I was super worried because this song is super hard to chart. I heard some bad things about this so I was going in with the lowest expectations.

**It's really not that bad! In fact I quite enjoy it!**

Of course I was looking in the eyes of a creative person. I really like how you have an idea for each sections and how each of them has their own unique way of playing. They may be ill-placed, ill-paced but they have a clear goal and I think that was presented quite well.

There are of course a lot and a lot of things you could have done for each section. And the mistakes as it goes on piled up so much that eventually the whole chart becomes a mess. So allow me to just say about this one section I really enjoy.

**Combo 275 to 439 is so fucking cool.** Even if the notes are placed quite messily, the song was able to give me the exact vibe to know how to hit the notes here. The swipe to double slide is probably my favorite. It has this playful nature to it and feels really satisfying to hit. If the whole chart was a negative, this section alone pulls it back up to average.

In the end, the chart still failed to represent the chaos of the song and didn't do it justice. But I think your attempt was clear and your ideas was presented enough for me to know that you truly also enjoy this song. Don't give up! One day you will get there~

Thank you for your hard work.

配置选择方面，基本也是想到什么写什么，没有形成有记忆点的配置组，通篇看下来除了那个双ppqq星星其它地方没有记忆点。

副歌的核心很好啊，就是那种梗曲塞一堆东西然后副歌豁然开朗的感觉。但是一副二副写的几乎一样的写法对这种，额元素很丰富但是重复很多的曲目并不是很吃香，首先会视觉疲劳然后没有递进。。可以考虑学习类似和风本当上手的加料方法，把一副二副的区分度拉开，更有层次感。~~（或者说不定把重复段剪掉一半有奇效）~~

吃饱了，谢谢谱师端上来的这一    ，下次继续吃

采音有一些问题，但也能看出来谱师在试着用配置和星星形状来处理一些音色。对于一首3分41秒的长曲来说，配置种类和部分段落的信息量不足，打起来有一些枯燥。
0:55 293cb - 0:59 324cb 这里谱师似乎是想鼓和人声混采，但取舍不够细致，没能很好地表现出重音。
0:59 325cb 这里的交互只能反手或者飞手换手处理，两种打法手感都不是很好。
1:04 363cb 扫键与星星相互衔接的手感不错，个人比较喜欢。
3:01 1221cb 1b/8b,1/8,,1/2,,3,4,5h[8:1],6,6,,7h[16:3]/8h[16:3],,,,, 这个小节全采鼓的话采音应该是1,1,,1,,1,1,{32},1,{16}1,1,,1,1,1,1,, 问题在于5h早了一个32分。
3:21 1416cb 这里6b没看出来在采什么音色，人声和鼓的重音都在一个8分前的7号键tap上。

谱面最大的问题在这几段：
1:40 707cb - 2:11 911cb
2:46 1177cb - 3:00 1219cb
在谱面中间位置插入两段长时间的，信息量低，重复度高的段落，很影响玩家对乐曲及谱面的沉浸度，打起来比较枯燥。并且给谱面造成了一定程度的割裂感。
谱面较早的位置也有类似的段落:
0:17 67cb -  0:30 138cb
0:32 150cb - 0:53 281cb
但这两段在谱面靠前的位置，可以用来当作递进。在歌曲高潮刚结束再插入这种段落就显得不合适了，特别是在之后还要为谱面尾段的高强度扫键做铺垫的情况下，把情绪降的过于低了，并且除了尾段，谱面整体难度并不高，显得最后的发狂很突兀。

看完前面我会说是一张偏实测系的谱，但后面的配置又让我不得不收回这个观点
410cb的touch扫在E7和E3有遮挡，并不是很好读；613cb的绝赞扫虽然有套但速度仍然很快，而且前面也没有类似的配置，还是很初见杀，而且由于比较靠近中段记忆的要求也会偏高；782cb的轴接双押接启动是间奏段最大的爆点，轴交互的手感与常规交互略显不同，在左手回3回正之后，在没有记忆的情况下身体会有惯性不那么容易刹住车接8分双押，同时后面启动拍的双押有一个4-8的飞手，个人认为即使扣掉这里的启动并给双押带上保护也能达到预期的效果；最后的白人打架虽然并无大碍但在结构上仍会造成一些欠缺，情绪张力足矣，只能说有所取舍，没有孰对孰错之分。
好帅的一张谱…………层次分明，强弱合适，衔接流畅，采音丰富，引导到位。最让我印象深刻的是谱师对扫键的引导设计真的非常独到，以多个反复扫键为核心达到了让人 眼前一亮的效果。除了扫键的出张之外，许多错位星星也存在出张，但是所有配置引导都十分到位，实测很舒服。类似第二段主歌开头的长星星、二副之前的键盘段落，对情绪的表达是非常有力的。

非常漂亮的一张谱子，从配置设计本身的角度上可以说是很难挑出毛病。
要说的话可能是本人的一些私心，这张谱子在个人看来或许在前半段还有更好的表现手段。
0:25到0:50这一段或许可以改用别的配置，降低一部分键盘强度，转而使用其他表现方式来突出这里的音色或许会更好。
后面一段开始歌曲的进行明显有一种“崩坏”的感觉，或许也可以从谱面的细节设计上更多的增加能够体现出这种感受的成分。

首先难度曲线没有做好，前面和后面的区分度没有拉的很开；
歌曲本身处于bpm比较高，比较欢快的一个节奏里面，前后区分度如果不拉开就会让整首歌显得很疲劳，00：23的部分的交互放在那么前面就属于一个起高了的状态，后面明显没有拉高到很高，这样整首歌节奏不对了呀！00：45后歌曲下来了，密度看似下来了，又用大量的星星铺满信息量，导致很疲劳；
爪子押在这里做的还是蛮不错的，夸一下。
问题在1：40开始显现了，这里开始需要逐渐提升强度，但是因为前面起太高了，这里一点都不明显，控制一下难度曲线很重要！
祝您写的开心。

主歌第1/2段的星星速度变化没有引导，初见会比较难受。我觉得可以加启动拍来进行引导。
副歌第二段的加强相比第一段有些过大了。
结尾的强度降的有点快了。不过考虑到歌曲结尾也确实有些结束的太快，勉强能理解。不过还是可以改善些。
中间的扫键是否可以加一点套呢？不管是为了采音还算重音提示？（个人向）
整体写的很爽。结构上也还合理，是我好球区的谱面。

This was made by someone who is way above my skill level as a player and charting capabilities. Ever since I joined the Chinese fancharting community, my eyes were blown away by what is considered both normal and interesting. Something I had to accept because there were a lot of habits here that we in the English fancharting community usually avoid. Allow me to share my thoughts here. **Please be aware none of this affects the overall scoring but rather just something I want share. I still very much love this chart.**
- Slide delay manipulation at Combo 83 and Combo 85 where you made `{16}x,,,x,,,x,,` slides work. English fancharting side usually would be 'Don't do slides at {16}x,,,x,,,x,,'.
- Combo 263 chain slide that doesn't connect. This one is something I am personally okay with but most of us actually prefer to avoid this because it is easily abused among newer charters. Since you are a veteran charter likely, I am aware you would know what is good. Though... I still think using this once only in the entire chart is probably making this very odd. Prefer if you used it more often if you introduced it here.
- Combo 343 slide that could potentially splash with 1. This is fine here at this speed but my God did I have anxiety watching this.
- You have a lot of very unique slide shapes that is common in the Chinese community but not in the English community. It became very apparent when I saw Combo 477.

That's about what I have time to nitpick on. But overall this is definitely some form of incredible levels of over charting that doesn't make the chart look ugly or unplayable but rather meant to be a form of artwork that challenges players to dance along with. If I would to describe this chart, it would be that 'it is a tango with a dancer but they are taking the lead and you are just a toy to them'.

Regardless of what I have said, I still really enjoyed this chart. You are definitely getting a good score from me. Thank you for your hard work.

**牛逼牛逼牛逼牛逼牛逼牛逼牛逼，这个太他妈牛逼了。**
首先是结构很稳定的一张谱啊，三处主要段落递进走的都特别好，尤其是最后将近收尾的几段向下拍动和绝赞星星飞手写的很帅，调动身体的同时情感调动也特别棒——就像潇洒的冒险家在总结旅程时画下的随性一笔一般，很酷啊。

与其相映衬的还有谱师的手顺理解，大部分tap都设计在了离上一处星星结束一格远的地方，打起来很顺手的同时引导也很分明。有反手处的配置也没有任何挡视野与手感生硬的毛病，能把这些处理好只能说明谱师对手顺理解这方面很到位了，很赞。

采音这方面...能挑出什么毛病吗？个人觉得是没有什么别扭的地方，而且还是很稳定老练的舍增音递进方式（参考沙发太的bug）。空拍处也用了很常见的双押扫过渡，打起来很王道顺畅。

很久没在自制比赛里看到这么舒适的递进与走键了，个人记得上次有这种感觉还是看到mmfc10白面具的时候，我真的太爱这种“只用几个简单的音符就可以完美调动身体”的感觉了。
总之是很厉害的谱面啊，希望之后能多看到这样的谱面，太赏心悦目了。
祝谱师取得好成绩，玩的开心！

This chart feels very comfortable. I like how it feels and how it doesn't lean too much into PV reference but still plays with the song's melody. I think this would be really fun to play even on an official cab.

There are a couple of sections I think needs some work.
- The piano section in the middle needs so adjustment. I'm a pianist so a lot of the those chords are treated with accent so holds would work better than taps for Combo 242. The spins is better to be trills as well since your chart doesn't have any spins. Trills are much easier to read and maintain compared to constant changing spins. It also works better with the vocals as well if you use trills!
- Combo 457 has cool slide design but the cross hand feels a bit unreasonable. I think your chart would still be fine and fun without the cross hands for the chorus. Less is more.

Overall I still very much enjoy this. Thanks for introducing this song to me, it's going to be in my playlist from now on. Thank you for your hard work.

作为一张14级谱面我认为这张谱主要的缺点在于过大的信息量、部分硬抗和飞手不合理以及摆键过于狂野等方面。下面就几个方面详细说明：

6 634出5-1 5-7星星密度太大，导致接键盘非常飞手
7 以及最后 这张谱位移真的太大了，，，打了几遍累死了，该做做减法了

A beautiful song selection with a decently crafted chart.

I really like how the chart feels throughout the chart. The section right before chorus is unbelievably enjoyable. I especially love the hold and touches at Combo 136. It's subtle but it really gives leeway for the player to head bop. I like small sections like these because it shows that the charter enjoyed charting it as well.

Both the choruses are well made. I like how the taps feel and despite being simple mirroring and repetition, these are the repetition that I feel most people wouldn't mind enjoying.

My final point I want to highlight is that I am quite iffy with the touch usage here. Most of the times they are used quite well but there are sections where you use touches to splash with the slides, specifically Combo 322 and it's variation. I think you don't have to do it this way. It doesn't look cool either, it just make it look messy. If you adjust the touches to single touches ( Change them all the blue colour by using ` instead of / ) then MAYBE it might be better.

Other than that, solid chart. Still a couple more minor mistakes here and there but I just want to point out the ones I find important. Thank you for your hard work.

小细节问题有点多，这里直接说一下总的看法

对于低bpm/慢星星的谱面，最重要的是要有“统一性”。而这张谱从开头的四段星星写法就初见端倪，手顺不固定/启动拍不固定，观感上便会十分混乱。对于这种需要抒情造氛围的歌，就必须得让谱面节奏一致，换句话说就是要省音省到有一个“主体节奏”。像这张谱在一会写星星单手跳拍，尤其副歌最为严重，而过了副歌以后却又全是键盘，能理解谱师想用不同配置去表现歌曲不同的情绪，但是既然选择了这个总的写法，再要采这么多元素便显得既要又要十分臃肿

总的来说这张谱并不能达到本人的及格线，但谱师选曲十分有品，而且能看出谱师是在用力地去表达这首歌的。可以去学习官谱类似风格的谱面，找到一个核心以后重写一下这张谱。加油！

Oh boy, this one. I personally love the official chart A LOT. And when I saw Master 14, I have some really high expectations to meet. And after watching the whole thing:

**This is equally fun!**

I really like how this feels like the harder version of the official. It feels like it is made for players who enjoy a more challenging playstyle than the official version. As someone who can appreciate the difficulty of both versions, I really like how this one plays. It uses more 16ths and more slide positioning as a way to introduce cross hands more expertly. I can't help feel that the charter had a lot of enjoyment making this. It feels like a labour of love, a respect to the original.

Minor nitpick. Combo 94 doesn't have to be a hand switch since you don't intend to keep that up at Combo 101. So this section becomes pretty weird.

I think the major issue I have is that the chart doesn't look very appealing visually. There are a lot of tangents in this chart that I feel kinda makes it look very rigid. An example is places like Combo 690 where 2>5 and 7-2 cause the slides to meet at 2 or Combo 825 where 6-8 and 3>8 causes the slide to meet at 8. Small details like these actually makes it look stiff. It's like how Chinese characters where the font actually makes the characters look stiff or caligraphy art. I like charts that have a bit more of a tail when they meet so it looks nicer.

Other than that, I think the playstyle overall is extremely comfortable. Just tuning the placement makes a huge difference so I hope you understand where I'm coming from. The ending is extremely beautiful by the way! That's how you make a slide design look visually appealing. Thank you for your hard work.

This is a very nice song, I quite like how this one plays as well but was only because I understood how to play it. A lot of moments I feel was done a bit too much that I would like to point them.
- The slide feels like they move too fast, especially in the first half before the chorus. Perhaps it's the low BPM but some moments I feel the slide should have just stayed 4:1 just to vibe with the song itself.
-  Combo 327 is really cool but it is super demanding. I feel like most 13+ enjoyers would actually struggle to grasp this because of the sudden hand movement. However, I thought it was done quite well so I decide to give it a pass. Until I saw the ending...
- **Your chart is a 13+ rhythm and hand positioning chart with 14+ bursts**. As much as it is easy to read the spin section at Combo 648, the whole of second half is extremely not playable for 13+s. Please recall that this is a Standard chart with no safety net. Don't just put patterns that feel cool and think about how even 13k and 14k players feel when observing the chart from their standpoint. A lot of the stamina is being magnified at the end which makes the first half and second half extremely different. I reckon you just tone it down and just give a more playful feeling for the second chorus, instead of increasing the difficulty by introducing swipes and spins.

I like the ideas of this chart and as a seasoned player I can appreciate the effort. But remember that charting for a game is like designing a level for a game. If there was a level designed to be played at a specific level, then make sure it is playable for people at THAT specific level. **This may be a charting contest, but on a design level, you failed.**

Thank you for your hard work.

A clear concept chart that is done quite well when it needed to be. There are some glaring issues that I would like to highlight on before my overall thoughts.
- The initial C touch hold blocks the vision of notes from below. I think you can just choose not to do C touch hold and do holds at 2 and 7 here.
- Combo 85 with the two touches that appear on the same position is fine officially but not very nice looking. I think since your chart is already stamina based, you can allow the other hand to do the touches at a different position so both hands can be kept busy at all times.
- Combo 163 s slide moves very fast... in fact... all your z and s slides move very fast. I think you either need to readjust the slide speed or change the slide shape for most of them.
- Combo 244 and its variation of hand switching slides is not ideal. For high BPM charts and stamina heavy as this, you can just avoid doing patterns like this to keep it as a form of resting pattern, especially since your whole ass chart is a fucking stamina drain.
- Combo 353 spin where the D1 touch literally lines up with 1 within the time frame is very forced. Why are the rest spaced correctly but suddenly a tap that has the same duration but different travel speed present here? I think there is a bit of lack of care here.
- This is gonna sound crazy but the breaks at Combo 857 shouldn't be ex. If you pattern is to lead up to something incredibly hard. Doing this actually dilutes the difficulty and reduces the satisfaction of hitting the pattern. If you are going to be unreasonable, commit to it at least.

The sections behind have similar issues mentioned above. Overall I still really enjoyed the chorus. It is really cool and I like your idea very much. It is super creative and incredibly satisfying to hit. You have some room to grow but you showed your capabilities well and deserve a praise for it. Thank you for your hard work.

Don't worry about the joke answer, I still love you. <3 Thank you for your hard work.

# <font color="#427EC6">深蓝</font>
128cb这里的556出现的有点早，硬抗三下的配置出现的还挺靠前的；
295cb-324cb这里面的采音我确实没有听懂，实测上也是以目押为准，后面一样的音色也是同理；
435cb-459cb这里的排键有点太保守了，这里的音色只有第一个小节音是比较稳定的，剩余三个小节的音都是带有一定急促的感觉的，可以考虑用一些较大位移的交互配置来配合音色；
664cb-705cb这里的配置出现得太早了，考虑到这张谱的尾杀部分也是类似的扫键，这里的扫键就相对来说有点过早了，毕竟一下就拉到了尾杀的地步上，强度提升也有点太高；
892cb这里的特殊音色没有采上有点可惜，毕竟后面的特殊音色你都采上了，前面的这个部分就可以拿来做后面部分的过渡；
916cb-945cb这里，前后两段的手顺处理不一致，前面是左右对称，后面更偏向左手一点；（不扣分）
1049cb-1067cb这里其实不是很明白采的什么音，而且就具体来说最好还是跟着前面的vocal音和背景作混采；
1032cb-1438cb在谱面结构上应该作为二副，然后衔接最后的尾杀段。如果这一段的强度只是单纯前面配置的加强而不是接上一副的强度，会导致整个谱面看起来只有两个note密度高的地方，其他部分就弱下来导致难度明显不均。
1564cb-1566cb是尾杀这段唯一一个不是以交互相邻位置作为起点的扫键，可能是设计失误？
总体来说，结构上的确有一定的缺陷，主歌两段的重复率其实挺高的递进效果不明显，而且在配置的使用上有一定的拘束，导致副歌的交互位移没有放开，相对的扫键占据了整个副歌位移的内容。

This is really fun... Like... really really fun.

The opening starts off very simple. The constant triple taps fits very well with the song even though it feels super simple. It builds a very intricate difficulty curve and despite a steep spike towards the back, I think you did a good job of maintaining the fun of the chart.

I think there are still very questionable hand positioning in the chart as a whole. I think the biggest issue for me is the chorus at Combo 494. I think there might be some slight overcook a this section. I really don't think the 5V31 is necessary. Removing it would not affect the chart's difficulty nor make the chart feel any less fun. I think my overall point is that, every motion should have meaning so if one doesn't need to exist, it doesn't have to exist.

The ending is the biggest highlight. It is rather unforgiving but it feels so fun to nail it. It has the 'Saikyou Stronger' ending vibe where if you were to hit all the notes perfectly, the absolute hype and joy you get makes it very forgivable.

Overall this is a decent 14 by official standpoint. But personally, this is one of the best 14 in this contest because I just love this type of charts. Thank you for your hard work.

我自己下载下来仔细研究过，小玻璃大概打了六七遍这样。
有几段处理得还是很不错的，比如开头对音色和左右声道都做了区分，不过感觉没有做很严格的统一，比如有一个很明显的重音开头两下都是用exslide头踩，后面用了extap和touch，当然也可能是切换了踩音。180cb交互后给人一种豁然开朗的感觉，我个人认为这里可能可以再写大一点，更能体现出动感。副歌叠星星有意思，稍微注意下也不会蹭，有一些配置有难度比如双压、单手硬抗和绝赞段。最后双扫很有感觉，不过这里星星不知道为什么和前面不一样，不是蓝色星星先走完，可能和踩音有关。整体来说引导、踩音和结构都做得很不错，排键我个人觉得可以再规整一点或者位移加大一点，这种诡异感也不会减弱，总体很不错。

是能流畅游玩并有较好手感的一张谱呢
先说优点吧，谱面在相同结构处的配置复用做的不错，有在相近段落使用相似配置的意识，同时游玩体验也相当愉悦
但是缺点也很明显，首先是配置复用的层进感没有很好的展现出来，前后的键位在手感上没能做出较有递进感的差异，重复度还是太高，这点略可惜
同时，也是比较致命的一个问题，谱面缺少一个最核心的记忆点，这导致看完甚至是打完后都没能有一个很直观的大致印象，这导致这张谱在比赛场上来说，可能会相对缺乏一点竞争力
而且，一部分配置没能把音色特征展现出来，例如开头的弦乐，用直星星和敲木鱼带过的话，个人觉得没能很好展现出此处弦乐的质感以及歌曲本身想表现的情绪
总之，能看出谱师有一定的功底，但谱面本身仍需要经过更细致的打磨，期待能取得自己满意的成绩！

与其说星星限制键盘排列，可能其实是我个人的排键习惯不会让tap满天飞，同时保证谱面的观感去加入星星来丰富视觉效果，副歌的情绪也是比较满所以才加入了拍划星星来作为行进思路，一拍一根4分星星当然也是因为歌的4分重鼓较明显。歌曲165的bpm是比较理想的玩拍划的bpm，所以在副歌是把类海底谭作为小核心来构造的，也很贴切副歌的情绪——因为一二副歌本身就挺平滑的，私认为没必要刻意去拉副歌间的难度曲线，反而有点突脸。
至于间奏海底谭，不太能理解哪段间奏属于海底谭，如果是指470combo开始的错位，我觉得这段的24分小跳拍构造应该与副歌的海底谭拍滑拉开差距了，手感、采音、手序、情绪应该都有较明显的区分
为了玩touch而玩touch个人感觉不可取，bass音色形状各异的星星来带一带感觉就够用了。其实也考虑过写的更花哨一点，但是2分大多的歌曲时长的14我觉得不适合再塞信息量了，过度强调设计感不太符合个人最初预期（而且现在其实已经很有趣了不是吗）
二副的音乐和一副的音乐相差无几，情绪都很饱满，预期上就没有再做更明显的递进——当然肯定是要做递进的，其实我也已经递进了，大概不明显吧，大玻璃打了打感觉小递进够用了，并不明显的细微递进在长曲里的接受度比想象的高一点
感谢回复！
对较长曲的节奏把控尚可，副歌配置比较平A但可以接受。一副的核心配置出张引导换手星星比较贴歌，但二副不知道为什么改成了左右各一边的走向，相比于同向比较不平衡。

后盘的647combo左右的引入选取踩人声会有一个把wifi后降落的表达唐突地带上去的问题，听感上跟一下背景的鼓或者合成器其实也足够了。710combo左右的touch原地转圈比较有意思，但视觉和手感引导还需要下些功夫。总地来说是一张采音ok但结构还有提升空间的谱面。

只能说touch流向有点太开发者模式，上机后的touch走向如果没有比较明显的走向是极度让人感到困扰的，你可以参考本届的44号与loa2的AIZO。我并不觉得提升读谱信息量加上频繁内外切换的配置是一个好的配置。第二是关于采音，我明白你的24分是想充当星星，但是在一个慢bpm的小歌的情况，24分的touch就是会让人听着非常的疑惑，明显是跳脱于音乐之外的采音我觉得难以接受。整个谱面都充斥着这种莫名的采音就会让人对这张谱面感到困惑。
第三，我明白你的星星和采音是为了拼凑neta，但是谱面的质量与连贯度是永远大于大于所有neta的，我认为你的拼凑的这个想法确实有点。。。或许你可以看看官谱的ax对破碎感的写法。

# *所有后来者不应因此篇评分而影响自己的评分，请保持自己的独立思考*

## 【lotus】先生晚上好，受小小蓝白大人的委托，为您写下这篇评论
## 在这里先表明本人的评分标准
### 将会被指出且会影响评分的负面因素：
其一：谱面随歌曲的情绪表达与起伏不当；其二：过于严重的音色表达缺失或采音错误；其三：谱面结构崩坏，段落感极度模糊；其四：过于无理的配置运用
### 将会被指出但不会影响评分的负面因素：
其一：局部星星形状使用不当；其二：局部摆键不当；其三：可以通过简单修改进行规避的无理要素
### 如有其他例外情况将会在进行额外说明

---
论情感起伏与表达，这张谱面在我的评价标准内是非常过关的，不仅如此，主歌与副歌的区分度与段落感极佳，在主歌处能用尚可的摆键进行过度与填充，做到了精简信息量，保持适当的重复与变形，没有喧宾夺主等优点；与此同时，副歌体现出了较为良好的配置核心，以上正是这张谱面与一般萌新谱面拉开差距的地方

关于这张谱面，我还有以下意见：
其一，谱面中使用了大量短ppqq星星，如112cb处的开花星星，在我个人看来，全谱绝大多数诸如此类的ppqq星星在观感上是较快的，谱师在赛后建议对实测游玩过的玩家进行咨询以决定是否需要修改

其二，399cb处使用3tap的扫键切入长星星个人认为尚有不妥之处，首先3tap的双押扫键就我个人而言本身比较生硬，且在星星的启动处打击感较差，并且需要与扫键相对逆向发力的星星方向对游玩流畅度会造成一定的破坏

其三，二副处的转圈虽然很好地表达了vocal长音所带来的情感，但对长音中间因歌词带来的人声转音没有进行很好的体现，造成了必要信息的缺失

其四，前奏与主歌部分的hold摆键前后可以更加有规律，将整体的hold摆键规律统一起来，会让主歌看上去更加精致，完成度更高

其五，二副后半部分，从764cb开始的段落，歌曲即将抵达情绪最高潮时，谱面密度与强度提升稍有不足，可以进行适当的补音进行配置强化

以上

总体来说谱面的流动感很强，核心配置抓得很牢，但歌曲强度曲线（尤其主歌和副歌部分）的划分不是特别清晰。
中盘touch hold配合pv演出的效果很好，加分！
接下来提一些不足之处：364cb之前是星星接hold+换手的低强度配置，但在开始划7-3的同时立刻出现了一个6,6,4,25,的八分位移，强度陡增可能会影响手感，个人感觉需要调整一下排键；
494cb处两条对向sz星星有点难黄，这个有可能是我自己问题（）；
554cb附近个人感觉没有必要突然用这么大圈的星星，另外和星星头间隔八分的hold也不太好接，改成短一点的弧手感可能会好些；
以上，祝好成绩！
很喜欢副歌的核心配置，排键也比较老练，基本挑不出什么大毛病，要说的话就是感觉两段副歌配置有些重复，而且开头主歌和第二段副歌强度太高了点，感觉可以多做做变形稍微削弱一点强度这样会更好，现在的话信息量其实对于一个13+来说是不太合适的
1：15突然强度降低的设计比较诡异，类似这种段落内的强度平衡做的不算很理想。
感谢你的建议！
