写在前面：*MMFC是一场自制谱比赛，而并非情怀大赛。* 可以理解谱师对于宝可梦的热爱，但作为一张**maimai自制谱面**，很遗憾我无法给出好评。
尽管没有出现硬性无理，本作的结构和采音都有着不可忽视的缺陷，另外也存在大量细节问题，以下略举几例。
· 120cb  基于双押的打拍子段落，然而星星的介入时机混乱（没有从小节的重音拍开始），明显地影响了小节间的过渡节奏。
· 266cb  很明显**渐强**的build up段落，前面数小节也已经跟随歌曲逐渐增强了配置，无法理解谱师为什么要选择在这里写文字押。要做比喻就是咱们正常开车上高速，前面突然横摆一辆车身印着PKM的大运，不管喇叭按得再响就是不愿意动弹。——关键是这大运把后面副歌的节奏也封住了，副歌完全没有接住build up段的造势，没有符合情绪的采音和排键设计，看起来只是随机排列的零散音符，星星也完全可以摆得更灵动。*（这里向谱师推荐同p主的官谱Hand in Hand，虽然只是张12+，build up和副歌的处理明显成熟多了，很值得学习借鉴）*
· 474cb  另一个build up段落，至少这次的思路没被大运堵住，但是又出现了另一个极端：大运超速了。前面是一小节只需要拍一两下的touch（这并没有什么问题），但从474cb开始直接开始了单手八分tap，有点**操之过急**了，不妨从四分开始渐进式过渡。
· 557cb  用上了很结实的12分双纵，看来后面要跟一段符合强度的副歌？——并没有。二副和一副有着同样的问题，就不再赘述了。然而680cb谱师又用回了这个12分双纵（甚至全部用了绝赞），我们的副歌强度真的有这么高吗？
· 694cb  合唱段押挥手动作的思路没问题，不过**节奏**上又混乱了。左手的折返星星从小节的第二个四分音出现（不足两小节），右手则是第一个四分音（持续两小节），节奏和配置均不对等。实际上一个小节写一只手的折返刚好合适，下一小节就可以顺势成换另一只手，官谱同样有很多类似的例子可以学习。……在谱面的最后，谱师还在写这个文字押（关键是押的也不好看啊！），再次漏掉了大量丰富的背景音，破坏了歌曲的行进逻辑，这又是非常掉印象分的地方。
——————————
总体来说，谱师对歌曲整体的把握还颇为青涩，不论结构、采音、配置都有着很大进步空间。再次推荐官谱Hand in Hand，希望谱师能够虚心学习，加油哦^_^

# **谱师辛苦了**
最大的问题是没有一个核心/记忆点，谱面没有很好的表现出歌曲的氛围感。
排键上，复杂结构通过摆键给的节奏提示可以更多些，目前稍显混乱。
整体对歌曲的诠释已经相对到位了，这么复杂的歌曲确实难写。
副歌的键盘配置连贯性很强，尤其是扫键接双押扫，想法很好。

神谱，疑似老资历的杰作，打起来很爽。
开头的break双押加保护套好评。实际上本谱的一个优点就是break保护套给得很适当。
开头的键盘写得不错。
206cb的touch启动拍不太好，建议改为保护套tap或break启动。595cb同理。
206cb开始的这一段写得很好，星星和跳拍的穿插值得学习。
309cb的2号位tap建议加保护套。
509cb的星星及随后的配置如果搞错了手（比如用左手划星星）会很不好打，建议修改。
595cb开始的二副加花很好，但是扫键易蹭到紧接其后的星星，建议删除这些星星。
649cb的12号位双押因为紧接着前面56号位双押，比较难打，手感不好。建议删去1号位tap，仅保留星星启动拍。
785cb的2号位tap有些反直觉，建议删除。
797cb开始的这一段tap位置比较难打，建议修改。
845cb开始的转圈是神来之笔，很好情感调动。不过中间的双押圈可能有些初见杀，而且转完一圈就又回到原来的无保护套单转圈了，有些影响结构，可以考虑删除。
924cb的星星可以加启动拍，其实这里使用三个烟花touch倒是很合适。
总的来说是张神谱，值得学习。

谱师写这种采音难度高的曲子辛苦了，整个谱面配合着音乐的怪诞感，个人还挺喜欢这个风格的。但是可能是歌曲的问题，总体我觉得采音有些杂乱，而且看着几处星星的手感不太好，但是配置的衔接运用又如鱼得水，分数不会太高但一定不低。
偏小众的谱面，就像73°的生姜热可乐，总有人喜欢。

In case you misunderstand, I gave a serious scoring. I am not that horrible of a person to randomly shit on someone just because I want to be funny. My scores is not 100% reflective to my comment.
其实这张谱我整体处在一个很矛盾的界限，先写了很多的net但是jump scare和莫名其妙的配置会难以接受就写了ex来兜底，写完了一段感觉我靠这么难又削弱加删除note让他手感不被影响，这样的写法就直接导致了我采音思路极其混乱的结果，我前面甚至都没有放个一个音直接全采，等到后面把谱削完了之后上传一看自己都没懂自己的采音思路飞到哪里发财了😭😭

配置和采音与歌的相性很好，转圈星星和伪一笔画既有辨识度也很契合歌曲本身。
然而总体来看个人认为还是有些用力过猛，虽然配置强度变化契合着歌曲的情绪起伏，但整体的强度大过了歌曲本身的情感；另外，一些配置为了观感而选择牺牲的手感可以预见的会造成初见杀，这会对谱师也许想要建立的连贯感造成影响。
是优秀的作品，可以看出谱师想要表达的内容。
中规中矩的一张谱，谱面重複性有点高，感觉会有点乾。不过hold接touch刷我个人很喜欢。
这种短小精悍的马拉松歌副歌的处理可谓是重中之重，可惜的是谱面的副歌处理相比前后都太寡淡了，且前面主歌也在玩类似的配置导致副歌一点也不突出。

开头以及主歌的非常规手序/非常规时值星星很多，不建议在开头写特别扭曲的配置。
一副的强度相比主歌没有撑起来，且前半和后半的玩法并不统一，观感和手感上都比较杂乱。如果能围绕一个核心配置展开的话会更好。
drop段相比其他段落写得更收敛，没有手感问题，但同时也错过了曲子本身丰富的节奏和音色。
总之建议削弱其他段落的一些“小巧思”，把信息量和调动转移到副歌和drop段上，这样会更加出彩。
用短直星星和这种尖锐的fes星星表示破碎音效的方法我很喜欢（

氛围和歌曲一样是走搞怪路线的谱呢，完成度还不错   (虽然但是1:11开始的一段我彻底听力竭了)
星星用的很有趣，很喜欢224cb的一笔画，但是297cb的一笔画用的太变态了，手感不好。
虽然歌曲重复的地方很多，但是谱面单纯复制粘贴感觉还是有点太潦草了，如果能在摆键和星星形状上稍微做出点变化会更好。

玩法设计问题不大，但是歌曲重复部分太多而谱面本身也没有做出差异化。也是谱师尽力局。
一点建议，一副开头来的时候可以减弱一点，开头起的太高了

The chart seems quite fun, but given it's swing and very fast, it ends up feeling somewhat awkward being so slide heavy. The whole chart feels very dense and there isn't very much room to breathe, which itself is not a bad thing, but I think it hurts this chart. It ends up making majority of the chart feel very same-y.

另附一些其他细节问题，个人对采音和排键的逻辑比较重视，昨天没有时间未能一点点列出来，这里作为评分依据：

·前奏0：17处，第一、三小节乐句对应，但是谱面在最后的红蓝弧线星星做出了不同长度的处理，如果是要押最后那一下吉他的节奏变化，第二处的蓝色弧线应当改成更加短促的形状，既符合节奏又不会因为弧线长度的突然变化让人困惑。
·前奏0：34处，第一小节出现了两次二连，第一次是带星星的{24}8p4[12:1],8，第二处是不带星星的{24}5,5,,{8}3，如果是为了采后面的吉他音，前面这里的星星不如不加，只设计纯粹的键盘排键。
·主歌0：55处，突然出现了{4}1/7<4b[12:1],整整一拍的空拍，而同段落前面这种空拍都是通过采吉他/补拍（比如前面的{24}7,5,6,5,{6}8h[6:1],五连）处理的，这里也应当补齐节奏。
·导歌1：19处，第一小节前两拍都有双押，相同的三四拍却没有，逻辑上这四拍开头的处理方式都应当是一致的。
·间奏1：56处，{48}4,3,4,3,{12}4,采错音了，这里是四连音，即{36}x,x,x,x,
·桥段2：13处，第二、四小节的长音无本质区别，用于表现它们的星星也应该处理成相似的形状。这里其中一根是拐了多次的折线星星，另一根是只拐了一次的弧线星星，二者之间设计上的关系太小。

如有其他问题欢迎继续找我讨论，但大前提是确确实实尝试了上述的改法，仍然觉得处理得不够合适的情况。我不太有时间battle纸面上的理论，这些东西改一改就知道问题在哪了。

A very well made chart. I like the flow and the comfortable hand positioning in this chart. The ending despite being quite dense out of a sudden is actually well maintained and doesn't feel too off from the density of the song. I think what really stood out to me is that you could chart quite an interesting patterning even though the song is quite simple. I as a charter wouldn't be able to chart something like what you did here and I think that's why you deserver high scores.

I think what stops it from being a perfect score is that the pattern is already used in other charts such as Mare Maris and Atlas Rush. Even with the toned down difficulty, I think there could still use some variety in the chart, perhaps some form of festival slides + short chain sliders during the section would be cool.

Thank you for your hard work.

总的来说是一张不太合格的作品，很抱歉我要拉闸了。首先开局非cth给的印象就不是很好，touch hold不像普通的hold一样，在上机打的时候临近的touch hold是可能会换手的，开头就容易打错，18cb开始的扫键很不贴歌，歌曲的情绪不是很高昂，扫键一出来氛围不太对了，主歌没必要这么写，97cb的子弹接12分扫键更是接受不能，153cb这里要左手从3开始扫键不然用右手后面176cb的换手扫还会用左手接1，188cb这里开始略显平庸，这么写也不是不可以，但是作为一张比赛谱来说我觉得这种写法肯定是不讨好的，除非运用得特别好不然这种平淡的写法很难让人给你打高分，341cb这里突然的向上touch扫也有点接受不能，366cb这里向下的touch扫接受度会稍微高一些，429cb这里的8,7,1,2,3,4, 相比之前多了一个音但谱师只是把这个音放上7号键踩了上去没有把这个音给表现出来，不是很能接受，538cb这个配置。。。感觉没必要这么写，非cth用的太丑了而且很生硬，不过我自己不写dx谱这里不作扣分项吧。794cb这里像进副歌但是还没进副歌的这种微妙结构谱师没有处理好，突然开始的扫键很突兀，歌曲情绪还没上来呢，二副能看得出来有递进，1009cb这里开始的扫键接交互我还挺喜欢的，可惜前面写得不好的地方太多了，可能是谱师临近ddl没时间改了但是还是希望下次能好好打磨一下吧

这张谱给我的第一印象就是奇诡的手序，多看几遍之后依然如此，有一种“这些键想去哪就去哪”的感觉，非复制的段落中基本上无法预测接下来的摆键，以及突兀的高压配置。
这种诡异在226cb这里达到了第一个高峰，前段的错位基础上加了个双押这种突然的变化已经足以让人措手不及了，后面又是超大的位移……250cb这里开始感觉谱师已经完全放飞自我了，首先是一笔画换手，然后是慢速直星星+追尾，又回到一个奇型一笔画，再到正常的圆圈一笔画，后面接两个能惊掉人下巴的高压子弹接双押。这一整段我看不出来任何精心的编排和与曲子的呼应。294cb这里开始不太能听懂采音。390cb到410cb这一段我觉得写的还行，为什么后段435cb到460cb这里不直接复制过去反而又写一段意义不明的白开水配置呢。470cb是混乱的第二个高峰，真有人能反应这个突然的出张子弹接扫接大位移散打跳拍接出张子弹再转个圈？再后面反而槽点不太多了，就是570cb这里真要把星星写的飞快就是为了追后面那个绝赞的采音吗，前面敢那么大胆的舍这里也没必要硬采啊，少采一对也没问题啊。759cb这里两条星星为什么时长不一样，这很诡异。
其实178cb到225cb以及后面相似的这些配置我觉得设计还挺有意思的，但是完全掩盖不了别的地方的问题。
辛苦创作了，祝你进步。
开头的配置感觉塞的有点怪怪的，不美观打着也很难受，不过中间部分手感观感都还可以，就是有一段写了向上的四根星星最后折返那种配置手感真的有点差而且有点丑，但其他地方我还是挺喜欢的
结构和递进都有在做，分数基本盘肯定是有的。具体的配置选用和调动安排有种古早自制的朴素感，这其实是欠缺了一些对歌曲细节的表现的，与跟人声为主的采音思路也有关系。一副二副的核心是不同的配置，这样的结构处理并不是不能接受，只是一副换手、二副同头的配置处理得非常强硬而且不太能表现出动感（一副还勉强有一些，二副8分不间断的同头就实在不是很贴了）

主观上来说感觉和纯听歌脑补出来的谱差别有点大，其实私心更希望看到比较安静俏皮的谱子但是这里只剩下俏皮了，本来以为会是小歌的但是写成这样也能接受。开头比较安静的氛围铺满键盘我觉得是不太合适的，在这种写法下各种音色之间有区分但是体现得不明显，很有结构但是整体差点意思，比如19cb有鼓，39cb没有鼓但是却写了相同的配置。157cb左右开始背景的鼓也丢掉了不是很能接受。副歌的子弹接星星绕圈点子还是挺好的，后面追追的想也很贴歌，~~（562cb这里的子弹是在押什么吗，我怎么看不出来？）~~二副前休息段总感觉强度还是太高，信息量和副歌差不多了，后边感觉二副的递进还不太够，差点意思，911cb这个单双看着好有感觉，很贴歌好喜欢。931cb左右的扫键不是很能接受。整体来说虽然没有看到我期望看到的样子但是写得还可以，值得给出一个不错的分数
开头的排键有点散啊，再收敛工整一点会更好；整体的内容量没有做出区分度，全程就是在写三角来推进，导致全程平平地铺过去的同时记忆点没有很明显；副歌还算有意思，但是核心的部分好短，然后马上又跟着一段食之无味弃之可惜的平a尾段，只能说曲目本身确实不是很好写，相当棘手啊，尽力了

谢谢ww，副歌的确是选择了卡拉OK的写法，且个人感觉不太适合在这四段里都采背景音效，所以就只在转间奏的时候用了。说略丑的fes星星如果是指副歌每段开头的绝赞星星的话，其实都是在歌词押，结尾的也是ww
“   Qあの日君かﾞ俯いて   流していたカケラは何てﾞすか？

你对官谱的借鉴程度有点让我不太想送出去手里的星星，但是你的创意和小巧思又恰好弥补了这一部分。如果做个手术把你自己写的部分删掉的话，可能这个作品就会显得像是一位故人，那么剩下的部分包括采音思路以及配置相似程度来讲，加起来的话可能过不了我的论文查重，就会有一些扣分的情况。现在最好的办法呢，就是在保持touch的神级思路的同时，把你的谱面长得像官谱的地方通通改掉。
可能我这么说显得有点严格（或者不太讲理？）但是……端着一个好的思路，或者说，端着一盘饺子醋上场，又正好是官谱撞曲，并且这张官谱是六边形战士，虽然剪曲上花了一点心思，但是除非有着完全惊艳全场的亮点，否则是难以拿到更高的分数的。

我认为我没有资格教别人做事，所以以上的评论内容仅仅作为一些建议，与我给出的真实评分没有很大关联。

真的是非常难写的一首歌，谱师选择这首作为参赛曲真的勇气可嘉，但可惜感觉有点用力过猛（~~我草，火神！~~），在如此高的bpm下的各种密集的不同跳拍配置在实际游玩时真的很容易让玩家大脑过载

个人认为其他评论中提到的打磨思路都很不错，细节上再补充一些没有讨论的小点：

1. 98cb处的7>5和前面越来越赶的星星配置略微有些不搭，用长星星去押歌词的长音是很正常的写法，但是这里的速度有些过于慢了，也许修改一下星星形状（例如7qq4，或写一个折返）会好一些；在时值上押长音在视觉上保持和曲子基调一样的较欢快的快速应该是一个更好的解

2. 177cb开始的一段进跳拍有点为时过早，也许可以提前进一笔画多写一段，不然考虑整张谱面都是跳拍，多少会有一点视觉疲劳

3. 278cb左右上机可能有突脸遮挡，可以简化；671cb类似

4. 309cb的配置徒增一个容易灰的手感不好的点意义不是很大

5. 581cb左手星星结束立刻接5比较突脸

   总体来说还是不错的谱面，多打磨打磨就会好不少，可玩性什么的都不错，可惜创意上确实没有什么出彩的地方，谱师辛苦！

'- 初看非常惊艳的小歌，在各个节点都能看出谱师想要表达的情绪，但仔细听歌以后会发现谱师给的配置的力道有点欠缺，比如0:36开始的键盘段落，所有键盘都落在12+的难度上，跨度过分小，并且采音缺少16分的连续音符（121或者213），所以爽感不尽人意。我在游玩的时候真的觉得玩了两个小节以后就很无聊，和站内25年的一张比真的差距比较大。看得出谱师由于积累不足所以选择了复制粘贴，将来经验更丰富后应该能写出更灵动、更带有张力的排键。
- 1:00开始的段落，简单的双押阵和简单的拍划把难度落到了12左右，可以说是写了一个明显的休息段，加上后面的扫键综合分析，这可能是个前面12+，后面有13.6左右的谱子，但扫键实际上只能视为一个处处严判的长星星，缺少复杂键盘的话并不能体会到强烈的律动感。
- 总体来说配置并没有符合这一首歌的音符，大体框架没什么问题，假以时日可以写得更好。

从头神到尾的一张谱面,配置很流畅,结构做的太完美了,谱面里塞满了能一眼看出来的小巧思,而又不至于影响主题内容,叹为观止

细节处理的非常粗糙，基本上各种地方都有很多小问题。
开头间奏处有一根很突兀的8-4-8[4:1]，我完全没听出来有什么特别的音需要这样采；同时右手在此处创造了一个1➡3的8分硬抗，后续的5很可能会右手顺势向下去接；其次采音上，前四小节在跟电吉他，后四小节转鼓，本质上没什么问题，但在68cb处6,6,5/7,,2,中间漏音，2,2,1/3,是单双采错了；
主歌161cb的7-3[2:3]是有何用意？不太清楚这歌的背景，若是neta的话也并不是此时作为谱面该有的配置，会显得非常奇怪且突兀；若是单纯为了最后的绝赞星星同时结束则更是完全没必要；251cb处的摆键略显保守，四个重拍上有一个不太明显的升调，可以根据这一点编排更好的键位；后面跟着的削弱版红叉个人感觉并不太适合，常规两个双押组成18,27即可，而且在进入副歌后也有这样的处理方式；
副歌能理解是在采人声，但并不代表就只能采人声，其中对于鼓的重拍有非常多的遗漏，而且基本上都是采上也不会破坏整体性的，比如314cb处2/4-8[8:1],的启动拍，1：10的341cb延长3h[8:3]到8：4，这些细节把控的不是很好；然后是飞手问题，歌曲的bpm很高有196，但刚进副歌314cb处就有一个4-8飞5的八分，看上去是为了这一小节的tap整体性而做，但为了一处并不是特别重要的统一而消耗掉一整段的手感并不是好的选择；其次星星速度的控制也不好，比如338cb的2/5>7[2:1],4,5>7的实际体感速度慢了，8:3就会合理许多；然后是345cb的7pp2[2:1],,,2x,2x<7[4:1],不是很理解这个星星组的用意，是有什么neta吗？不论内外这个都是一个非常难防蹭的星星组，不是neta的建议换掉，在副歌进行大位移调动的时候突然慢一下进行防蹭并不是很好玩，相对的二副就没一副这么多细节问题；
最后就是二副前的单手八分硬抗感觉可以斟酌一下，535cb按跟人声看提前了一个八分，touchhold的启动时机也不是很好，前面单手抗八分这里加强成双手抗也未尝不可，最后用hold+touchhold结尾衔接不论从观感还是手感都会优于当前的配置。
还有最后结尾的touch {4}B2,,B1,B8,B7,没听出来采的什么，采钢琴的话全偏了
总体来说写法上比较稳健，没有什么花哨的配置，基本功稍显不足，整张谱略显稚嫩但还算干净

**Me, when I see the first slide pattern : "Hehe... Pigeon head..."**

I actually really like this chart. There is something beautiful about a continuous flow of chorus and just introducing new patterns for every section of it. Your chart gives off a super dance-y feel to it that the way this chart was made, it feels like dancers taking turns presenting their moves to the song with different interpretations. It really feels like every chorus is a new experience and I really really like that.

The simplistic nature of the slides and taps allow more variety of hand positioning for the players to do. I can imagine watching someone play this chart and none of the players will have the same way to play it. It's just that unique and cool and I super dig the idea.

Overall I have no issue with the chart but I also can't say this was the best chart in the contest. I still think there could be better ways to represent the song but I am in no position as of now to say yours is wrong so I will just leave it as that. Part of me hope the chart could go on forever so I can see what could be done with this chart even more. It's like the perfect chart to do collaborations. Thank you for your hard work.

I came to an understanding that you really have lots and lots of ideas in this chart. I was able to spot them all and was absolutely in love with them. The main issue was that there was too many of them and it sort of oversaturated the entire chart. And with that many patterns it becomes a huge ball of mess that might be tedious for players to enjoy.

My suggestion is to pick the interesting ones only and leave the rest for other charts so that it at least be reasonable, acceptable in the eyes of an average 13+ enjoyer. I think the second half chorus is well used, I really like the swipe to each slide section, it feels absolutely enjoyable to nail.

Honestly, if you bump this to a 14, still, reduce the unique pattern usage (either pick the slide touch splash section in the first half as a motif or the aforementioned second half swipe slide section), up the density by just a little bit. I think it would also make a really good chart.

I do like this one a bit more than the other one though! I think that deserves a praise. Thank you for your hard work.

Jokes aside, I actually didn't really like this chart. Putting aside the fact you don't have any 18+ references (which honestly, respect), the chart plays very boringly and does not have any interesting motifs to it. At first I was interested to see more of the pattern you introduced at Combo 175 but then you just decided to not further expand on it and went with Umiyuri at the second half which I find to be extremely disappointing.

There were a few sections that feels very splashy even though perhaps it doesn't actually splash (the section starting from Combo 228 until the rest section) but if you think about it, does it really have to be done this way? I'm sure there are more interesting things to do here since it is the highlight of the song. I really think you should have make something unique out of this chart to stand out.

Despite my harsh critiques, I hope you understand that if there were points I didn't comment about just means I have no issue with it. Thank you for your hard work.

谢谢大家的回复，说实话看到如此多的意见我有些开心，也有些迷茫。
先说采音方面，在这首歌里面我有点采不出额外有新意的节奏，因此最终选择了全采人声，全曲听下来的确比较单调，我会记住多在采音上做一些变化的。而三押、V字海底谭、以及排键复杂度确实都有一些问题， 看着大家的评论我都一一做了一些调整。

非常喜欢的魔法未来曲，也是很难写的一首歌，完成度很高呀！整体……大部分段落都挺平稳的，和歌曲的契合度也不错。在研究后还是发现了一些有待改进的地方，这里想简单分享一下个人观点：
20cb  左手的顺序是`6,,7,7,6,6,5,` 6号键看似不起眼的排键，实则多出来了一个先上后下的往复位移，显得不够自然；
49cb  同音高的两下重复音，更建议做成同键位的tap双押；
53cb  这一段对于双押和单点tap的排列稍显散乱，似乎是想做递进，但是效果不太明显，看起来像是随机找了几个音放上双押；
130~152cb  个人不太建议采vocal，这里背景的电子音很显著，用全音符（每小节一拍）简单地放空就好了，到后面鼓点跟进了再采人声；
163cb  2号键可以减少第二下tap，和后面采音保持一致。另外，这段一笔画的排键稍有点紧凑了；
217cb  很漂亮的build up段落，递进效果很好，就是副歌前这一根32:1星星有点惊人；
**副歌**的表现力挺不错的，个人非常喜欢锁手hold与扫键大弧的用法，眼前一亮。然而也有一些可以改进的地方：383cb  同一个位移方向，摆成了两下双押接左起五连楼梯，感觉会有些卡手；423cb  这里的摆键又太老实了，两组同样的`3qq4,8,7,6,5-7*-1,` 甚至不需要侧身就打完了（包括后面475cb*きっと きっと*这四下都是直上直下，加点小出张也好啊！！！），想看到更具律动感的排键呢；
断线重连段的表现也不错，虽然没有料到596cb会出现类如龙配置，不过意外地挺契合；
**二副**在前面两位的评论中已经提到过，谱师偷懒啦！本该做强化的地方和一副几乎没有区别，尤其是*ずっと ずっと*这四下为啥还在直上直下？！
**尾奏**像是谱师突然想起来这是张14，开始拔高难度了。854cb  我疑惑这里为什么要把连贯的扫键拆出来一个大宇宙错位，配置有点跳跃；859cb  **全谱最费解的神秘叠键**，`3x,5h,5h,6,3x,5h,5h,6,3x,5h,5h,7,` 没有任何前置引导，凭空出现的大位移叠键，并且最难的5h叠键也没有给ex，我有些哽咽，为啥呀？！！除此之外尾杀段落其实还挺出彩的，结尾的touch扫和交互接圈很流畅地把气势撑起来了，也算是善终。
————————————————
不管怎么说，依然还是一张有趣的谱面，感谢你带来的Future Eve！^_^

开头塞的太满了！！！！！！适当的舍弃一部分音也可以的！！！！

整体配置上问题倒是不大，就是没有太多的厚度（可以多写点不一样的东西哇，多加点变化嘛，键盘什么的也可以优化一下，204的8分爬楼梯的手感真的不会特别好），同时整体采音太满了导致强度分布不太合理（开头啊休息段啊真的没必要采这么满的哇，真的要好好学一下减法了！！！）

但问题也很明显呢…配置过于单一，在递进方面做的不是很好，甚至多次出现重复，如果要说是复踏也好像有些生硬了？

695c那邊感覺配置沒上去，整體難度曲綫也不怎麽貼合歌曲
但是配置思路是很不錯的，如果後半變成連續跳音+適當的slide，繼承前半的踩音感覺一體感會更好
音色表现的非常好，采音听起来有点爽，结构还算正常。配置撑不起14+的内容量，而且是纯暴力堆砌不考虑引导，导致后面越打越吃力；歌本身属于杂乱没啥记忆点的，从创作上说就要着重考虑衔接，然而谱师在创作时太执着于表现歌曲，堆砌了太多信息量，导致没有一条逻辑清晰的线来让谱面看起来更连贯，希望赛后能多加改进，再接再厉！
谱师在压信息量这块做的可以 但是在采音上感觉压得有点过分 鼓的复杂度比谱里表现出来的要高得多 这也是一个导致整张谱没什么记忆点的原因 如果能用独到的配置体现鼓可能会好不少

通篇看下来感觉可以用基本合格但是并不出彩来形容。
首先是第一段主歌的第一段（43-92cb），采音虽然没有错，但是在背景细节更加丰富且歌曲情绪不高的情况下选择卡拉ok式采音在我看来并不是一个好的选择；93-135cb这一段前面还不错，个人认为后面的一笔画有些用力过猛，touch、tap、管子切换的手感也比较割裂；buildup的136-168cb排键有些水，副歌前（170-192cb）有铺垫还可以。
进入到第一段副歌，我认为是缺少一个让人眼前一亮的核心，它并不是说要有多么创新的配置，而是这个副歌给我看的感觉就像绿风犬三郎给那张白谱做陪衬混出来的紫谱的感觉，这么说你能理解吗；
副歌后面休息段还行，跳过；
第二段主歌的第一段注意到了背景的重音，没有一直卡拉ok是比第一段主歌好的，其他和第一段同样的问题，不再赘述；
二副基本只是在形状和摆位上做出了变化；
657的五个touchhold尾判16分押音色还可以（虽然看起来很新但是因为所有人都在用反而有些掉价），但是它们一个一个按上去的这个过程是不算很贴的；
三副依然在以变形状为主，把三段副歌放在一起就会发现其实虽然是有在做递进，但是强度和情感表现上效果不是很理想
基本框架是合格的，但是细节比较一般，继续努力！

A very fun chart! Patterns are done very well, the Eurobeat motif is fully visualized and most of all it doesn't fell redundant despite being somewhat on a longer side. Nothing wrong with the chart at all outside of a few funny slide shapes but that's just me nitpicking. This is a very very solid chart. Thank you for your hard work.
手感逼近甚至超越官谱的优秀作品，排键采音都是官味十足，我也不想说那么多废话了，总之真的玩的很爽，玩了一遍就会喜欢上的。缺陷可能就是创新性略有不足，但我觉得真的无所谓因为玩的真的很爽。总之祝取得好成绩！

写的好爽！用扫键来押pv指针的暴走贯穿了整张谱的gp，作为一张14+可玩性还是很高的（虽然显然过于暴力了）。写在了我的xp上，可惜是一张长曲，休息段给的也不算很休息，还是希望能剪一下歌最好。难点集中在中杀和尾杀，一副很有意思的配置也只用了一次，前后递进做的不是很好，有些可惜。
一副的扫+星星用的绝赞启动手感有点炸裂，个人感觉可以给一个保护

谢谢！在谱曲相关的问题上我认为歌曲的高潮段落是需要用合适的配置进行强调的，而且我确实自认为在配置的选择上也是以一种合适的方式表现了这首歌（题外话：其实这首歌是在讲“不合适”的一个故事，17岁的少年的强烈情感是由词和曲共同表现的，推荐去看看词！（搓手））
关于造音的问题，我有一点稍微没有能理解你的评论（对不起），你说的是希望副歌减少造音，但是却举了一个主歌的例子，不知道是不是表述上有一些失误？关于这一处本身的话，当然，我尊重你的意见；不过个人认为这一处的扫还是比较适合的，我觉得你或许可以关掉key音再细听一下是否有更合适的选择！
总之非常感谢长评哦！会继续加油

整张谱看起来就像是为了副歌这碗醋包的饺子，最大的问题还是在采音思路上，请继续加油！

实测打下来的一些观点：感觉一副的星星过于容易蹭，在配置密度本就不低的情况下很抵消游玩时的爽感。相比起来二副的处理我会喜欢很多，绝赞交互对鼓点的强调做得不错。间奏段的bbb配置强度过高了，不太契合音乐氛围，可以把星星删去。972cb的touch圈实际速度是前面扫键的一半，打起来有些寸止感。不过910cb的反手交互很有记忆点，我喜欢。
总的来说还不错，但是还需在结构和细节上做一些改进。

A friend suggested this chart to me, telling me that it is really good. After watching it with them, I'm sorry to say but I was a bit disappointed.

Don't get me wrong, **this chart is absolute perfection** on a technical standpoint. There is absolutely nothing wrong with it. The design, structure, motifs, references, placement etc. are all done with care. So much so, that if I would to play this on cab, I would occasionally pick this for my wife just so we could enjoy the song while playing along.

That is where the negative aspect of the chart comes in. *The chart is carried by the song**, the song is really really good, so much so that you are forced to not overchart, not overpresent your ideas and also forced to use reference to represent the song. You as a charter know that if you try to do any of the points above, it would be disrespectful to the composer and song. Which is why I think you failed to actually **failed to do what you are supposed to do in this contest which is to present an idea.**

Perhaps I'm the only one who sees the contest as a presentation contest and not a 'who plays the best' contest but I really wished I was able to see what you, as a charter are able to design an absolutely unique style. Only then I would have been able to actually reward you for creativity. With the way it is, what you achieve is just a 'perfect chart that anyone can make after a few practices'.

Thank you for listening to my ramblings. I have high hopes for you in the future and I wish I could see what is the best that you can do. Thank you for your hard work.

先说优点吧，整张谱面层次很清晰，谱师想要表达的东西也基本上算是明了，结合留言和谱师名义，自然就是一张用 **红+蓝** 去做核心的谱面，事实上谱面内也含有很多红蓝相关的配置。除此之外，谱面的结构也基本完整，没有出现太多完全不适合的配置，算是达到了及格分。用 touch 和 tap 区分人声的写法我也很喜欢。

接下来我可能要说一些个人认为的可以改进的地方，望您谅解。

1.我注意到您在谱面文件中使用了{256}，然而大括号里面的数字一般都需要是 384 的因数，这并不是一个扣分点，但还请您注意。

2.开头的 16:3 错位和歌曲的贴合有待商酌，我认为强度明显过高，即使加了套也不太好这么写。

3.680 combo 处，{32}8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1,8b,,{16}7, 是否需要再重新考虑一下排键？

4.谱面整体使用的伪双压过多，我能理解为了 neta 而少量使用，然而过多的使用难免带来喧宾夺主之感。

5.有两段副歌，但第二段基本是第一段副歌的复制粘贴，或许直接剪掉一部分会更好？现有的配置几乎无法撑起一张三分钟的谱面，您觉得呢？

6.在后段，您使用了4-1[8:1]*-1b[8:1] 这样的 slide，我能理解您想表现的是红蓝叠加，但很遗憾，前面的4-1会变成黄色，组合就变成橘色了，这也不是扣分点，只是对阁下善意的提醒。

把一个疯批音乐写得如此不疯批实在是太养胃了，或许可以考虑再疯一点。当然了，这样做也不是要求再增加采音或者是配置难度，只要让谱面再难读懂一点就能做到足够好的效果。比如1137cb开始的键盘段（包括前面类似部分）不需要这么大的位移，可以考虑将一些tap改为32分短hold（参考KOM5的breakcore WTF），或者直接在touch上大放烟花。

Man... without the PV this chart kinda doesn't hit as hard.. especially the beginning.

You know what, this chart can work with half BPM. I was really iffy with it at first but after seeing the chorus, I was convinced. Good call I really think you know your shit. The execution though... a bit yikes...

The main concept of your chart was to use the slides to indicate a peak in the vocals. I think you did a rather good job on it as every slide in the chart was telegraphed very well and offered a good feeling whenever the player hits it. Every slide was placed with a purpose and that alone is already a really really good thing to see in a half BPM chart.

My main issue is that the most unique part of your chart (Combo 310) is a less fun version of the official chart of Sand Planet. That really disappointed me because when a chart has their most memorable moment of a chart to be a memorable moment of another chart is honestly a huge failure in chart design. If this was an actual game company and you submitted this to me, I would brand it as plagiarism of the worst kind. Obviously this is just a fun little event so we chill. :3

I think there are some cooler ways to position the slides better. Honestly something like `{16}6-8[8:1]/3,,5-1[8:1],2,6,,5,,6` would still play find here. It allows more dynamic hand position especially when the next iteration would just require a single tap to stray away from the Sand Planet pattern.

I suggest you find some inspiration in this contest and hopefully you would be able to understand what are good patterns and what are not instead of reusing existing ones. At least that way, you would stray away from Maimai charting and move closer towards Maimai **fanchart** charting. Thank you for your hard work.

## 一、配置性 —— 局部贴歌，但存在节奏与信息量问题

> 233–237cb 这段写得挺贴歌的，整体有一定的设计感。

- `do-o-ka, do-o-ka` 配合左右手划慢星星，呈现出悠扬的听感
- 510–630cb 按理说这么写没问题，但紧接着的配置信息量过大
- 711cb 处张度偏大，767–786cb 反应门槛较高，即使带 EX 也较难跟上

不过，从 **13+ 的难度定位** 来看：
> 大扫圈接 `pq` 星星的组合略显不合理，且 200–233cb 情感推进偏快，虽可接受但不太建议。

另外在结构层面：
> 衔接逻辑存在一定的不合理性，段落过渡尚有优化空间。

---

## 二、游玩性 —— 手感尚可，初见杀偏重

> 整体打下来不赖，手感还可以。

- 谱面与乐曲的配合度尚可，没有明显违和感
- 对多数玩家而言具备基本的可操作性

**需要注意的地方：**
- 如配置性中提到的几个段落，**初见杀特征明显**
- 需要提前记忆关键位置，否则容易：
  - 掉 Tap
  - 提前蹭掉星星

Oh lord... it's this song. There be references in this one... And there is no PV... I'm out. This chart is unplayable now.

Jokes aside, I think you did a decent job with the chart. The PV actually offers nothing to the chart since you almost had no obvious references at all in this one... Which honestly is a huge fucking disappointment because this is the one chart that really could use some unserious moments. But hey I respect the decision to treat it like a proper chart so I have to take it for what it is.

The chart really suffers from the same issue most people have and that is **This is a 13+ chart that only the charter knows what the intended method is**. I took me several replays to understand how the chorus is supposed to work. I keep thinking if I was supposed to change my hand or have my hand go under the other to know what the actual playstyle is. I think as a charter who charts at an intended difficulty, it is extremely important to chart with the idea that it was meant to be for the target audience it is made for. I could sort of tell this is a 13.6 to a 13.7 but the hand positioning is very unforgiving.

Combo 225 hand switch... why? Was that really necessary? I really did not think I was supposed to swap my hands there. Could use some telegraphing because most people would imagine the hands would take turns hitting the screen but because you introduced the touches, I would imagine we are supposed to use the same hand to hit the slide. This is what I mean by unreasonable patterning.

On the bright side, Combo 525 is pretty good. I like the spin to the slow break slide, feels very fitting for the song.

All in all, you tried your best but you still have a long way to go. I hope you will learn a lot in this contest. Thank you for your hard work.

This chart is really interesting. There are quite a couple of unreasonable hand placement that I can't exactly agree on but I can see the vision of the charting.
- Combo 358 has some slight ill telegraphed hand positioning during the slide+tap section.
- Combo 429 plays quite uncomfortably.
- Combo 512 is very much a skill issue but I think this can be easily fixed with replacing some taps with 128:1 holds for easier hand positioning guidance.

Overall your chart has a note density of a Master 13 chart but a hand positioning of a Re:Master 14 chart, which I really like the concept of. I think with some guidance and arrangement of notes, this has a potential to be an actual technical chart for seasoned players.

I really love the chorus motif, the idea of having chain slides in such a section actually makes this a very unique chart that would fit very well within the charting sphere. There are some very questionable slide shapes that makes the slide move too fast but I think if you polished some of them, I think this could be really cool.

As much as I can see the potential in this chart, based on the note placement in this chart I can tell you are still quite new to charting and you still have a long way to go. Perhaps you haven't had enough feedback to grow so I hope this contest can be a good learning experience for you. Thank you for your hard work.

A very cute song from beginning to end. I especially enjoyed Combo 248 with the hand switch during the slides, I think that was really well telegraphed and enjoyable.

There is an overall hand switching problem with the first half of the chart that I'm not fond of.
- Combo 84 and the following variations has a very awkward placement for the each taps. I think you can use the empty space at 7,8,1,2, to give more movement for the taps here. Doing this also prevents some overly cross hand placement (for example right hand at 6 after slide and left hand on 4).
- Combo 145 doesn't really need to be hand switching for the slide to touch with left hand, feels a bit extra. Also to add on, since one hand is pretty absent during the holds, would like if there is an each hold moment here so the other hand has something to do.
- Combo 158 hand switch for slides feels a bit redundant as well. Instead of `{8}5v7[8:1],3,1v3[8:1],7,` you could just do `{8}4v2[8:1],7,5v7[8:1],3,`.

Other than that, the second half is flawless. It's really the awkward hand placement in the first half I have an issue with. Thank you for your hard work.

108cb  这里为了采音色写了两组hold双押，但小节开头同音色的双押是tap，并没有形成统一。
157cb  虚空采了二连子弹，似乎想做某种加强，但后面两小节却选择了采人声，再后又突然不采人声了，而是用一个很大的双押扫结束这一段落。这里形成了很明显的采音混乱，音轨切换太过随意。
503cb  这里用长星星和hold带过有点不太合适，背景音还有很多音色可以用来过渡，因为后面紧接的是毫无预兆的双押三纵接扫（个人认为有点过分了），难免会对玩家造成jump scare。
624cb  意图应该是左手5432扫完顺势把2<4星星带掉，但是右手并没有给出引导要去做什么，或许就惯性思维在原地等着接2<4。改进也不难，例如在左手扫的开头补一个15双押可能就会好不少。
675cb  右手扫接反手双押（还带绝赞），有点恶趣味，后面还复用了一次。这样的配置信息量还是较大的，很难临场反应。
以上只是对部分细节提出的建议，希望谱师可以多多优化谱面，继续加油^_^

A very very cool concept for a Re:Master chart for an existing song in the game. I really enjoyed this one and the patterns during the first half chorus is super super fun. The second half is not as enjoyable but it was still really satisfying to hit. A couple of things:
- Not making the slides chain at Combo 277 is an odd choice. I can see how it would be better if the slide was 8:1 before moving the other slide so I think there is some adjustments that is needed to be done here. This applies to the other variations.
- The instrumental section in the middle is **not a 13+ pattern**. This is definitely not something a casual player will expect to play when they see a chart at this difficulty. As cool as it is, there is a decision issue here where this type of pattern is used at the wrong difficulty or chart. The density is fine but there is a need to either 'make the other sections harder' or 'make this easier'. I prefer the earlier.
- Add on to the fact the second half is not as enjoyable, it is mainly because the first half hand positioning is really cool, it makes the second half variation a bit boring in comparison. Perhaps some adjustment here would be nice.

The main issue I have with the chart is the difficulty balancing in this. Other than that, I think you made a really really interesting and fun chart. Great job! Thank you for your hard work.

Good effort trying to chart the full song. Its a shame that you aren't able to deliver a good impression with the chart. The opening had some very questionable hand positioning (namely the arrow slide to the each hold). The chorus is rather simplistic and the middle quiet section of the song does not offer anything that would imply the song would have been better when charted as a whole.

Usually full length charts are done the way they are because the whole song offers something new every minute. If the song is just repeating itself from first half to second half without an interesting bridge pattern or a unique second half switch up, it would really feel like we have just wasted our time on it.

Thank you for your hard work.

完成度非常高而且个人非常喜欢的一张谱，可以把我下面的个人意见里没有提到的部分都默认为非常喜欢。长评写的不多，大多数意见可能都显得有些吹毛求疵，请理解

412-429cb的一段配置感觉不是很贴，歌曲没有和前面表现出很显著的包括鼓组上和人声上的变化，但是却用了连续八分双押接扫的一个递进，感觉过渡的效果确实得到了实现，但是个人觉得会有更加完美的解法，而且前面400cb几个break星星头押的音色也丢失了
475cb的改启动感觉没有做到非常完美的效果，因为实际上接下来的几个四分人声会比较让人觉得并没有改启动（导致直接划），其实来几个短弧左右划两下，再接一个普通的wifi，并没有丢失要表现的内容，同时也会减少一些人对于此处的诟病（个人并不认为这是一个很大的问题）
477cb有股tictactoe的味道，不知道是不是借鉴的那里，但是确实效果上不是很令人满意。tictactoe的touch扫和后面的ppqq是同样的顺时针圈，这样可以表现出一个比较连贯的长音色，但这里使用了一个反转，这个反向的点和萨克斯的音高变化的时机并没有很好地契合，就导致观感和手感（个人）都不是很尽人意
735cb没有选择采那一串人声可能有一些可惜，个人可能会愿意用单hold来作一点区分的同时和巩固一下整体的结构和采音逻辑，也更好地做一个进二副的铺垫

**WAIT WAIT I ACTUALLY ENJOY THIS SO MUCH HAHAHAHA I WAS STRAIGHT UP LAUGHING WITH JOY PLAYING ALONG TO THIS**

There is just something about the simplicity of the chart that makes this super enjoyable. The constant uses of each taps, the slight variation in increasing the note density and the somewhat unfair jacks make this a really enjoyable moment for me. I can't believe I am going to have to give a pretty high score for a chart that looks like this~

Couple of things to point out first.
- Combo 27 touches and the following variation is too thick. I think relying on just two touches is enough so it doesn't overload the screen and overlap with the coming taps.
- Combo 159 C touches overlaps a bit too much, I think spreading them out here is fine.
- Combo 215 to 247 and the following variation at the back has some very very unforgiving break note placement. I think just making them jacks here is much more forgiving for the players. Especially because it pairs well with the coming section with the really disgusting jacking note placement (which is something I really like about this chart).
- Overall touch usage are too thick. Reducing the density with them would make this cleaner.
- Some slides feel like 16:1 or 12:1. Regardless if were used or not, some moments slides move way too fast than I anticipated, clearly made from someone who is still quite new to charting.

Ignoring the unforgiving stamina especially with a long song, I really enjoyed this chart a lot. Thank you for making my day and thank you for your hard work.

P.S. I think this chart is a (*checks Argent Symmetry Re:Master*) Master 14.1, Mr. 譜面-100号.

整体上看得出是很有想法的铺面，但是手顺设计和引导做的仍需考量。除了副歌段手感和引导还算及格外，大部分的地方都没有思考过如何合理引导手顺，玩家游玩的时候很容易打出穿模的感觉，甚至有些地方直觉上得管子换着手才能打下去。谱师最好在铺面完成之后上手对屏幕测一下引导，不然写出来的铺面就会很小玻璃了。
此外在采音和难度分配方面也还需要努力，开头的音采的很满难度也起的有点高，到后面反而因为采音点少没什么难度提升空间了，这种难度分配是不合理的。
排键稍稍有点乱，跳拍一直在采人声有点枯燥了，跳拍歌对于采音的要求还是不小的，可以听听背景音，按节奏来试着采采，可能可以在采音上做到结构的区分。能感受得到谱师跃动的写法，不过还能做得更好，加油。

您好，两组双押黄星星的双倍时值一方面是为了契合歌曲情感，一方面是为了给尾端的剪刀星星做防蹭缓冲，是刻意为之，我不认为这里有什么问题
副歌使用了大量的半扫和省音，用于构造特殊配置以烘托芭蕾舞曲缓慢的舞动感，在保证谱面信息量不超标的前提下，我认为这是一个必然的取舍结果，不属于问题
本张谱面属于长曲目，间奏的音色也非常丰富，当然就需要在歌曲情感高潮使用复杂度和力度适中但采音密度足够的扫键配置来支撑，同时这也符合舞曲的张扬感。至于谁更显眼，仍然是副歌的复杂度更高一些吧......
虽然感谢您的点评，但我实然无法认同其中的部分观点，谢谢。

Pretty interesting use of concepts. I like that you tried various motifs here.
- The slide to hold next tap with the same hand is a cool touch, perhaps need some refining as its confusing on sight read.
- The chorus is cool. I'm a sucker for those type of concepts. Perhaps would be nice if there was more variety of slide shape instead of tap positions.
- The back and forth slide is an interesting decision during the bridge. It is very 'Official' but lacks creativity and originality.

I think it's still a solid chart. I would love to play this one day. Thanks for your hard work!

作为一个从来没听过这首曲子的玩家，我对这张谱的初见体验十分一言难尽，这可能会导致我对这张谱的判断有些偏颇。首先，整首曲子的bpm极高，而我个人认为这种超高bpm的星星配置应该在开头有一些提示和引入，类似于齿轮天堂开局几个秒划星星一样。而本谱面开局的长条却没有很好的反映这个速度，以及像46cb启动的这条星星和前面无启动拍给人的手感差别又很大，导致这两段星星几乎没有起到对于高bpm的适应效果。而全曲出现的大量子弹配置更是把突脸写满了谱面，尤其是副歌例如394cb的几下以及526cb（左手刚秒划完直接回手接四连），副歌毫无提示突然出现的高速扫键，还有像826cb的右手纵连突脸我都不想说，和前面大位移的扫键体感大相径庭，让人感觉你是不是真怕被玩家第一段副歌搞懂配置了突脸不到玩家了？
但是相应地，在游玩一两次熟悉了配置之后，这张谱面的手感会相对改善不少，甚至可以说玩起来还有点享受，只不过这一切都要建立在玩家看到你13+（诈称）的难度跑进来后没有被初见狂暴鸿儒后放弃的前提之上。我对这张谱唯一的建议是：该标14咱就标14吧。

这个真不错！整体结构很分明，主歌内容量也很合适，副歌律动感耶很强，而且三段副歌都各有递进，二副星星长度加了，律动感更强，结尾更在前边的基础上加上一条星星，律动感更强了！让我想起了官谱的终焉逃避行，我很喜欢这种的拍划，感觉很棒！非常好玩而且贴歌！而且谱面四散着很多谱师的一些小巧思，看上去坑人但是谱师又贴心的加了保护套，贴歌好玩而且适当的降低了难度，打起来也很不错。开头的三个touchhold我很喜欢，对情绪的表达很棒！但是紧接着的两个我就不是很满意了(当然这也只能说我自己不太喜欢，其实没什么毛病？)，主歌的touch表现的很不错，那种悄悄话的感觉，很棒。还有前后的管子加二连短扫，我感觉很不错！有想法！我很喜欢这个！锁手管子加星星的部分也很贴曲子，写的很棒！

这张谱面有个不错的优点就是采音比较清爽舒服，但最糟糕的也是除了采音没有什么值得一提的了。
整张谱面最大的问题是让人摸不清楚核心玩法，除了前面200cb还算有比较明显的写谱思路外，后面的结构都非常松散，打一遍下来几乎没有什么记忆点；其次谱面难度递进也做的不够明显，一遍下来几乎难度没什么变化，没办法让玩家感受到谱师对音乐的情感变化。
最后点两处内无小毛病：642cb的3^5以及749cb的2^5一笔画。

A very pretty song with very pretty looking patterns. I really like that you didn't try to ramp up the difficulty and kept the same vibe throughout the song. It is after all a very emotional song and I can feel you paid a lot of respects to the song as well, great work.

There are two issues I would like to point out and they might entangle with each other so I hope you understand where I am coming from.
- The hand switching is a bit overused and at the same time not telegraphed properly. Combo 7 starts with the left hand on 5 and continues to move at 6 to 7, the issue with this is that the right hand is left vacant. It is not ideal since during an emotional song such as this, you want to constantly be in the flow. Having one hand doing nothing feels like a brake in the system. This continues at Combo 20 and onwards. Combo 329 as well because the right hand is suppose to slide 4 to 5 but another slide appears at 4 as well which is ill telegraphed.
- This also brings us to another issue which is there are too much slides and chain slides. It is possible to give the same feeling with less slides. Holds are an underutilised tool that most charters forgot about. They work wonders to telegraph hand positioning.  Combo 448 and Combo 473 are some of the chain slides where I think makes the song makes it more of a challenge run rather than keeping its calmness. What these sections tells me is that the charter is putting chain slides to fill in the empty space rather than maintaining song representation. Which is why I think holds would be a much better tool in this chart.

Despite my statements, I still quite enjoy the chart for what it is and I think you showed lots of your ideas in the chart was done relatively decent. You have room to grow, which proves you have potential, so keep improving. Thank you for your hard work.
说实话从开头锁手hold到后面的16分扫键的配置还可以，但是最最最大的问题是没有待在这些配置该呆在的地方。开头锁手hold的特征点很足但相比副歌星星错位＋8分单点反而又孱弱下去了。在采音方面也存在人声钢琴采混的问题，官谱《回る空うさぎ》的结构与采音可以稍微学习一下在不同曲线上采哪些音会比较好。

This... is hard to comment on.

I think you did a good job with hand positioning and telegraphing them for a song with a low BPM such as this. But there are some really questionable decisions that I was not able to understand.
- Combo 95 is the first of many jumps that I was not prepared for. Usually low BPM charts such as this do not use a lot of jumps since they would become 'jump'scares. Left hand on 7 and suddenly require to jump to 4 without any indication that there WOULD be jumps is pretty awkward.
- Another section for example is Combo 307 which is another common motif of jumpiness. The pattern `{8}3,4,6,5,7,` is a very confusing hand positioning moment for songs at this low BPM. There is no intended hand movement but if done wrongly, would cause another jumpscare for different type of players. I for one would have RH 3 > LH 4 > LH 6 > RH 5 > LH 7 which doesn't feel like the intended method so it feels quite sudden.
- Combo 697 up until right before the endkill feels like filling up on empty space without much thought put into it. Was hoping to see an interesting patterning or a tricky note placement as a form of unique identity. Perhaps it's a sign of running out of steam or ideas for the ending, which is something most charters including me would understand.

Nitpicks that do not effect the scoring:
- I would have slide Combo 263 with my left hand. Low BPM charts usually allow freedom of hand placement so to suddenly see a sticky hand placement such as this is not within my muscle memory. Let's just chalk this up to skill issue on my end.
- Combo 281, DX charts usually do slides like this because they would change one of the slides to break slides for visual appreciation. Since yours is a STD chart, this just feels a little extra to me. Feels like a small child-like attempt to be cute.

Overall, I was not able to appreciate the chart because of some difference in decision making. I also can't really call this a good chart because looking past all of that, it feels like a very normal chart to me. I hope you were able to appreciate my comments and please understand there was no ill intentions from my end. I have utmost respect to all contest participants. Let's continue to improve together. Thank you for your hard work,

By making a re:master of an already existing chart in the game, I expect to see a different musical representation and innovative, unique ideas. However, the density of this chart feels very forced, something that shouldn't be done for an emotional song like this.

There are some awkward note positionings, like combo 129, where the player's right hand has to jump from 4 to 1 in a 16th note duration.

The patterns (especially slides) are also placed somewhat randomly, without a rigid structure that follows the song. A lot of patterns are also recycled from existing charts without any reason.

The very end seems to be the only good thing about this chart. Let's keep improving!

I do appreciate you for coming up with innovation to fit the criteria of a charting contest. But you might have mistaken. A charting contest doesn't mean you are to present all your ideas in a box and only create unique patterns. To me, it's something closer to 'Game Design' where you are to create a chart that is made for the intended audience to play. Which is why charting with the intention of maintaining a reasonable gameplay for the wider audience is more important than 'unique ideas'. Hope this helps.

You know what, I don't care what anyone else's say. Despite it's major flaws, **I absolutely love this chart.**

The density of the chart, the pay off after every section and the way you pick the sounds to do the respective sections, a lot of major things that makes a chart fun, you pulled it off. I have so much enjoyment playing along with this and in my head I just kept thinking how this is so much better than the official chart. The keyboarding is incredibly satisfying.

There are some very glaring issues, I will keep it brief.
- Combo 184 slide is not very well positioned as the hand crosses in a weird position. I understand how it works but it feels very awkward.
- Combo 95 is also a consistent motif where the cross hand of the slide hand and the tap hand is not good. I don't think thats a good way to end a section while moving on to a standard section. I prefer if you move the second tap to a more comfortable position.

Lastly, a personal opinion: **Just remove the ex breaks, increase the density by a bit, and make it a 14.* I think this is one of those times it can be justified. Thank you for your hard work.

这个是写完之后的提前叠甲，我在评论的时候没有看别人的评论，写完之后看了一遍发现意见都比较统一，如果你觉得你自己写的没问题那就不会这么多人都指出来。
先总结问题：第一是排键实在有点太土了，根本没有贴合这首跳拍歌的美感，纯是14+的数值，第二是星星的笔画也很无聊，明明你都做了Bpm减半了，画一些更有意思的星星而不是纯粹的直线摆铺。第三就是你配置结构做的实在需要进一步强化，一主和一副就能明显反应你的根本就是想到哪里写哪里。你的配置提升也是没有做到根据歌曲结构的变化该升升，该一样一样，看了好几遍谱子感觉下来就是完全的想到哪写哪，拍划段每次都能写出不一样的，还写不出记忆点。
正文：
会场难得一见的术力口14+，仔细一看原来是arc的，在arc的基础上减半了bpm，暂且不评价这个行为单纯看谱，觉得作为14+的质量确实有点低了。

1、开头的7^2和8p4的组合在开头显得有点不明意义，其一有8/2左手抬手和星星轨迹遮挡，其二不管作为一张14+还是什么，在这个歌里面都起的有点高，开头就给这么大的信息量的小配置并不合适。
2、一主开头的排键有点土，没有营造出歌曲应该有的调皮和swing感，拍划也集中在3/7号键，和黏住了一样。采音方面也是在人声和钢琴互相切换，实在太生硬了。后续采音也是同理，红蓝一笔画的采音很卡拉OK，而且还藏了{24}7/3<6[24:4],,,,,6<1b[0.3704##0.2963]的修改了启动拍。。
3、{24}5b/7b,,4,6,,6, 4,,4,2,,2,又是典型的黏手段，后续左右反十字跳拍的设计感觉把我和砧板上的鱼翻来翻去。后续216cb之后的采音我楞是没听懂你的采音。明明歌曲形式变了你还在采十字跳拍。后续还有人声和跳拍采音全混在一起的采音形式，实在是乱的要命。
后续的八分拍划总觉得拍划可以有更好的渐进方式，用单纯的拍划实在浪费。
4、一副的430cb的{24}3h[24:3],。。额。。不太想评价这个，丑又丑还坑初见，把星星形状换一个pq,Hold换个地方会比较合理，拖长音用绝赞星星就以及够了。
5、439cb的{24}6,,4,5,,3, 4-6[24:3],,2,1-3[24:3],,3,  大哥大哥你内无了，2不及时抬起和1会导致星星足够被3号按一下绿掉。而且这个配置真的丑完了，真的有点不太理解为什么要在这里写个侧身的星星阵配置。
6、后续一副的星星阵之前的重复段我感觉楞是没看到任何一个重复的配置，那这个重复段的意义是在干什么？你之前不是写的星星一笔画吗？这里怎么变成蓝黄了？？而且{24}4,,4,2,,2, 8<5[24:3],,8,5-1[24:3],,, 4/8,,,又是这种黏的不行的配置，一看就看出来谱师的排键水平还需要多练。

There are some huge note placement here that I am not happy with. Before I get into it, I think the constant use of the motif at Combo 1 to 12 is fine, in fact, I think it's pretty good.
- Combo 48 with the right hand at 4 and left hand on 1 is very demanding.
- Combo 66 with the right hand at 5 while the left hand has to move from 8 to 6 is not only very sudden but potentially visual blocking.
- Combo 78 5,6,7,8, holds and Combo 108 7,6,5,4,3,2,1, holds is not good. As much as I understand DX mechanics allow swipes to treat them all as perfect, but the intended method is way too high of a bar to work with. **If a pattern requires cheesing to make it work, it's not a good pattern.**
- Hand positioning at Combo 240 and Combo 330 is not telegraphed well. It took me 3 repeats to understand you are supposed to switch your hand for the slides and not use the same hand to slide. I believe once you had better telegraphing with each taps, this section will be much smoother to play.

These are not just minor nitpicks but very glaring issues I find with the chart. There is the intend of trying something new and interesting with the chart but none of them really stick for me. I appreciate your effort but I believe there is much room of improvement here. Thank you for your hard work.

## 一、配置性问题
### 1. 72–74cb —— 亮点

> 这三个 `touch hold` 用得不错，后续的 `th` 也很贴切。

---

### 2. 95–98cb —— 反直觉设计

> 这两组慢扫下来，对于 99cb 的交互，很多时候玩家会**处理成扫**。

- 导致下一组交互**很大概率会打成反手**
- 这部分比较反直觉，可以注意一下

---

### 3. 星星写法 —— 整体有待斟酌

> 这张谱的星星用得**都有待斟酌**。

- 建议多参考官谱的星星写法去提升
- 个人推荐：**187cb 左右以后**去踩背景的 `clap` 音

---

### 4. 208cb 开始的星星 —— 问题最大

> 这俩星星**手感上非常不协调**。

---

### 5. 427cb 开始的星星 —— 写法不佳

> `"呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呼呜↓呜↑"` 这组星星写法并不好。

**改进建议：**

> 可以试试做点**错位后接折返**之类的设计。
> 475cb 这串星星也不好。

---

### 6. 687–694cb —— 结尾双扫存疑

> 为什么曲子快结束了会有这组**双扫**？

---

## 二、游玩性问题

> 这谱面带来的手感上也是**很割裂的**。

- 游玩过程**并不连贯**
- 也**并不舒服**

| 踩音 | 前半一般，后半思路转变后整体欠佳 |

## 改进建议

- 优化 95–98cb 的反直觉配置，避免玩家误判
- 整体提升星星写法的质量，多参考官谱
- 调整 208cb 星星的手感协调性
- 重做 427cb 及 475cb 的星星段落，尝试错位+折返
- 明确 687–694cb 双扫的存在意义或予以替换
- 增强整体段落的连贯性，减少割裂感

This is so much fun! Not only is the chart fun, I can feel the charter having fun charting this as well.

I really the constant break motif and how it really is just an upbeat chart. The references are perfectly understood and the cross hand swipe to double slide at Combo 509 was fucking Chef's kiss. Everything about this chart is just a straight up bop.

Two things I want to point out that really isn't a huge issue but to me I think these sections can be elevated.
- The cross hand 7-1-3-5 slide at Combo 325 feels a bit too dynamic for my taste, especially at a chart where crosshand was hardly a concept except for the section Combo 509 as mentioned. But that one was so well telegraphed that it made this specific part really weird to me. I think you can just focus on stamina instead and leave the crosshand to just that one section (like Goodbye Sengen you know what I mean?)
- I think the 123 Gensokyou w slide might be a bit too repetitive. I suggest you could increase the stakes by either mirroring or gradually add more breaks. If not, it just feels like the chart is being stagnant while the song is building up to something.

Thank you for your hard work.

Thanks for your helpful advice and recognition of my gimmicks. I'll revise my chart based on some of your advice after the contest.

For a song with the length of an Anisong, I think you did your best to make it stand out. I personally did not enjoy the chain sliders in this chart particularly. It doesn't really look that appealing and it doesn't feel like it adds any value to the chart. If anything, it affects the scoring because they feel pretty awkward to hit. I fear this is one of the situation where if you focus on simple slides and fun crosshand positioning, it would make it much better.

Thank you for your hard work.

Nonetheless, thank you for your hard work.

Combo 48, I don’t think this layout raises the difficulty at this BPM. It’s actually designed to guide body rhythm and natural hand movement.
Combo 66, your line of sight will naturally stay near key 5 while your right hand is playing it, so the double notes on key 6 can be read perfectly clearly.
I think Combo 78 is fine in terms of difficulty. Combo 108 is indeed a little tough, but it becomes manageable after memorizing the pattern. Having to rely on cheesing might be a matter of personal skill rather than a flawed chart design. I also arranged it this way to better match the song’s timbre and musical feel.
Combo 240 and 330 are made to be memorable pattern landmarks. Even if you miss them the first time, you’ll get them down easily once you understand the layout. Besides, using the same hand for both slides would be really awkward and uncomfortable. Following the nearest-hand principle, switching hands should be the most intuitive way to play this section.
Thanks your feedback.

像是新人的作品。歌曲bpm偏低，可采的音不是很多，怎样合理的设计配置便成了谱师需要多考虑的地方。下面提几个这张谱存在的问题：
做到了配置复用，但整体来看仍缺少核心。排键较为随意，一些段落配置并不是很贴合歌曲，有种想到哪写到哪的感觉。段落难度变化较大，整张谱除去类似299cb难度突增的部分和结尾的“情感调动”，难度大概在12—12+左右，而结尾的轴双压对于13+来说过难了。
几处短touch hold的使用有些刻意，
104cb 划完星星左手立刻飞回去接7654，手感不是很好，若要这样采音的话排键还需再斟酌；

This charter is a brat and needs correction. 💢💢💢

Okay. Honestly, I really fuck with the ideas. The whole chart plays on references and they work really well with the song if I put aside the playability. The most memorable section would be Combo 755 where the hand waves back and forth. I thought even though that feels absolutely illegal, I really like small things like this because it shows that the charter had so much fun charting this song.

I think if I want to comment about this, I would strictly say that **If you plan to chart a meme chart, at least make it a visually appealing chart**. Most of the sections in your chart looks good but there are some I feel could be charted prettier. If I would to pick out a few; Combo 251 slide is too complicated; Combo 387 is very fucked up (Which honestly, probably was intentional so this is somewhat acceptable); Combo 642 star slide can look nicer etc.

In the end, some people prefer to chart solely for fun and that is ABSOLUTELY the correct way to do it. If it's too serious then the chart becomes too calculative and heartless. With that in mind, I will just say... I hate you, but I love you.

Thank you for your hard work.

For a 14+, this feels very unbalanced. Let me start by going according to your length.

Combo 105 with the crosshand tap over the hold, despite being perfectly legal, is extremely unforgiving even for a 14+. Unless it's an ex, I really don't think you should do this in a Standard chart.

Combo 253 is where I noticed most of your slide speed is way too fast. There has to be a way to adjust the chart in a way where your slide doesn't zoom across the screen like that. I suggest adjusting the slide speed and rearrange the taps.

Combo 361 is the only interesting thing about your chart up until the very ending. This is a fine pattern to do and it does work quite well with the chart. Ignoring the unreasonableness of the slide and tap having 16th timing in a Standard chart with no ex, the fact this was only used once and never again with a different variation for the second half is absolutely baffling. Why is this only used once while the second half is just back to basic charting? That kind of pissed me off.

Regarding the ending at Combo 1438 onwards however, fuck it, if it's cool and works, then it's fine. I don't think there is any issue with wanting to do a 14.9 ending. The problem however lies in the fact your chart only plays like a 14.9 twice while the rest of the chart is 14.2 at most. There is a clear issue with difficulty balancing and much to learn on how to give a chart a sense of completeness. **If the chart is going to be dense as fuck, then make the whole thing dense as fuck. Let it rip. **

Overall, you clearly made this chart to throw out your enjoyment and have fun with it. I will not take that away from you and I hope you have the most fun during the contest. I genuinely salute you for doing something as daring as this. Thank you for your hard work.

miku动作真的太难还原了，但不还原又不符合我写这张谱面的目的，所以最终结果是一个可能比较拙劣的管子配置。
三段miku的舞蹈都是先双手引导到一边交叉手（左8右6或右1左3），然后进行不换手的反复平移，最终再进行交叉换手（从左8右6换到左7右1再换回来，或者右1左3换到右2左8反复交叉），后面的换手设计游玩时不遵循换手的顺序也不会有手顺的错误，毕竟这只是设计出来的还原pv手顺，只是其中的一个玩法而已，大家玩的开心就行，我就很满足了。
还有大家应该都发现了：lemon=无保护套hold，melon=保护套hold，cookie=保护套绝赞hold了吧。

虽然整张谱面在配置的手顺设计基本没什么毛病，但整体上给人感觉很乏味，很缺乏亮眼的地方。此外问题更大的地方是整张谱面的（采音）难度结构没有做好很好的规划：
开头～76cb这段处理的很常规，甚至设计了各种小换手拉足了玩家对后面的期望值。
然后，76cb后进入主歌段开始采了人声，和前面的鼓点采音无法流畅衔接，反而把期望拉回去了，这段虽然写的配置松散点其实问题也不算太大。
然后198cb出现一个大圈touch扫，歌曲在这里情感提了起来，这个配置也把玩家的期望重新提了上去，这点没问题，问题在于touch圈后面的副歌采音一下子低了下去，只使用fes星星来采一些人声，其他音符的采音点比开头还弱，在情感这么高昂的一段副歌这样写一下子把谱面结构干拉垮了。这段一直到380cb才有一些比较合理的采音，但405cb开始强度又弱下去了。
461cb开始再次有了比较合理的采音和写法，然后到524这里，一个保护套扫键后采了俩下难以判断的模糊采音，如果不是很确认的音最好不要混采，用4分平铺过去可能都比这种采法合理的多。
528cb～606cb这段问题不大，606后面开始看得出谱师准备上尾杀强度了，但这段的绝赞采音有点不够明确，除了629cb的俩个绝赞，666cb的8号绝赞，693cb的俩个绝赞和卫生结束的1号星星头绝赞外，其余的绝赞没法让玩家捕捉到明确的采音点。
整体来说这是一张完成度欠佳的谱面，希望谱师下次取得更大的进步。

可能是一开始就将难度曲线基准设置得比较高。我曾考虑过用16:1速度的星星来处理最后的几下（也是很常见的手段），但实际写上去却发现他打起来很硬，但看上去却相比前面空了很多，而ifu这个配置如果不考虑防蹭（所以我上了套），可以做到既没那么难又能做到看上去很有力量的效果。
1:08这个，事实上在我的认识里面，这一段的散音应当是整首歌仅次于尾杀纯音乐段的水平（前面有相对简单的铺垫，后半开始部分偏向于过渡，加速段因为bpm不好写太难），加上这张谱即使目标是为了规整但也需要留下一些让人记住的配置，同时由于这里的排键为了贴合这一段的歌曲需要以一种“两个一组重复三次复踏→单独的两个一组→两个一组重复三次复踏”的方式呈现，因此才安排了这么一个位移配置。
开头的touch主要还是觉得反正touch无所谓，而且这里如果省掉几个音会比较违和，所以无奈只能写成这样。

写的不错啊，因为是官谱对创所以来看一下。整体比较清新稳健，先说优点，个人非常喜欢break在副歌采的那个小音色，很爽。而且我很喜欢白limit break/bbb段，就该这么写。感觉吸收了其他官谱的很多优点和写谱方式，比如最后的那段穿心也是官谱常用手法。
再来说说不足的部分：这张谱子沿中轴线对称的地方有点太多了，会显得谱面没那么灵动。除了穿心，包括像383cb（比方说其实可以写成12，38，47，56），553cb，658cb，684cb，700cb等，因为本身是一张有别于官谱的还算大开大合的谱面，在这些地方抛弃中轴对称转而采取一些更加差异化的写法显然会更好一些。
另外，509cb这里的换手引导有点弱，以及其他做谱失误也是需要注意的点。总而言之写的不赖，感谢你的创作！辛苦了。

关于核心配置的选择问题，选完曲后就在认真考虑了，最终选定下来扫键一是因为确实和曲子空灵的氛围比较贴近，二是因为歌曲的bpm比较合适，180bpm的16分扫个人认为是一个比较舒服的速度，三是因为pv也确实是一直在转啊草，于是就比较极端地一路扫到头了(´;ω;)
以，我目前的排键水平确实还没到能捏出来散打作为核心配置的高度呜呜，如果将来沉淀好了会尝试re一下的

首先我先夸一下谱师，这种th的写法绝对是超级创新的，初见可能不知所措，但细细研究就会发现手顺的巧妙之处，我个人跟感觉除了2：02这段th开发者模式以外，别的稍微研究下就能跟着谱师的思路来，并且我个人觉得非常好玩！
但是整个谱面的问题也不少，首先选曲问题（ 很难创过官谱，然后这种配置展现出来的东西和这首歌很柔的基调有点违和了，也就是不贴歌。
总的来说这个谱分数肯定不会太高，但我觉得创新性拉满了，也是及格线上的作品，毕竟创新分占比很大。
谱面配置一致度很高，副歌键盘虽然看起来挺简单但是很精确地描述了歌曲走向，虽然我个人不太喜欢用touch大面积代替tap
谱面的问题基本都出现在采音上，例如在人声过于松散的情况下死跟人声；副歌人声和鼓点采音混乱；1:13每小节的最后16分漏采等等，再加上歌曲本身采音难度就很大。建议谱师可以先从一些带vocal的官谱开始学习一下。

谱面的结构做的到位，一般通过的小清新谱面。
谱面良好，但没有特别突出的亮点。
（以下为主观评价）
谱面的配置变化欠点，比如开头“{16}x,x,x,x,,,x,x,x,x,,x,x,x,x,,”贯穿全曲，可以围绕这个节奏型多点变化，不同地方除了排键之外还可以做些配置的变形。
跳拍段排键还可以打磨一下，应该有更好的写法。
配置挺灵动的，开始的非c锁手感觉不太好，副歌设计太没特色了，是很大的败笔，要多考虑手感和设计去打磨
个人觉得是个很有意思的铺面，这里简要提几个地方，开头的有停顿的一笔画在子弹的加入后手感比较差，还有一点遮挡视野个人不是很喜欢。一副感觉很不错，从二副开始的星星就开始狂放了，打起来有点难受，个人不是太判断的出来长星星短星星的时值是否相同。铺面整体上看起来还是星星有点乱了，个人建议调调形状就行。
很不错的一张谱面，首尾呼应，星星押的人声长音，唯一觉得不足的是键盘的递进还欠缺一点火候。
已收到你的建议喵！以后写谱会更加注重253cb这种细节上的手序引导（之前在低bpm写过类似配置感觉效果不错，这次忽视了bpm变化带来的影响）还有结构的划分！
总体还行，但感觉整个谱没体现出层次感，22combo处的7号键手感应该不是太好，如果放右边，或者前面的5-8星星速度快点的话会更好点（后面镜像的地方还有6v1接8也是，后面也有几处类似的）
除去内无不谈，谱师选择了低BPM本身就是一项挑战（而且这首歌确实也适合减半来写），键盘摆位有思路，touch段思路超前，令人眼前一亮（虽然不知道上机能不能打上），希望谱师能优化优化细节上的手感，继续努力！

我写谱经常有这个毛病，就是星星配置和键盘不会结合起来，写星星就是星星，键盘就是键盘，而且键盘排键相当糟糕(悲伤)，并不太会排出有趣的配置。166-268这段明显是因为，副歌我不会采音，情绪稍微有点上不去，所以这段害怕喧宾夺主所以收了很多力(但这也太无聊了我说)。我会继续加油的，谢谢你的评论！

开头信息量稍稍大，小问题
20s到30s处的星星时值建议再统一一点，有的长有的短，容易显得杂乱
39s处，`{4}5-8[8:1],{8}6/5,4v3[8:1]`不清楚是不是出张，不是出张则有一定手顺问题，`8-3[8:1],,8/7,{4}1-6[8:1],1/2`同理
58s处，`{4}B3/E3/B2,E5h[1:1],B5/E7,B4/E3,B5/E8,{8}B4/E2,`个人感觉touchhold有点多余了，尤其是还要接27的tap，左手要从E2飞到到7，右手要从E5飞到2，并且间隔一个八分，显得有些紧凑

1m16s处，`7<6-1[8:1]/3-5[8:1]`接上后面的8，只隔了一个16分音符，超级紧凑，很大概率会被蹭
1m23s处，`{16}5bv2v5[4:1],4,5,3,,,,,1v6v1b[4:1],8,1,7,`手顺引导有问题，左手的折返将左手拉回5号，但是又要飞上去打8，过于理想化了
2m12s处，`{8}2,2h[8:1],4,4h[8:1],6,6h[8:1],3,8,`手顺引导错误
2m21s处，`{8}8,8w4[8:1],7/1,8b>3[8:1]*<5[8:1],`正常来写是先写两边再写中间，手大的直接蹭掉了
2m23s处，`5p3[4:1],,3q1[4:1],,1p3[4:1],`内无
2m31s处，,`E2h[8:1]/B2h[16:3],,8,{16}2,3,`touchhold会挡住23号键
2m48s处，直接空了，然后再是最后的`{8}8b,7,6,5,4,3,2,1,{4}B7/B6/B5/B4/B3/B2/C/E5,`很容易给人已经结束了的感觉，但是又在最后写一长串，建议不要偷懒把前面的四分钢琴也踩了，给一个递进的过程
整体谱面结构仍需打磨，存在部分漏音，不采音的情况。部分手顺过于理想化。副歌直接复制粘贴，小小的偷懒了哦。

感觉本铺面整体上来讲的问题比较大，首先采音：本曲其实比起vocal曲，更应该偏向于音游曲的写法，主歌采音的重点可以放在inst上，现在这种卡拉ok的写法就会显得比较散，对称感比较差，两段副歌玩法倒是处理的不错，但是采音还是不够直观，除此之外也有一些如,6/2,{4}6h[8:1]/2h[8:1],5-8[8:1]/1-4[8:1],5/1,处一样，舍掉了更响的鼓点去踩人声的地方，印象会比较差，结尾挺不错的
只能说稳健还是太权威了，引导很棒手感行云流水，各种拍划恰到好处。采音非常舒服，星星组也很有意思，好玩！

关于配置丰富程度和定级，首先这个是一定有14+的，并且还不算简单的14+，不会撑不起定级；其次也同时是因为这张谱本身已经难度很高，我很难再在其中加入丰富的配置，这只会让信息量更加溢出（你如果想凸显每个地方就会导致每个地方都不突出）
至于凸显特殊音色这方面，适合凸显的我都进行凸显了（比如进入纯音乐段之前的配置，用换手启动星星+EX启动拍来凸显那一下的音色），我没有进行凸显的都是不适合或没必要的，比如你这里提到的位置，我如果给所有类似1这样的音色加上EX就会显得我这一段的EX很乱、抓音思路不明确；如果我用不同的键位来凸显，那这里显然已经塞不下更复杂的配置了（本身就是个不太难的段落，不能更复杂了）。

And let me explain my thought process while creating.

Initially, for the first chorus, my idea was to arrange quarter notes in an 'each' pattern, then repeat it with eighth notes. However, the intensity felt too low, so I inserted taps between the quarter-note 'each' patterns to add strength. You'll notice that the positions of the 'each' notes are repeated.

Combo 530 represents my original idea: first use quarter-note 'each' patterns, then repeat them with eighth notes.

As for the modern-style pauses — those probably exist simply because my skill level is relatively low. My initial idea was to make a standard (std) chart, but I don't have a deep understanding of std charting. I likely carried over some habits from creating DX charts, which resulted in those pauses. I'm very sorry."

*先提点小问题，首先是主歌和间奏有一些出张的位置不太友好。181cb这里略挤，其实换成6-3也不影响效果呀；60cb这里这个141应该是出张接吧，如果是的话这个1的出现其实有点吓人；215cb这个出张没有什么必要，需要扭一下去接它；470cb这里左手接3号hold其实还挺紧张的。

*歌曲有些相同段落的采音策略却变了，让人有点猝不及防。比如主歌的24分扫弦，32cb这里两组省掉了扫完抬手的那个16分，但同在一主的135cb却加了这个16分，不太合适吧，其实结尾的加个抬手当成加强倒是没什么问题。
副歌这个问题出在551cb和614cb，一个metatata一个ratatata，用相同的配置没有问题吧，而且614cb现在的这个配置和682cb这个记忆点的配置很类似，有点提前暴露意图了，正好借此改掉。

*副歌metatata和ratatata的地方谱师写了4条星星，我更喜欢写3条只采“tatata”，觉得会更流畅，而且三下强调也和谱子核心配置375cb的三下保持一致了；可以把346cb这里这条3-1/5去掉只留35看看效果，这个也是我个人喜好。

*值得夸得地方就很多了。主歌管子和星星用的不算多但是都很好的表现了音色；副歌312cb这一小段特别舒服，我懂你为什么留这一段www，虽然它和其他地方思路不一致（；副歌的核心配置375cb贯穿两段副歌而且也做了很贴的加强，很喜欢！

*原来393cb是三押，怪不得打着这么别扭

总体是很喜欢的类型，谱面干净忠于歌曲，表现力和玩法都不错，祝谱师取得好成绩！

This is a really cool chart. It plays really well and I think you did a good job representing the song. The 14 difficulty decision for this song, the note placement and density works decently and it really allows the player to engage with the contents of the song.

- Most of the quiet sections of the song feels quite okay. I don't think there is anything wrong with it but this type of charting has been quite overused in the charting scene. Combo 175 is fine but I think having something more unique during quiet sections would be nice. Maybe slow symmetrical, art style chain slides would be cool. I think repurposing the 1-3-5-7/2-4-6-8 concept would be nice here, it would give me a reason to give higher score.
- Combo 575 to 588 is quite hard to understand because the hand positioning afterwards is quite hard to grasp. This type of slide tap usually gives the player more freedom to play how they like. So when it reached Combo 588, it goes back to a forced hand positioning which I wasn't able to understand. Long story short, It took me a long time to know what is the intended playstyle here.

Still, I think you did a decent job with the chart and I think most people would be able to enjoy it. Thank you for your hard work.

还可以，但我认为不足的点相当明显。首先是开头的采音处理，尽管谱师本人说是想要体现微醺的舞步，但我依然认为你在表达想法的时候稍微脱离了歌曲本身。毫无疑问，开头的主歌是一个比较优雅的一个段落，谱师表达的方法却略显僵化，重复不变的采音键位没有做出差分，有一丝违和感。不仅如此，我觉得那个穿心也略显突兀，整个谱面只有这一段穿心，出现在歌曲的前半段，没有铺垫没有后续。穿心后面的主歌融入了更多星星并且采音还是跟鼓为主，还不错。再来到一副，我觉得一副最根本的问题是强度太低了，给人的感觉就是情绪没有起来，但是歌曲在这里的情绪是相当高昂豪放的，没有写出来这种感觉，紧接着的间奏强度比副歌高了太多，像是副歌做了垫子，不太合理。后面的主歌就跟第一段主歌思路完全不一样，有人声采人声，没人声采背景，而第一段主歌则是几乎抛弃人声的写法，我觉得最好还是做出一个统一的标准。二副和最后还可以。整体看下来情绪有点平了，信息量方面没有做出差分，谱面就显得没有起伏，这在偏长的曲子还是相当致命的。

I noticed upon submitting this score, my score is incredibly different from the rest. Hence, I will now proceed to make a stand and talk about in more details why I didn't like this chart.
- Combo 7 should be holds because of the pedal stepping piano. It gives more weight the patterns here.
- Combo 23 should not be crossed hand. There is no indication in the piano that would signify a change in pitch but rather a continuation of chords. Applies to Combo 30, 37,
- Combo 28 taps are fine to be high up but the slides should not move this fast, the vocals and piano never indicates any form of accent to justify this. This speed slide will be a constant issue in this chart so I will not mention this again. This will apply to a lot of slides moving on.
- Combo 46 switches to vocal charting, it will change again at Combo 73, 94, 194, 237
- Double slide at 65 is redundant. In fact a lot of double slides are redundant. Doesn't contribute to the song a lot in terms of representation.
(1/2)

这首曲子是osterproject的一首以swing节奏为主体的曲子 出自音游arcaea
我的原则是不在定数上扣分 评论区中谱师也提到可以当作14级去看待 所以这里暂且不管定数 只说谱面的问题
出于对曲师的喜欢以及对谱面的尊重 我仔细听了原曲 这首歌按照鼓组写法而言 更合适的bpm应该是270 我不认为arc侧标定135是很合适的 因为舞萌写谱对bpm减半是很敏感的 不过既然你使用了135作为bpm 想必一定有自己对曲目独到的理解 后面我会按照该bpm下写法进行评价
先从结构来分析 整张谱面没有明显记忆点 主要依靠大量的跳拍和星星组撑起结构强度 吗？
问题出在swing摆键变化太多 几乎每一段都需要重新记忆 整张谱面会给人明显的信息量溢出感

511cb的wifi星星可以改为两个pp qq星星，如1pp4*1qq6。

Really well made chart! I really like your ideas and the execution on the chart references to the MV. The chorus was super super fun to play and everything felt really smooth as well. I think you did a pretty good job overall. Nothing in particularly really 'Wow'-ed me except Combo 825 which was pretty sudden but also gave me a good laugh. I'm sure nailing that section is super satisfying.

I only have one thing to say which is about a decision you made during the verse and that is the idea of using `{16}x,,,x,,,` as a slide pattern. Combo 131 is one of many examples used. As fine as the decision is, I don't personally like doing it because it doesn't feel too natural. It is the decision making rather than an execution issue. It definitely plays well, and there is absolutely nothing wrong with doing this, it is rather the thought of 'but you could have just done other patterns to emulate the same feeling without the jankiness?'

What I'm trying to get is since your chart is not a slide focused chart, I would prefer to see your thought process of using holds, taps and touches to emulate the same feeling. You did use `{16}x,,,x,x,,` is fine since there is a check slider at the end of the pattern but since you have holds that follow up with this pattern, you could just use more holds.

This is a personal preference so it doesn't affect the overall scoring but I want to end this with a question to you. "If you have the decision to use other patterns to give the same feeling without unconventional slides, why not try a different approach instead?" 111cb开始的这一段写得不错。
246cb的烟花touch会遮挡到后面的note（虽然后面的note加保护套了），建议删除烟花。后续类似配置同理。

377cb的2号位hold建议改到3号位。
437cb开始的这一段键盘写得很不错。
484cb开始的这一段建议把星星删掉。

赶工痕迹有点重，但至少能看出来谱师对vocal曲的处理有还不错的基本功。副歌核心比较突出，其实我认为主歌在人声和伴奏互相切并不是那么严重的问题，因为对于主歌带有人声的两段，谱师的处理是对称的，我认为这也是一种可以被接受的结构和思路，就是采配器的8分定拍为主，再在人声长音处适当放音后，切到更紧凑的人声为主的交互型。
提两个问题，副歌的出张双纵的引导并没有那么自然，有点需要强行拉过去，出张前的交互从正三角改为反三角可能会好一些。结尾段转到采定拍强度反而下降了不少，而且音乐本身没那么明显的氛围转变，这样写是有些突兀的。再退一步来讲，就算要转到采定拍来强调底鼓，个人感觉摆键也可以再优化，同侧的复踏型摆位会比对称型更有强调单个重音的作用。

The whole chart progression is very weird. Let me explain each section.
- The opening section right before the drop is very very lackluster. There is so much you could do with the instrumentals that you either reduce them to a single tap or turn the bass to just a tap. You really could use some swipes to amplify the juicy bass. The slide shape are cool though.
- The drop right after that is peak fun. I love the trills and the way it actually works well with the song even though there are more unique ideas that could be done. It comes down a well made official charting style of patterning.
- Combo 471 onwards, this slide and tap pattern feels overused these days. So I think you really could do something better here. Maybe something more jumpy like 'My Flow' or the final section of 'Never Give Up' might be better.
- Combo 538 onwards feels pretty cute. I think there are ways to improve on it. Maybe some cooler slide design or unique hand positioning would do. Something to make me as a player vibe with.

All in all, **I hate the Luxizhel section of the chart, but I love the Safata section of the chart**.

The keyboarding feels really comfortable and fitting to the song. The overall density, note placement is quite acceptable and I had a lot of fun playing along. I do have a few suggestions:
- Combo 310 is definitely too fast, just reuse the part for the second half here would do.
- The chart may have some really well placed notes but I feel like it has a bit too much of empty spaces. I suggest that during the keyboarding section, turn some of the taps to short holds > h[8:1], so that it feels more complete. Without it, it does look quite empty sometimes.
- Combo 619 and the other variation afterwards is just the same 4 button tap repetition to slide. I think putting them more further apart and maybe use back the short holds and turn adjust to some of the notes to be mini double jacks. I think that way it would feel less monotonous.

Regardless, great job! I had a fun time with this chart. Thank you for your hard work.

感谢你的评论！但是我并不能完全认同你的观点：
我认为两段副歌和间奏段都可以视为重点（核心段落），并且两段副歌之间是有照应与加强处理的。其它段落不论采音密度还是难度都会明显低于主要段落呀，也有build up的处理，应该不会太难分辨吧！
我并没有觉得谱面信息量很小或者说三扫段突然提高了信息量，三扫只是一个替代了弧线星星的强化玩法。就实测组的手元视频来看，信息量的密度大体算是合适，大家基本都能理解到三扫是怎么发挥作用的。另外信息量小并不是缺点吧？！
至于“梦到哪里写哪里”和另一条评论提出过的“散装”类似，这里确实是我的缺点，老实接受了，如果能够具体指出哪些段落有明显问题会很有帮助。
关于星星速度，结尾这里因为背景音已经低下去了，就考虑减缓成了4:1，加启动拍tap是一个小强化，再次切换成8:1是更进一步的强化，用来收束副歌和整张谱面。实测表现来看也并没有造成误导，4:1和8:1在实际游玩来看区别是很小的。
再次感谢你的留言！也欢迎进一步讨论•ᴗ•

后面一直到663cb都很好，然后664这里8号和1号hold看起来是谱师特意设计的反手，后面强度不高，能及时调整过来就影响不大，小初见杀。
最后我不喜欢787cb开始那里之后所有的小扫，虽然加了保护套，上面有定拍锁手hold的话导致出张比较大，34，65上机那里可能不会很好玩。如果换手的话可能还可以就是位移也很大，其他没有问题。

## 整体评价

非王道系优秀谱面，也是我心目中VOCALOID比赛会出现的谱面的样子。虽然有一些小瑕疵，但是瑕不掩瑜。

整体手感还是比较流畅的，整体印象一致性做的也不错。副歌的idea是成立的，这使得这个谱子虽然不是王道系谱但是也可以拿到很不错的分数。如果按照官方评分维度可能创新分不会特别高，但是我认为也应该给这类谱子一个平等的机会所以拉高了一些分数。

## 具体评价

160cb的两条星星脑测以为会很难受，实际打了其实还行。

全曲的几个touch圈（如218cb 302cb）个人实测感觉手感不是很好，歌曲其他相似的部分有的用了touch，有的用了tap圈（如67cb），个人认为如果想保手感不如全都用tap圈。因为这个圈后面是跟配置的，touch圈很挡视野，给玩家的速度预感也比较差。这里可能要酌情略扣一点点分。

350cb的笑脸押手感非常差，因为后面紧跟了配置，我提前看了谱的情况下初测也很手忙脚乱。后面同歌词部分把touch改成了tap，手感就很好了。个人建议如果想保留touch的押法，可以先写tap的版本，再写touch，有一个心理预期会更好。或者干脆为了笑脸押而nerf后面紧跟的配置，留出一些空间出来。这里要扣一点分。

417cb这个星星不知道为什么要用16:1，感觉没有特别大的理由，也不是为了避无理或改善手感，正常8:1就行了。

543cb这里的鼓连打对应的散点，个人认为这里歌曲没有左右进行的动机，鼓组连打散点的方向写成从上向下也许会更贴歌，现在这个从右向左或者从左向右的散点进行虽然也成立，但是从个人的私心上觉得不是最完美的解。当然这一点我没扣分，仅代表个人偏好。

610cb这个扫很精妙，歌曲没有音，但是这个扫产生了一个很不错的衔接。其实原曲这里突然进二副是稍微有一点点打破期待的（正常的期待是进一个情绪骤降，等2小节后进二副），这个扫不仅不突兀，还很好的衔接了二副。是加分项。

755cb开头的三个乐句递进用了每次旋转45度的风车，这个递进其实也是成立的。按照我我的喜好可能会把情绪拉得更高一点，但是这样写其实也完全没毛病。只不过现在这种写法可能在第三个乐句上有一点点显得弱。仁者见仁吧。

922cb，结尾还有个噔噔咚怎么不采！！！！！！！我干死你！

## 总结

总体写的没什么毛病我觉得。我认为比赛谱就可以这么写，每一个点都做到没有毛病，再加一个成立的副歌idea，和一些简单的印象星星印象配置，就可以是很优秀的谱面了。

感谢你的评价与建议！260cb的双押段...?我想或许是说244cb开始的双押或是264cb的双押hold准备进入副歌。前者的话我的采音逻辑还不是主要为vocal段，同时也与副歌**vocal与乐器结合的采音**做区别，后者的话hold采音则也是为了精简，如果用双纵的话对于谱面的前半段强度反而太高。

合唱段的密度，正如我对后面一条评论的回复：斩首剧情是这首歌的剧情高潮，密度随着情感的爆发而提升，所以游玩时甚至会觉得比二副还要难，但那也正是我想表达的。当然每个人对谱面与音乐的结合有不同理解，**二副搭配谱面的最高潮配置**也是广为人接受且大众合理的做法，这也是一种不错的思路。感谢你的喜欢，也祝福你通过谱面能回忆起这首歌曲。

(断头touch的配置，其实也有致敬！这些就等赛后再公开吧）

i cannot say that i have enjoyed this chart...
this chart employs the gallop rhythm very frequently, which is a very difficult rhythm to work with. unfortunately, i cannot say that said gallop rhythm was handled well in the chart...
- - -
- the notes are often placed in random and unorganized place both timing-wise and position-wise (`1 -> 8`). the most prominent example of this is 0:58 - 1:14
  - timing-wise: the tap note follows the gallop rhythm established by the *vocals*. the slides appears here and there sometimes to accent the *vocals*. overall both the tap and the slides more or less follow the *vocals*. this makes 0:58 - 1:14 feels very unsure. the chart starts to diverge from the main beat and it feels **excruciatingly uncomfortable**.
  - position-wise: the notes seemingly just go wherever they want, which adds more onto how unsure and uncomfortable the entire sequence is. the gallop beats are placed *far apart* from eachother, making them way too difficult to read.
  - the problem: this part is both awkward to read and awkward to play. it feels more like whack-a-mole than a rhythm game... if i turned off the music, i would have performed just as horribly as i would have with music on. official charts handle gallop rhythms by putting them on predictable timings and positions (valsqotch) or putting slides strictly on the second beat of the gallops (trick tear) to make them feel more rhythmic. i really think you should redo this section...
- the slides that are unique are also uncomfortable. there are two main examples: `{8}3-1[8:1],1-4[8:1],3/4V25[4:1],5` and `{8:1}3b-6b[8:1],6-2b[8:1],3/2V48b[4:1],1,7`
  - `{8}3-1[8:1],1-4[8:1],3/4V25[4:1],5` is hard to read on first try, easy to splash (4V25) on second try, and uncomfortable to pull off on third try. it's an unique and pretty pattern, but not a comfortable one.
  - `{8:1}3b-6b[8:1],6-2b[8:1],3/2V48b[4:1],1,7` is not a bad idea and it would have been very comfortble and fun IF it didn't have the `1,7`. the slide pattern itself is already quite lengthy and convoluted, so the `1,7` feels extra and even a bit overwhelming. i would recommend turning `1,7` into `1h[8:1]` to put more emphasis on the slides!
- there are some very uncomfortable patterns coming from the gallop rhythm, specifically `{24}4-1b[8:1]*-7b[8:1],,6,3,,5,4b`. there are two slides, so PLEASE don't start them by a gallop beat. it's VERY uncomfortable and this applies to the mirrors and variants of this pattern. i recommend removing one of the slides and only keeping one!
- - -
overall, i think that this is a polished chart on paper. it does *look* organized and clean, but it really doesn't play well... i'm sorry if i gave this such a low score, but i really couldn't say that i've enjoyed this!

I really want to love this chart but there are some sections that are really really not okay for me. Below is the parts which I'm not happy with, if I didn't mention anything else, it means the rest are well executed. Most of the things I point out is mainly the second half.
- Combo 561 to 588 has some awkward note placement, specifically the taps between the slides. I think if you should just put those type of taps at comfortable positions to just let the player enjoy it more rather than force a complicated movement.
- Combo 664, the big C slide along with the Z slides were quite jump scary. The speed was not to be expected of especially for festival slides. Usually if you want to do fast slides like these, it would be better to just use non-festival slides. It would be much easier to inform the players how fast they should be.
- The ending is too much. No way anyone can read that.

Thank you for your hard work.

这里想提出一些修改建议：
1、开头是弱起小节，建议去掉第一个touch，因为它和后面的音不是同一地位；
2、100cb  这里的错位连续使用右手接星星，双手分配有点不合理，导致配置挤在右下角这一块；
3、134cb  这一段的蓝色星星似乎很容易被蹭掉，防蹭需求略高；
4、193cb  间隔8分的双螺旋星星同时划有点极限啦，至少视觉上32:1的8z4会很吓人！
5、对副歌的一个简化建议：不是所有星星都需要加启动拍tap的！不妨去掉一些非重音的启动拍试试看，会不会变得清爽一些？
6、电音段采音挺有趣的，2>4>3<4>3<5-1看得我会心一笑，就是300cb这里还是写得挤挤的，一来不好读节奏，二来可以加点套子；
7、505cb开始这段间奏采音和配置都太杂啦，给玩家一点休息的余地吧，一直高强度输出信息量会很累的；
8、二副也是杂乱的配置有点多了，造成局部读谱障碍和飞手。702 756cb虚空造了扫键，能理解谱师想要强化配置的想法，但是不太合适呀！官谱很多时候都通过简洁不失张力的配置来增强，不妨学习一下同样由镜音双子演唱的*遥控器*（很好玩的一张谱面！）
9、829cb  星星形状干扰有点大，还是建议把fes折线换成不那么遮挡的配置。
不管怎么说，感谢你的谱面！祝你玩得开心，继续加油哦^_^

不知道你的“抓住重点”是什么意思，但我认为对于很有特色的音色或是听感我都通过合适的方式进行了突出。如果你认为某个“很特别”的地方必须写出完全不一样的配置来“抓住重点”，那我可以告诉你这样的地方到处都是，不可能每个都抓出来。而且还有一条，对于14+来说，玩家在玩的时候压根不会在意你突出的“重点”，大家的心思都在游玩上，那事实上更合适的方法是针对游玩进行优化。

前后难度差距很大吗？可以确定的是前面确实比后面简单，但我并不认为这样的难度差距算“不合理”，首先一副的散点已经是比较难的程度了（虽然摆的比较规矩但是抓的很满），而二副的过渡显然没那么难，尾杀的纯音乐段确实因为整体结构需要而写得比较难，但并没有达到一个“不合理”的程度。

总而言之就是我并没有很好地理解你所说的两条问题，不过我暂且认为你的主要观点是难度曲线方面的，所以我将设计难度曲线时的思路细致地讲解了一下，希望你理解我的想法。
谱师来了哦！终于有比较正面的评价了呜呜呜感动！关于件歌的问题我其实也想过，但是drop段的存在使得这首歌剪掉任意一段都会显得很不完整，而且官谱的るろうらんる与这首歌的结构也非常相似，综合考虑个人认为不剪是最好的选择

我会用“清爽”来总结这张谱给我的感受，名副其实的好曲好谱，歌的话已经听了喜欢了很久了，这张谱更是意外惊喜。
各种同型星星的设计和调动动作的拍滑运用非常得当；
450cb附近的混fr协调段可以优化摆键，当两处音轨采音的键距离太远时，如果节奏偏复杂会不好抓音，更何况有一组音轨选择前半用管子声音后半八分采满，即使全部加上了ex套，也会给玩家很大挑战，也许有更好的处理方法；
二副在保持一副整体设计策略不变的情况下，通过增加星星形状、穿插其他小配置、增加绝赞比例还有新加了720cb的这种圈带星的“破格”配置，完美完成递进；
整张谱来看游玩体验大体上极好，没有很大的瑕疵，希望取得好成绩！

## 不扣分但是需要注意的：
204cb`{24}1b,,,4h[24:4],,1b,,,3h[24:4],1b,,5h[24:4],1b,,,8,,6,1,,7,2,,8,`中有一个三押，实测上并无影响，写法上请记得规避一下。

## 设计上的小巧思：
507cb开始的`{16}3xV15[24:3],,8,,7V15[24:3],,2,,3V15b[24:3],,8x,,7V15b[24:3],,2x,,3-6[24:2]*-7[24:2],,`在实测上是一个被默认为提前处理的配置，从看谱和实测上会是两个态度，不清楚是谱师有意为之还是突发奇想。

## 问题：
50cb开始的绕手是一个不适合出现在毫无情感铺垫的开头段落的，绕不绕手前后真的是两个难度，同类对比的话195cb那里就会好一点；
280cb这里进副歌感觉有问题，一笔画的最后一根星星作为副歌的开头，采不上那种副歌起鼓的音色，整体气势就起不来了；
为啥495cb停了？你也不是纯采人声啊，这样子中间就断了一下；
589cb后面的尾段最好和前面的主歌有一定的区分，光排键上的区别还不太够。

# **非常大的问题**：
318cb的`{24}1qq7[24:2],,6,3,,7,1xpp3[24:2],,8,2,,6,1x,,`怎么打都没能明白手顺的设计，实在是打不来。
547cb，额，这个配置确实是理论可行，但是为什么星星启动是从第三条星星开始，第一反应真的就是从第二条开始，太容易读错星星启动了。
578cb是一个明确内无的配置，这个真没招。

## 总结：
总体来说问题还是比较多的，虽然谱师非常清晰地划分了歌曲的结构，但是具体表现还是有些欠缺，没能很好地把控各个配置的细节导致手顺错误和强度爆炸同时发生，望谱师再接再励。

50cb这里的主旋律，踩lead音没什么问题，不过59cb这里补了一下16的底鼓，但是整个乐段只在这个地方补鼓就显得略突兀，不如只踩lead或者把鼓补全，只补一处显得踩音逻辑没那么明确了

540cb进入二副强度递进是正常的 不过这里的三根16:3星星头引导上也是有些突然 直觉上来看 3是用来引导左手划4^1的（此时4^1也马上启动） 但是后面的两下6由于左手被4^1占用让右手不得不飞过去产生了一个会导致手臂打结的出张 假设这个4^1其实是要右手划的话 为了保证右手划星星就要左手打3 那么之后的两下6就造成了一个需要横跨屏幕的位置 手感上也很不舒服 唯一会舒服一点的解是右手3然后直接从3开始划星星（外键的情况下还要切进内屏保证A3能判到不然星星划不动）但这个解就有些太反直觉了不是很符合大部分人的打机直觉 其他引导上存在的问题也可以用上面论述的思路去思考
尾奏的话能注意到根据音高摆是很好的习惯 不过这个思路最好还是贯彻的彻底一点比较好

I really enjoyed the first half. There were some slide and touch moments that took me away from it but there were more glaring issues at the back.

When Combo 699 kicked it I was actually slightly onboard with the concept. Flick holds is something I was not prepared for and I thought it was really cool. I think it fits for the moment so I was ready to say good job... Then I saw what comes after.
- Combo 725 has some really odd decision of doing taps. Would prefer if there was a way to indicate those odd moments, perhaps with short 256:1 holds.
- Combo 749 slides are pretty ugly, I prefer if it was something cleaner and not Festival slides.
- The chorus starting from Combo 817 is way too complicated. I understand that maybe there was a decision to chart something unique to stand out from the contest but this might not be the best way to do it. I think I can speak for the people that we would prefer something more enjoyable, more straightforward and something more comfortable unless there is something unique about the section. This is just a second chorus so I would prefer if it was just simple changes rather than uncomfortable hand swapping and crosshands.

I think you tried your best to do something cool but the second half really dragged you down. I hope you understand where I am coming from and hope to see an improvement with your charts in the future. Thank you for your hard work.

首先歌太长了建议剪一下，至少剪到三分钟以里，舞萌长曲并不吃香
然后，比较严重的结构性问题就是主歌非常非常空，底鼓有很多音但是几乎不采只用少数几组双押和星星带过，就会显得很不贴歌，能听出来是主要采钢琴音，但是这个舍音的方式感觉并不合适
接下来是小一点的问题：
开头划弯曲星星的时候，tap尽量不要摆在易蹭的位置，虽然不无理但上机容易一绿一个不吱声
主歌开始星星形状重复度过高，L型弯星星从头用到尾，是因为要押歌词？如果不是的话建议多调整一下星星的形状分布，L型弯星星和贴边弧线的组合打起来真的不算好受，而且也不是非常美观，而且140combo左右开始出现L型弯星星的时候大概强度就开始飘出曲子的范围了
295combo手序有误，L星星和弧线星星手序反过来了扭麻花了
338combo极蹭，疑似必蹭不过不确定，跟游玩习惯可能有关
460combo开始如果要写这种配置建议先从官谱螺旋抄起，打起来会舒服一点

总体来讲可以有很多精进的空间，谱师愿意的话可以多看多学再修一下谱，期待今后的发挥

I don't really like how the non C touch hold is utilized here. It makes the whole chart look extremely cluttered and it doesn't feel like it works particularly well with the song. It's also one of those time where I preferred the chart was a Standard chart but that's just my opinion, this does not affect the scoring.

I think toning down the touches and focus more on flow would be much better round for this one. Good effort in doing some unique patterns. It was at least a good attempt. Thank you for your hard work.

A chart that feels like it is coming from a relatively new charter. There are some very obvious unofficial mistakes and details that were not taken care of. But if I would to put all those aside and just focus on the playability and enjoyment of the chart, I think you did a really good job at emulating that. The chart is indeed, pretty fun.

I think there will be a lot of commenters who will point out on the obvious mistakes so I will just focus on some design choices that should be polished.
- For once the touches in the first half is definitely over tuned. If you reduce the number of touches and just rely on some parts to be just taps (Combo 35, 51, 73, 89) and less jumpy (Combo 133). That way it would actually make the chart somewhat more pleasing in the eye rather than bombarding information on the screen.
- The quiet section despite being meant to be a rest section (Combo 480 to 566) but personally I would prefer if you had done something else. There is a motif when it comes to note design where each instrument corresponds to a note. In your case its all over the place. The reason why the first half is weird is because you used taps and touches to represent the guitar. Which is why you reached the rest section, which is mainly vocal charting is weird because it feels the same as the front. I would recommend using touches here more as your motif instead. Also to add on, rest section having break slides that are easy to hit actually deflates the difficulty a lot, making this chart feel more 13+ than a 14.

Other than these fundamentals, there are still quite a few note placement struggles and difficulty balancing issues. But to end on a good note, your hand positioning is pretty good, gives me the feeling that you are a pretty good player yourself. Given more time, you might be a good charter one day. Thank you for your hard work.

先说我的观点：因为有撞谱的因素所以要对比着去评，总体来看比起谱师的这张我更喜欢另一张谱，原因如下。
首先我觉的尤里卡农的这首歌一定要爽，但是我觉得谱师可能还是压难度了，导致整个谱打完并没有很爽，我建议可以把位移拉大一点，搞些大开大合会好很多。
然后隔壁因为歌曲剪辑的问题，所以段落配置的衔接性更好，然后谱师这边可能因为休息段预留时间较少没有明显的段落感，太直了，可以用更长的小配置来划清段落，看起来观感更好。
我挺喜欢二副的小配置的，这边的创新分应该是会比另一个高的，但是在手感和游玩欲望上我认为还是隔壁赢了。

创我们狗神的小歌吗，完全没创过啊，先说结论，其实是写的很不错的一张大歌谱，毕竟采音和配置都把音乐表现出来了，非cth的创新也用的很好，还压了1111的物量，很用心在写了。但是这也是最大的问题所在，因为这首歌，它不适合写成这种扫键大歌，这是一首轻快灵动的曲子，应该如果提现这份灵动狗子已经把答案告诉你了，什么类型的曲就该写什么类型的谱，写成这种扫键大歌不仅为难而难还显得臃肿，就像b站的在海底谭里塞白皇帝，是很贴歌，但是也只能沦为笑柄。除去这个大问题，采音方面在后半的双押接扫后一组的交互接扫有点意义不明的区分采音。配置方面就开头有点过于爆了，初见完全接不住这个跳脸的静兰，虽然引导确实没问题但也是在研究过后的了，舞萌大歌应该没有这种开局跳这么大的配置的吧，然后静兰后的混采看着没问题打着手感却很烂，，其他地方就没什么大问题了。很可惜的谱，要是把这份大歌实力换成别的曲子或许能拿高点的分吧

所以对于我来说，前面的一整首歌如果说是P主空灵但又深厚的情感表达的话，结尾的一段就像是孤高的、不在意他人眼光的独舞。因此，在设计结尾的谱面时，我也参考了这种独特韵味，不知道那里的谱面有没有让你产生一种低着头、看着自己的脚、专注地舞动着的感受呢？

谁懂majnet上看一半发现有虚空正解音，打开majdata发现绝赞touch，1v1和四押星星。谱面的问题已经不是哪个星星内无，哪个星星蹭的一比，多押的问题了，从设计理念上就有如下问题：
1. 星星和touch本身就是内屏配置，一起放会让内屏占用率变得特别高，而且谁打touch是精准的点击判定区？这俩东西往内屏一放蹭的要死。即使是植入光中简洁明显的写法打起来也是很容易蹭。
2. 星星信息量的控制上问题很大。星星组什么时候启动，到底踩了人生还是器乐，什么时候换手，没有一个明确的规律。东一根西一根，星星速度还忽快忽慢。可以参考一下Altale的写法，看看Altale是如何去设计的。
3. 如果你打开了djauto，会发现，星星组在内屏完全正攻下，很多星星都会蹭掉一半，这恰好说明另外一个问题：由于蹭掉一半导致的读谱困难以及上机这些星星组就更加蹭了。
我很明白谱师以全蓝为主题去设计这样一张谱面，为了不写重重的绝赞甚至写了Cb，为了逃掉黄色还写了伪双。但我认为，这并不是一张“舞萌”谱面。

扫键有点过于jump scare了，虽然看的出来很想维持核心配置，并且像是比较好的表达了，但是个人并不是很喜欢纯扫键尤其是双押扫强调重鼓点的配置表达方式，重鼓点并不一定只能用很重的扫来表达，扫键+星星，甚至是绝赞都能有很好的表达效果。
前半部分感觉配置有点没考虑明白，有点感觉是想在维持主歌特有的核心下和副歌做出明显区分，星星想法尚可，但是建议先以tap进行和前奏的过渡，再慢慢添加星星加强。
另外715cb处前面和后面的链接星星引导上是偏向一笔画走向，在这里突出变成切换手，手感挺不好的。
采音上并没有大问题。
一张尚可但是个人觉得可以再进行简化优化的谱面，可以尝试先往简洁方向的写谱思路来试着写一下，这里给出来的是及格左右的分数，希望谱师能获得理想中的分数！

会场比较难得的以键盘构造主要核心的谱面，比较耳目一新，谱师也尽力寻求了对如此炫技的歌曲的贴歌表达；有些段落给我一丝丝kold的感觉。

本谱面的优势区间主要集中在：
**1.思路明确结构清晰。**虽然这是优秀谱面必须的条件，不过也可以看出谱师的基本功扎实，对歌曲各部分有明确的想法。第一段副歌使用一只手连续划两根复杂形状的星星为主体的配置，并在形状上做出变化来贴合歌曲，且使用了混入子弹硬抗的散点来突出16分vocal歌词较快的特点，较好地表现了歌曲带来的感觉；二副则延续了一副的核心思路，但将一根星星改为可以单手划的黄星星组，且加入烟花touch来凸显重音，做到了呼应前半的同时合理递进，并且将烟花touch放在一侧边缘、下一组开始的位置放在另一侧边缘，以最大程度避免烟花特效遮挡实现，可以看出谱师的用心。

**2.很好地在合理的范围内利用了一些不常出现的配置用于点缀谱面。**比如345cb这里的双星星，即使上机不会显示变色，这里也利用了两根星星开始时间的不同可以同时展现出来。这样的配置对于信息量不大的小歌来说可以有效让人眼前一亮，又不会影响游玩体验。


本谱面的劣势区间主要集中在：
**1.一些配置选择的小细节和摆键细节还有优化空间。**
①例如*410cb*这里的配置，谱师选择了移动端常出现的“拆叠键”配置，这里选择这样的配置本身没有问题，不过可以看出*410到430cb*这一段主要是为了后面更大跨度的版本进行的引导，然而后面大跨度的版本和其前面的引导版本却从本质上不同，一种是**1223类**，一种是**1322类**。首先这两类显然是后者更简单、且更适配舞萌（因为这一类可以帮你轻易地进行两个一组的分组，从而打好），那么既然选择了后面这一类，前面的引导也应该是同类的才对。谱师这里选择将前面写成更难且与后半不同的1223类还是不太合适的。
②*463cb*开始的一小段散点，这里抓歌曲本身的音所以没采用和vocal一样的子弹写法是正确的。不过这一小段的歌曲虽然是连续的16分，但其重音分组却与摆键不同。摆键是全部分为两个一组读谱的散点，而歌曲的分组应当是XxXxXxxXxxXxXxXx这样的形式。虽然是瑕不掩瑜的小细节，不过如果能在读谱的角度突出其中分组的不同那将会更好。

**2.一些抓音小细节也比较有疑问。**
例如*143cb*这里的配置，这里谱师使用了两根八分间隔、长度为16分的hold接一组双押星星来表现，但是这里的歌曲可以听出节奏是**{16}X,,x,,X,,x,X,,X,,,x,,x,,**这样的节奏（大小表示轻重音），这就会导致从游玩上，你的双星星头是对不上音的，并且第二根hold也只有头能对上音，同时你两根hold算上尾巴和星星头补出来的音是连续五下16分，也对不上这一段本身的节奏。同时紧接着你*167cb*这里又是严格的抓音，那我认为前面一段不如换换配置，把音抓全抓准比较好。


总的来说本谱面是一张优秀的自制谱。谱师经验丰富思路明确，创作出了信息量恰当、难度合适、手感顺畅的优秀小歌。期待一下本谱面在MMFC13的发挥吧。

呢個譜我係真中意，無論系對音點仲系配置嘅使法，都完全符合佐我對呢首歌個期望。
雖然講果個譜好多處都寫得卡手，但上機打佐就知道卡手也系譜師計劃嘅一部分，好多地方出張後往回一拉就體現譜面佐情感表達喇。
288combo同埋615combo處寫個絕贊往回拍touch真系絕佐，好有新意嘅表達方法。仲有707combo呢處寫佐對星星月亮，啱好音樂喺呢度停佐，好似讓玩家喺呢度欣賞呢對星月，太驚豔啦。

整体看下来配置本身的合理性是有的，或者说单拎每一段出来是有在根据歌曲进行配置选择与创作的，同时也没有出现极难或者无理之类的情况。作为一张谱面是ok的。
我觉得主要的问题在于谱面强度的分配不合理。对于这首歌，我觉得合理强度分配应当是：前奏“中”，主歌“弱”，build up"渐强“，副歌1“强”，休息段，副歌2“更强”。因此这张谱面主歌强度有些过高了。例如195cb处与206处连续使用了双押拍滑的黄星星（这类配置的强度很高）放在刚进入主歌的地方不是很合适。主歌也可以通过稍微省一点音来降低强度。
第二个问题是从进入主歌到副歌1结束期间的配置基本都靠星星拍滑来推进，这会使得段落感变得不清晰，同时会有一定的视觉疲劳。可以在其中某段少用星星多用键盘来缓解这个问题。
从副歌vocal结束一直到全曲结束的段落我还是挺喜欢的，继续加油吧！

散装说的主要就是出键比较随意，段落和段落之间区分度不够和段落内配置不够整体化，放在你这张谱来讲段落之间的切换和但段落内的核心是比较明显的，但是段落内排键不够工整导致可预测性差，尤其是在于2副（1副也是比较散但这里主要先聊聊2副），出现了复数种不同样的加强，这种变形是不贴合曲目情绪变化的，游玩时的体验感会比较差，这种都是再调整调整就可以提升的；衔接问题比如说42秒进1副这个24扫接星星，54秒双押星星接的这个6^3，可以理解你想要用星星启动押第一个重音，但星星接的太紧很明显影响了段落之间的切换感，再提一些建议就是副歌全程卡拉ok会导致人声停住的地方流畅度会下降，这种时候可以适当补音，综上所述的这些地方导致了大部分段落的信息量都偏高，反而作为间奏的钢琴段是比较直观的了

谱子整体从结构来说，其实没有太大的毛病，主歌削弱一下也还算可以，两段副歌的递进也做到了，这一点不错。谱师可以对主歌部分精简一下采音，不需要采这么满的，就算是写14也不需要靠塞满采音来增加强度，副歌的强度够了就可以了哇（这一点可以看官谱）。另外主歌采音的部分如果跟鼓的话不太建议混其他的，仅在小节切换期间适当混采变一下感觉就可以了（以0:12部分为例，这边不需要采钢琴的三连音，直接采鼓就好了，钢琴采上去反而会有一点乱）
很棒的谱面，我也很喜欢tak的歌，这谱确实把tak这首的快活跳跃写出来了。但是呢首先采音整体有点平a了，有些不该舍的音有点舍过头了，有些该休息的音又不舍得舍，总之就是起伏有点没做到位，不然能更好的体现歌曲的。配置方面都特别好，不管是动作押还是手顺引导都做的很到位，如果采音起伏做到位了我能给出900，当然最后最后的那个星星配置还是有点扣分，初见容易划反。稍微有点可惜但是是一张好谱！
很规整的一个谱面，感觉有早期谱面的风格，不过借鉴的部分也挺多，最大的问题在于圣剑三叉戟配置实在与歌曲不太搭配，而且感觉写到后面将近灵感枯竭了，不过还是值得一玩的

0:28 为了这两条长的M星星舍弃了太多采音，有点得不偿失
0:30 押快门的touch太多了显得很乱很臃肿，精简一点看起来会更舒服（包括后面同样的部分也是一样的），再加上双压之后前后两组难以分辨方向，也是一个扣分点
0:40 这附近明明有一个很漂亮的音色不采有一点可惜
1:39 这小节的三连音是在采什么确实听不出来，要说把人声采成三连上强度，五组三连的第三组不应该踩上，这个位置前后两句歌词正好停顿，再采多一组反而显得奇怪

减半的想法不错，一次非常不错的尝试，但是可惜采音太过于收敛了，再加上减半之后配置的厚度跟不上，导致谱子有一种为了减半而减半的感觉，没有写出很出彩，反而舍弃了很多歌曲本身的信息量。另外整体的排键可以再精进一下。

PS：其实感觉整体按照原速写，中间副歌的部分前后做好过渡写减半就可以了，没有必要全程都减半，为了减半舍弃太多了
很有趣味的跳拍歌，在律动感的方面做得非常不错。如果主歌和结尾能俭省一下采音的话，会更贴合歌曲的氛围。两段副歌最好捏一个有递进的核心配置，来加强谱面的整体感。

好让人眼前一亮的小歌，虽然整体难度不高，却给人一种感情表达很到位的感觉。
看得出谱师对fes星星和touch要素的运用很熟练了，我觉得这才是dx自制谱面应该有的写法，将dx要素完美适用到谱面创作中去。
552cb处的转圈设计是个人很喜欢的地方，左右手交叉去转touch和tap，给人一种又新又好玩的感觉。
595cb处的过渡段来了俩个touch竖扫，有种斩击的感觉，意外的很贴合pv里面的miku变身段，把贴合的歌曲的情感表达出来了。
897cb的地方用一个短尾cth很好地将音乐里面的颤音表达出来，很有意思的小巧思，打的时候刚刚好也是直觉引导右手去接这个cth，完美衔接后面的手顺。
谱面整体上手感很舒适，引导手顺设计得体，是一张给人观感纯良好谱，希望谱师比赛玩的开心。

辛苦了，好厉害的谱啊。。。
开头和结尾的踩音和配置感觉好精致，有点喜欢了。。
副歌459combo处,2V48[4:1],,8>4[4:1]似乎是一个内无，包括后面的镜像配置
608-640处的设计喜欢，总的来说感觉是一张很优秀很优秀的谱，配置和踩音都很贴歌的情感，感觉没有太多轮得到我来提意见的地方。。。
要说的话大概就是副歌相较于其他的部分感觉到有些没有那么有趣了，或许补采一点音再多写一点东西。。？这里是纯个人主观想法

低bpm下发力衔接的流畅度对手感的影响会很明显，
0:37 126cb 7^4[16:1]/4^1[16:1],6,,3,7/4-8[16:1], 这里打完7/4后右手在4停留，后续衔接3,7/4时右手移动顺序是：从4开始-打3-打4滑到1 这个过程中发力方向需要变换两次。如果改成7^4[16:1]/4^1[16:1],3,,8,7/4-8[16:1], 整体发力会更顺畅一些 同时也能解决内屏7^4跳黄的问题。

# 感谢大家的评论。

###### 因为选曲本身的问题，即使做了最大程度的切剪，也导致时长明显长于三分钟。这使得我抱着“好长的曲子，希望不要累到大家”的心态写了谱面。因此，副歌处的难度进行了刻意的调整——然而，通过大家的评价以及观看巡游组实测，发现果然应该在两段副歌处再加把劲呢。
###### 交稿前如果狠下心来就好了。大家说的副歌的问题确有此事，但也请稍微放我一马……（苦笑）
###### 不知道大家有没有细细品味过一首古典乐的情感变化（也许，有学过乐器更能体会到）——这张谱面整体的设计思路，是顺着选曲的情感变化行进的。
###### 当然，就像在简介里提到的一样，谱面尝试模拟了gumi酱的脚与手部动作，不知道大家有没有察觉出来？请允许我给大家说明一下吧。
---
>90-230cb处从intro正式进入第一段。“黄昏的街巷飘散酒香，在隐约有歌声传出的地方，是否要过去看一看呢？”因此，看上去有些重复的地方，正是模拟了gumi酱微醺以后，踏着音乐前去的舞步；

>300cb处，歌词正好是「少しくらいは酔いすぎる量じゃなきゃ、言い訳にできないでしょ」。只要不是醉的太厉害，也不能当成借口吧？不排除这里使用其他配置会更有潜力的可能性，但也请容忍我在会场里的巧思。所以，使用了touch扫的方法来体现gumi酱已经略有醉意、无处安放的双手。随后跟着的5x,4x,6xh是gumi酱稍微站不稳的脚。但是……她马上就要起舞了~也请看好哟！

>429cb处，模拟了弗拉明戈舞中的Alto手位，即手臂提至头顶上方的动作。与之对应的721cb处、二副的相同部分，则尝试模拟了Braceo+Zapateado的手脚组合（虽然这里的确略显僵硬）。

>第二段主歌由于更多、更碎的乐器的加入，所以放弃了全部模拟舞步，采了一部分人声和器乐用来稍微进行变化；
839cb以后的部分尝试用特殊的写法来体现gumi酱惊人的舞蹈天赋（天呐。）。如果您喜欢，那真是太好了！
